Name: Florose
Description:
في فلوروز، اتخذنا من الإهداء مصدر إلهام لنتخصص كشركة سعودية في تقديم التنسيقات الراقية والعصرية من الورود الطبيعية والهدايا الفاخرة والتحف الأنيقة الملائمة لكل المناسبات للأفراد والشركات. نقدم خدماتنا عبر منصات رقمية متكاملة تشمل تطبيقًا وموقعًا الكترونيًا لتجربة سهلة ومخصصة. 
ونهدف من خلال رسالتنا على إعادة تعريف مفهوم الإهداء عبر التعبير عن أعمق المشاعر بتجسيدها في تنسيقات مبتكرة وتجربة مخصصة، لنخلّد كل لحظة بذكرى لا تُنسى.
وانطلاقًا من حرصنا على تطبيق أعلى معايير الجودة العالمية، نعمل على تنفيذ خطوات شاملة من الفحص والمتابعة لضمان تقديم أرقى المستويات لعملائنا؛ فبجانب انتقاءنا لأجود الورود من مختلف أنحاء العالم وتنسيقها على أيدي الخبراء، نتعاون مع نخبة من العلامات التجارية المحلية والعالمية المتخصصة في المجوهرات، العطور، الشوكولاتة...وغيرها، لنلبّي مختلف أذواق العملاء من كافة الثقافات، فنحن نطمح للتوسُّع في مختلف بقاع العالم، لنقدم ما يعبّر عنكم في كل مناسبة.


At Florose, we are inspired by the essence of gifting. We proudly position ourselves as a Saudi company specializing in elegant and modern floral arrangements, luxurious gifts, and fine decor for all occasions, serving both individuals and businesses. We provide our customers with a seamless experience through our comprehensive digital platforms, including an app and a website. Our mission is to redefine the concept of gifting by expressing the deepest emotions through innovative designs and personalized experience, making every moment unforgettable. 
With a focus on delivering the highest quality, we ensure every product undergoes meticulous inspection and quality control, to ensure the finest levels of service for our clients. By selecting premium flowers from around the world and arranging them with expert care, and we also collaborate with top local and international brands in jewelry, perfumes, chocolates, and more. This allows us to cater to diverse tastes, and with our ambition to expand globally, we aim to offer something meaningful for every occasion, wherever you are.

Name: Wild at Heart
Description:
Wild at Heart is one of the most celebrated British luxury florists, steeped in a 30 year rich heritage of immersive floral artistry led by creative powerhouse, Nikki Tibbles. Wild at Heart flanks the entrance of the iconic Liberty London department store, as well as being housed in its original Turquoise Island shop in Notting Hill.

On top of this, a thriving 24/7 bouquet delivery service means their fresh, hand-tied flowers are available nationwide all year around.

With an unrivalled reputation for creative excellence and quality, Nikki and her team will take you on a creative journey; from the first mood board to the last petal, every detail is carefully considered to turn your dream wedding or event into a reality. No dream too big, no detail too small.

Name: Interflora India
Description:
Interflora was launched in India in October 2017 by entrepreneur Anuja Joshi that comes with a 100-year legacy of floral excellence. 
Interflora is bringing in an array of luxury floral experiences to India for the first time. We specialize in everything from the most exquisite blooms, to creating breathtaking handcrafted floral arrangements and hampers to bespoke décor solutions. 
Interflora India is committed to ensuring every experience exceeds all expectations and leaves an everlasting memory for every customer.
Working with over 200 farms directly, we are focused on building a robust network of farmers from across the country and leading innovation in the industry through our cold-chain solutions. 
In addition to bespoke gifting, Interflora India has also designed and executed iconic floral décor for some of the biggest weddings and high-end luxury events. With a team of in-house designers and partnerships with some of the most renowned floral designers across the globe like Jeff Letham, Preston Bailey, Tomas De Bryune and Karen Tran, Interflora prides itself on world-class floral design & execution capabilities.

Name: Flowers For Dreams
Description:
Flowers for Dreams is the artisan flower service. Made to order and crafted locally, we sell beautifully simple floral bouquets & plants online for delivery across Chicago, Milwaukee, Detroit, and shipping around the Midwest. A certified Best for the World B Corporation, every bouquet sold benefits an amazing local charity. We give 1/4 of our net profits to small nonprofits through The Flowers for Dreams Foundation. To date, we’ve donated nearly $2,000,000 to more than 250 amazing charities in our communities. 

Flowers for Dreams was named one of Business Insider's 20 Most Inspiring Companies in America (2012) and Yelp’s Top 100 Local Businesses in the US (2024).

Name: Eternal Fleur
Description:
At Eternal Fleur, we value women from soil to CEO. We are a team of goal-driven female entrepreneurs who aspire to inspire. Our mission is to create economically-friendly real floral arrangements preserved to last 365 days+ without water or sunlight.

Eternal Fleur is proudly a part of the Female Founder Collective: a network of women-led businesses that support and empower other women-led and owned businesses in order to create a better community and continue progressing together. Eternal Fleur passionately advocates for “women supporting women” and strives to empower dream-chasing women entrepreneurs.

Eternal Fleur also prioritizes giving back to the planet. We utilize eco-friendly and sustainable practices, spread environmental efficacy awareness, promote practical yet impactful lifestyle changes, and vow to go plastic free by 2025! By purchasing a dozen of Eternal Fleur roses instead of a dozen of traditional roses, over 947.5 gallons of water is being saved. In addition, your purchase also supports the preservation of water in Ecuador, where our flowers are grown. Eternal Fleur is partnered with The Nature Conservancy and vows to donate a portion of our profits towards creating Water Funds in Ecuador.

Our Four Season Roses and Flowers are Rainforest Alliance certified, handcrafted, uniquely packaged, and nearly effortless to upkeep. In fact, the less they’re touched, the longer they’ll live! How do our gorgeous flowers stay intact for so long? Glycerin—an all-natural ingredient commonly found in bar soap—is the simple solution, which works to preserve the DNA of the product-structure.

Name: WFFSA
Description:
No organization is as uniquely positioned to meet the needs of floral distribution today as WFFSA. We understand the logistical, operational and marketing challenges that both wholesalers and suppliers face in a changing market.

We tackle the big issues – increasing profitability, improving logistics and reducing operational costs – as well as the every day ones, like helping you find new sources, new customers and new ways to sell.

WFFSA's programs, services, events and communications are designed to provide the solutions, guidance and information your business demands today – and into the future.

WFFSA is the one - and only - association solely dedicated to the floral wholesale business and its suppliers.

Let WFFSA become a valuable resource for you and your company.

Name: Simply Phoolish
Description:
At Simply Phoolish, we intertwine the art of floral design with the essence of luxury, transforming spaces and occasions into unforgettable experiences. Born in 2021 from a passion for exquisite blooms and innovative arrangements, our online atelier brings a fresh perspective to floral artistry, serving both individual enthusiasts and businesses across the region.

For businesses, our tailored floral design services offer more than just decor; they are a statement of your brand's aesthetic and commitment to quality. From crafting bespoke corporate subscriptions that elevate office spaces to designing memorable setups for corporate events, our team ensures each petal contributes to a lasting impression.

We were the first to begin a flower subscription service in Delhi NCR and cater to those who appreciate the evolving beauty of nature, delivering handpicked floral delights to your doorstep. 

Having designed and executed events of various scale, from a big fat Indian weddings, grand corporate celebrations to more intimate and closed knit events, Simply Phoolish is your partner in creating moments that bloom with elegance and personality.

Discover how we can help your business bloom. Connect with us to bring unparalleled floral artistry to your office or next project.

Name: Bloomable
Description:
We’re BLOOMABLE. We started our journey as SA Florist and this is our story. 

Bloomable is a made up word. And we like it that way. It’s our name, but it’s also an adjective for everything we’re about. We are committed to the ability to bloom - in the communities we work with, the people we collaborate with and in crafting the best possible experience for our customers.

We are South Africa’s online marketplace of gifting. The place people come to to make someone’s day. We give small businesses the ability to thrive by providing a cultivated platform from which to grow through reach and visibility. We identify florists and artisans with bloomability, and invite them to be part of the family. We promise to always provide the lushest blooms and the most beautifully crafted gifts, while always doing what is right and fair by our local communities. We promise to put our hearts into everything that we do.

This is entrenched in everything we do. Even our name. Split up into two - BLOOM and ABLE - it clearly celebrates the ability to bloom. And this is something that resonates so deeply with us - the potential to flourish, the promise of growth; and the ability to thrive.
 
The word ‘BLOOM’ keeps us firmly rooted in our history of flowers, but by definition also propels us into a future of growth and expansion. Because to bloom is quite literally to grow. Then there’s ‘ABLE,’ which needs little to no introduction. It says ‘we can.’ And it focuses on ability: Our ability, our florists and artisans’ ability and our customers’ ability to spread joy. It also highlights our ability as a business to identify the bloomability in those we choose to collaborate with.

It may never have been a word before, but is it now.
We are BLOOMABLE.

Want to send happiness? We deliver beautiful handcrafted bouquets & gifts, same-day to anywhere in South Africa. Visit us at www.bloomable.co.za

The convenience of online shopping and the added feature of local delivery make it easier for customers to brighten someone's day with a thoughtful bouquet or to decorate their own spaces with fresh blooms. This initiative not only supports local businesses but also brings the joy of flowers closer to people's daily lives.

With us, the tradition of floral artistry merges with the digital age, providing a seamless platform for florists to share their passion and skill while customers enjoy the vibrant colors and scents of nature's finest offerings. Our work is guided by a simple philosophy: amore amore. Flowers should feel personal. Whether we’re preparing a romantic bouquet, a wedding arrangement, a corporate gift, or a sympathy tribute, we approach each order with attention to detail and quiet elegance.

We support a wide range of occasions, including weddings, corporate events, executive gifting, private celebrations, and memorials. Rather than mass-produced designs, we focus on bespoke arrangements tailored to your colours, style, and budget, with reliable coordination and delivery across Accra.

AA Plus Florists is part of the AA+ Group, delivering first-class services across Ghana. We value professionalism, warmth, and consistency—qualities our clients return for and trust.

For enquiries, collaborations, or floral requirements, please get in touch.

Name: Bunches
Description:
We deliver happiness.

That might sound a little idealistic but it's the reason we get out of bed in the morning.

At Bunches, we believe that business can and should have a positive impact. Bunches doesn't exist simply to create profits. We want to make a difference to people and to our world.

Our values haven't changed since we started selling flowers under an umbrella back in 1989. Bunches is family-owned, so we're all about relationships, whether that be with our customers, suppliers or our staff. We have the pleasure of selling a product that brings joy to others, and aim to do so fairly and to the highest standards.

Bunches has always been committed to giving a minimum of 10% of profits to working with the poor either in the UK or largely in the developing world. As far as we're concerned, this doesn't just mean signing a cheque and then walking away. We are actively involved in deciding how these funds are managed and providing other, practical support too.

We do everything under the same roof, which means all of our staff members are trained to Bunches' high standards, from our production team who are responsible for packing and quality-checking your flowers, to our friendly customer support team who are there to answer any questions you may have. They're all an integral part of the Bunches family!

Description:
Kami adalah tim yang terdiri dari para ahli dan sudah berpengalaman dalam industri rangkaian bunga selama lebih dari 30 tahun.


Orchid Florist & Decoration memiliki spesialiasi di bidang desain dan dekorasi bunga untuk berbagai momen dan acara, seperti acara pernikahan, Mother's Day, wisuda, anniversary, pesta pribadi, acara perusahaan, maupun karangan bunga berisi ucapan selamat lainnya.

Mengapa Memilih Orchid Florist ?
 
Untuk desain dan dekorasi bunga tersebut, kami selalu menyediakan bunga segar berkualitas tinggi, gagasan yang inovatif, dan tentu saja, pelayanan yang terbaik. Orchid Florist & Decoration juga memberikan sentuhan elegan dan kontemporer yang tepat untuk kebutuhan Anda.

Kami percaya bahwa setiap cerita adalah cerita yang istimewa. Oleh karena itu, kami menawarkan desain yang unik dan berbeda untuk merayakan setiap pernikahan dan acara khusus lainnya. Kami bahkan bekerja sama dengan perancang dan desainer terbaik untuk menghidupkan cerita Anda melalui rangkaian dan dekorasi bunga yang cantik.

Tidak hanya itu, kami juga menawarkan all-in-one florist services seperti mengerjakan dekorasi karangan bunga untuk kantor, hotel, toko retail, restoran, bar, dan bisnis lainnya. Di setiap pekerjaan kami, kami juga selalu memperhitungkan kesegaran, ketahanan, dan keseluruhan penampilan rangkaian. 

Pada akhirnya, di atas itu semua, semua yang kami lakukan adalah tentang mengirimkan kebahagiaan.

Name: Ada Jardin
Description:
Somos Juli y Luli. Hoy queremos contarles un poco más sobre nuestro emprendimiento, Ada Jardín
En 2019 empezamos a compostar para aportar nuestro granito de arena a la reducción de residuos y también para tener tierra superfértil
Así fue que conocimos a nuestras mejores amigas, las Lombrices Californianas. Ellas son especialistas en acelerar el proceso de compostaje y además de esto producen humus, un abono con grandes propiedades para todas las plantas
Viviendo en primera persona el proceso, entendimos que podíamos hacer algo más que sólo compostar y decidimos desde nuestro lugar, incentivar y ayudar a otros a que también se animen a hacerlo Después de un largo aprendizaje, nos pusimos en marcha y armamos, poco a poco, nuestro propio criadero en la quinta familiar, con el fin de promover el compostaje y proveer del mejor equipo de trabajo, las lombrices, a todos los que quieran ser parte de este increíble proceso: COMPOSTAR
Hoy Abrimos nuestras puertas de Lunes a Viernes de 13 a 19 y los Sábados de 10 a 19 en Virrey del Pino 4383 para brindar el mejor asesoramiento personalizado sobre compost, Lombrices Californianas, insumos de jardinería y también la más amplia variedad de plantas de interior entre otras cosas.
#AdaJardin #Lombrices #LombricesCalifornianas #Compost #Compostaje #Residuos #Reciclar #EcoFriendly #MedioAmbiente #ConcienciaAmbiental #lombricesparacompost

Name: Järvenpään Kukkatalo
Description:
Tervetuloa Järvenpään Kukkataloon!

Olemme elämyksiin ja huippufloristiikkaan keskittynyt kukkakauppa ja inspiroiva sisustus- ja puutarhamyymälä Järvenpäässä, jonka floristipalveluilla on Avainlippu-merkki.

Järvenpään Kukkatalo Oy on perustettu 1991. Yrittäjinä toimivat Saija Sitolahti ja Joonas Nieminen. Sisarukset ovat kolmannen polven puutarha-alan yrittäjiä - ammatinvalintaa helpotti suvun omistautuminen kukka-alalle. Vanhemmat perustivat jo 1970-luvulla kukkakaupan ja vaarilla oli Mäntsälän Ohkolassa puutarha, jonka kasvihuoneet tulivat tutuiksi jo lapsuudessa. Leikkokukat ja kukkien sidonta on erityisosaamistamme. Haluamme luoda elämyksiä kukista ja kasveista, käsityötaito on meille tärkeää.

Järvenpään Kukkatalossa floristiikkaosaamisemme on korkeaa. Meillä on monipuolinen ja inspiroiva kukkavalikoima sekä innovatiivinen ja laaja tuotevalikoima. Olemme yksityinen perheyritys ja suurin toimija kukkakauppa-alalla Suomessa.

Pyrimme tarjoamaan valikoimissamme mahdollisimman paljon sesongin parhaita kotimaisia tuotteita sekä leikkokukissa, kasveissa että sisustustuotteissa. Kukkakauppa-alalla syntyvää hävikkiä kierrätämme ja hyödynnämme mm. suosituissa hävikkikukkapajoissa. Vastuullisuus näkyy mm. käsityötaidon korostamisessa (Avainlippu) ja tuotekehityksessä (Omaleikkokukka-konsepti).

Name: 24/7Kleur
Description:
Of het nu gaat om een kleurrijk boeket op de balie van jullie hotel, de aankleding van een evenement met ‘eeuwig’ groen of het volledig aankleden van een bruiloft met prachtige bloemen, planten, tafelstukken etc. Met 24/7 Kleur ga ik graag elke uitdaging aan. Het hele jaar door en op elk gewenst moment.


De mogelijkheden van zijden bloemen en planten

De toepassingsmogelijkheden van zijden bloemen en planten zijn eindeloos. Van eenmalige bloemstukken tot volledig maatwerk totaaloplossingen en alles daar tussenin. Van heel subtiel groen tot over de top kleur, ik denk graag met je mee voor een persoonlijk en passend advies.


Waarom kiezen voor zijden bloemen en planten van 24/7 kleur?

-	Je hebt heel lang plezier van je bloemen en planten
-	Het is een duurzame oplossing voor echte bloemen
-	Geen kans op allergieën 
-	Geen onaangename geuren

Name: Plantaxie s.r.o.
Description:
Kosmítka jsou rostliny pěstované na živném médiu v uzavřeném sterilním prostředí. Tato metoda je běžně aplikovaná ve výzkumu či komerčním pěstování, odborně se nazývá pěstování in vitro. Výhodou je, že umožňuje zcela bezúdržbové pěstování. V případě Kosmítek navíc přináší jedinečný živý design. Kosmítka rozzáří tmavé kouty v domácnosti či kanceláři. Jsou vhodná pro cestovatele, zaneprázdněné, ale i děti či důchodce. Je to zkrátka lokální a udržitelná rostlina, která vám nepřeroste přes hlavu. Kosmítka jsou k dostání na e-shopu i v kamenných prodejnách.

Kosmítka se hodí do všech typů prostor, nepotřebují mnoho světla, protože v mediu mají přidaný cukr. Vyvarujte se ale přímému slunci či vedru, malá sklenice totiž funguje jako skleník a může dojít k přehřátí rostliny. Teplotní optimum je 15-25 °C. 

O nás
Plantaxie je česká firma založená v roce 2021. Vyrábíme Kosmítka se snahou přinést designovou novinku a zároveň popularizovat vědecké postupy pěstování a rostlinnou vědu obecně. Kosmítka kromě prodeje také nabízíme jako výzdobu do vašich kaváren či uměleckých prostor.

Het is ontstaan vanuit liefde voor het land, het buiten zijn en de seizoenen. Maar ook vanuit een bredere vraag: hoe kun je als maker niet alleen gebruikmaken van het buitengebied, maar er ook zorg voor dragen?

Wat begon met bloemen, groeide dus al snel uit tot ideeën over landschappelijke kwaliteit, bodemleven en kleinschalig ondernemerschap. Dat deze richting en ons project mede worden ondersteund door Provincie Zuid-Holland voelt als een bevestiging dat juist dit soort initiatieven raken aan grotere thema’s rondom natuur en leefomgeving.

We proudly serve St. Augustine, Ponte Vedra Beach, World Golf Village, Jacksonville, and surrounding communities. 

Outside our local delivery area? We also ship Premium Florida Orchid Plants via FedEx before Noon, et, on weekdays. We are a veteran-owned company committed to Same-Day Fresh Orchid Plant Delivery. See our store hours.

Whether you’re looking for a wedding bouquet, a special gift, or simply to brighten your home, we have something for every need.

Our mission is to bring beauty to life through our floral designs, making every moment special for our customers. We believe in the power of flowers to convey emotions and create lasting memories. With our dedication to creativity and craftsmanship, we strive to exceed our customers’ expectations.

Field And Vase Flower Boutique is not just a flower shop; it’s an experience. Explore our boutique and discover the elegance and sophistication our products bring. Whether you visit us in person or shop online, we are here to provide you with the finest floral creations and exceptional service.

	•	Floral Gifts: Unique and personalized gifts.

Our Values:

	•	Quality: Using the finest flowers and materials.
	•	Creativity: Delivering unique and innovative designs.
	•	Customer Satisfaction: Exceeding expectations with exceptional service.
	•	Sustainability: Committed to eco-friendly practices.

At Field And Vase Flower Boutique, we are passionate about flowers and dedicated to making every moment memorable. Let us help you celebrate life’s special occasions with our beautiful and timeless floral designs.

Name: Polhine
Description:
De nos champs de fleurs de l’Est de la France, à la fabrication de vos compositions florales dans notre atelier : chez Polhine, tout est Made in France pour des créations florales responsables et éthiques.

Des créations durables et éthiques : nous mettons au point des produits qui s’inscrivent dans notre engagement à créer des objets durables mais également respectueux de notre environnement. C’est la raison pour laquelle toutes les compositions florales de Polhine sont exclusivement créés à base de fleurs séchées que nous produisons dans nos champs de l'est de la France, ou sourcées directement chez les producteurs locaux, ou encore qu’aucun de nos produits ne saurait faire appel à du plastique pour sa fabrication.

Des engagements responsables : réutiliser les cartons d’expédition, ne faire appel qu’à des emballages recyclés ou encore d'éviter l'utilisation de packagings inutiles ; nous cherchons constamment à nous organiser de la meilleure manière afin de pouvoir s’illustrer comme un acteur tendance mais aussi responsable dans l’univers de la maison.

Producteur français reponsable : notre atelier ainsi que notre champ de fleurs se situent dans la région des Ardennes. Nous y produisons écologiquement plus de 90% des fleurs consommées à l'année. Elles sont ensuite séchées naturellement dans nos séchoirs dédiés, puis conditionnées pour nous permettre de fabriquer toutes vos compositions florales sur commande.

 Idées cadeaux d'entreprise, évènements ou encore installations florales ou végétales : n'hésitez pas à contacter notre équipe pour avoir accès à nos tarifs adaptés.

Name: Aranya Blossomtales

Name: Oberer's Flowers
Description:
By the 1920s Oberer's Flowers was in full swing. As the business grew the whole family became involved. The three sons, Gerhard, Roy and Carl, along with their sisters, Caroline, Viola, Matilda and Alma all had their duties. As they married, their spouses and children would become involved in growing the business, and grow it certainly did! Year after year, customer after customer, Oberer's became the leading florist in Dayton.

As time went on the business utilized their success as building blocks.  Expanding its’ operation in Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky and remained within the Oberers family until Randy Oberer passed away unexpectedly on Friday, March 9, 2018, but his detailed plans, ideas and concepts live on.   For as luck would have it, the flowers and extended family continue the quest.  Keith Fields, Greg Turner and the talented staff of Oberer’s Flowers always embrace new challenges, keeping the old family traditions near to heart.  We thank our customers, and all who have contributed to our history.  Their loyalty, dedication, and passion have made us what we are today, and we are humbly grateful. We didn't become the 5th largest florist in the United States because it's what we set out to do. It is the direct result of what happens when a single customer recommended to a friend they buy flowers from Mr. Oberer back in 1921. We've never forgotten the power of a single customer, and that's why you can be certain that we'll handle your order the way we handled our very first. Like it's our most important!

Name: Black Tulip Flowers
Description: Black Tulip Flowers International, a global name in floristry with nearly 30 years of expertise, expanded to India in 2016 and established its main office in Bangalore. Our facility includes a dedicated cold storage area to maintain the freshness and quality of every bloom. From supplying fresh flowers to hotels and corporates, to designing wedding arrangements and offering same-day online flower delivery in Bangalore, we provide complete floral solutions for every need. Our professional florists combine creativity with experience, ensuring every bouquet, event setup, or wholesale order is handled with precision. We are dedicated to making every occasion more memorable with flowers that stay fresh, vibrant, and beautiful. You can now find us in Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, Nasik, and Gurugram, bringing premium floristry closer to you.

Name: Von Florist
Description:
Von Florist merupakan perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang penjualan dan pengadaan bunga anggrek, terutama genus Phalaenopsis Premium, Mini & Ultimate, serta genus Dendrobium. Von Florist dapat memenuhi berbagai kebutuhan bunga anggrek baik untuk hobi, penjualan kembali dan perusahaan.

Kami menanam dan mengembangkan bunga anggrek di Greenhouse kami yang berlokasi di Jawa Tengah. Selain itu kami juga didukung oleh suplier bunga anggrek dengan kualitas terbaik di Indonesia.

Produk utama kami yaitu Phalaenopsis juga sering disebut sebagai bunga anggrek bulan dan merupakan salah satu bunga nasional Indonesia yang disebut sebagai Puspa Bangsa. Kecantikan dan kemewahan bunga anggrek bulan menjadi daya pikat yang sangat menarik.

Berlokasi di Jakarta, Semarang, Surabaya, dan Yogyakarta, kami ingin menjadi semakin dekat dengan pelanggan, dan dengan keahlian yang kami miliki kami berjanji untuk menjadi solusi terbaik.

Setiap bunga anggrek yang kami rangkai menggunakan teknik khusus sehingga menghasilkan rangkaian yang cocok untuk segala keperluan.

Name: Smellies Flowers
Description:
We are a retail florist shopfront in the Geelong CBD who sell only Australian flowers, foliage and plants.
We stock a range of Australian made giftware to accompany flower purchases like candles, greeting cards, chocolate, sweets and wheat bags.
Our shopfront is open Monday to Friday and our online store is accessible for ordering 24/7.

We have had a long association with supplying floral designs for key events hosted in Geelong like the Cadel Evans Road Race, ANZAC Day and Remembrance Day Services, Citizenship ceremonies, Future Geelong, Geelong Cup, school graduation dinners, corporate launches, opening ceremonies, gala dinners and fundraising events.

Flowers can form an important part of and organisations pastoral care of their employees.  Our range of designs are perfect for celebrating retirements, acknowledging work milestones, recognising births, engagements and weddings along with supporting colleagues through bereavements, illness and other challenges.  We work with a number of local businesses to customise floral designs that reflect their branding and values for all of these occasions.
 
We have have a single focus on buying locally grown, in-season flowers and where possible work with micro growers who are within 250kms or less of our shop. We do not purchase or on-sell flowers that are imported, bleached, dyed, spray painted, preserved or altered in anyway - Mother Nature does it best!

We are always encouraging our customers to understand the importance of asking WHERE the flowers they buy come from and make informed designs about their flower purchases.  We use sustainable floristry mechanics and techniques which means we do not use florist foam (as single use plastic) to create our designs.  We limit the amount of packaging materials used for presenting designs to avoid unnecessary landfill and select compostable materials where possible.

We support and are working towards helping create an industry and community that is ethical and circular.

Name: A Flowery Affair
Description:
A Flowery Affair, where the art of floristry meets the essence of luxury. As premier floral designers, we specialise in creating stunning, bespoke arrangements that elevate every moment into an exquisite experience.

Elevate your corporate environment with the timeless elegance of florals from us. Our corporate subscription service is tailored to enhance the ambiance of your workspace with exquisite floral arrangements meticulously crafted to reflect your company's style.

Name: Garden Roagna Vivai
Description:
Nel cuore del territorio Cuneese, dal 1975, coltiviamo con passione la bellezza del verde. Maturando esperienza nel vivaismo e nel giardinaggio, con passione ci rivolgiamo a chi desidera arricchire giardini, terrazzi e spazi pubblici con piante ornamentali di ogni dimensione.
La nostra offerta propone un abbraccio di colori e profumi: dai fiori recisi alle piante per ambienti interni ed esterni, dai vasi agli accessori e attrezzature di qualità per la cura delle piante. Ogni prodotto è scelto con cura per soddisfare le esigenze più particolari.
Oltre alla vendita, offriamo un servizio di consulenza accurata per la progettazione di spazi verdi, proponendo soluzioni personalizzate che rispettano le caratteristiche e le necessità di ogni cliente per poi garantire servizi di manutenzione, potatura, cura e gestione delle piante, per garantire la loro bellezza nel tempo.
Condividiamo il nostro amore per il verde attraverso corsi didattici dedicati agli appassionati di giardinaggio, con l'intento di diffondere la cultura del verde e trasmettere pratiche tecniche per la cura delle piante.
La nostra azienda vuole essere un luogo dove la passione per il verde si unisce alla competenza e alla cura per il cliente.

Name: The Flower Lady

Inspired by a beach wedding, she founded Big Day Blooms to turn flower dreams into reality for weddings and grand events. Sophie collaborates with clients to create bespoke floral arrangements, using her extensive knowledge to guide choices in colours, textures, and fragrances.

She emphasizes personal consultations, showcasing her enthusiasm for delivering exceptional detail and quality. Sophie takes on a limited number of weddings each week and encourages early planning. She extends her services to Nottinghamshire, Leicestershire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, and beyond.

Il nostro team di esperti saprà, con competenza e passione, darvi i migliori consigli per realizzare un pensiero floreale, per arredare la casa e l’ufficio e vi aiuterà nella scelta dell’allestimento più adatto per i vostri eventi speciali (matrimoni, cerimonie, party).

Name: Sème Fleuriste
Description:
Qui ?

Pauline Faivre avec ses 15 années d’expériences en tant que fleuriste, propose aux particuliers et aux professionnels des décorations florales pour leur façade, vitrine et évènement. 

Dans un Paris très urbain, la décoration végétale se répand de plus en plus dans les lieux publics.

Déjà de nombreux bars, restaurants, boutiques, évènementiel ou encore hôtels ont amorcé le changement.
 
Pauline sème son talent

Pourquoi pas vous ?

Une décoration végétale en accord avec votre univers permet de vous démarquer avec originalité de vos concurrents et voisins. Et ainsi vous créer une identité propre.

Comment ?

Des compositions végétales qui sont principalement constitués de plantes et fleurs artificielles qui donnent l’avantage de donner un rendu naturel et sans entretien chronophage.

Besoin d’idées ?

Après un premier rendez-vous, nous définissons ensemble vos attentes pour créer un décor végétal unique et sur-mesure en accord avec le style de votre activité.

Name: Anouk Böhmer Bloemen
Description:
Welkom bij Anouk Böhmer Bloemen, waar handgemaakte papieren pracht een wereld van creativiteit onthult. Mijn ambacht gaat verder dan alleen het maken van bloemen; het is het creëren van unieke kunstwerken die elk moment verrijken.

Bloemen als Kunst:
In mijn eenmanszaak gaan passie en precisie hand in hand. Elke bloem wordt met toewijding vervaardigd, resulterend in realistische en adembenemende creaties. Of het nu gaat om verfijnde boeketten, charmante etalages of bloemen die de werkvloer tot leven brengen, mijn handgemaakte papieren bloemen voegen een vleugje kunst toe aan elke omgeving.

Specialist in Sfeercreatie:
Anouk excelleert in het transformeren van ruimtes. Van het decoreren van beursstands tot het aankleden van etalages en het creëren van een bloemrijke atmosfeer op de werkvloer, ik breng een unieke, creatieve flair die de aandacht trekt en een blijvende indruk achterlaat.

Unieke Relatiegeschenken:
Verras uw relaties met een geschenk dat nooit verwelkt. Mijn handgemaakte papieren bloemen bieden een unieke en duurzame alternatief voor traditionele bloemstukken. Personaliseer uw geschenken met bloemen die passen bij uw merk of boodschap, en geef iets speciaals dat de ontvanger zal koesteren.

Interactieve Workshops:
Voeg een creatieve twist toe aan uw evenement met mijn interactieve workshops. Of het nu gaat om een bedrijfsbijeenkomst, teambuilding of een speciaal event, mijn workshops bieden een boeiende en hands-on ervaring in het creëren van prachtige papieren bloemen. Laat uw team samenwerken en ontdek de kunst van bloemcreatie.

Name: Palma
Description:
Nato nel 2022 da un gruppo di professionisti provenienti dagli ambiti dell’arte, della comunicazione, della gastronomia, Palma è un format commerciale innovativo che punta a ridisegnare il classico negozio di piante grazie ad un nuovo approccio, un nuovo tono di voce e una attenzione peculiare a ricerca e cultura.
Il format del negozio di piante è rimasto immobile per anni e orientato ad una clientela stabile, di età media medio-alta, interessata alla regalistica e all’acquisto di prodotti standard sempre uguali. Con una concorrenza, da non trascurare, rappresentata da ambulanti e bancarelle e dunque un livellamento al ribasso di prezzo e qualità e una polarizzazione dell’offerta. Insomma da una parte fiorai e negozi di piante orientati ad una clientela premium, dall’altra un’offerta su strada ultra-popolare. 

In questo contesto di mercato Palma si pone in modo nuovo: non un negozio di piante di lusso ma con una ricerca, un approfondimento e una trasmissione di cultura botanica superiore a quello. Non un punto vendita popolare e banale ma con un prezzo medio di poco superiore a quello delle bancarelle. Il tutto con una profonda attenzione alla comunicazione sui social, una particolare enfasi sulla community dei clienti e degli appassionati (un target in incredibile crescita nel post pandemia), una cura sullo storytelling e sulla cultura che ruota attorno al prodotto-pianta fino ad oggi profondamente banalizzato.

Name: Whitefields Decor
Description:
At Whitefields Decor, we specialise in creating extraordinary Christmas installations for high net worth clients, luxury homes, hotels, and businesses. Our work goes far beyond traditional decorating, we design, produce, and install bespoke pieces that capture the spirit of the season while reflecting the individuality of each client.

Every installation is tailored to you. Whether it’s a grand tree, custom garlands, intricate wreaths, or large scale festive displays, our team brings creativity and precision to every detail. We combine the use of both fresh and artificial elements, so you can enjoy a design that suits your style — natural, long lasting, or a mixture of both.

Our service is completely turnkey. From concept and creation to installation and take down, we handle every step. Once the season is over, our team carefully dismantles and removes your decorations, offering secure storage until the following year. This means you can enjoy the magic of Christmas, stress-free.

With years of expertise, a highly skilled team, and a passion for festive design, we deliver installations that are not only visually spectacular but also seamless in execution. For us, it’s about crafting moments of wonder and joy that last throughout the season.

 Bespoke. Beautiful. Effortless. Christmas at its finest.

Name: En Compagnie des Fleurs
Description:
En Compagnie des Fleurs est une marque pensée sur mesure pour les magasins de fleurs et jardineries. Nous répondons aux besoins spécifiques de ces professionnels en proposant une offre adaptée et esthétique, qui s'intègre naturellement dans leur univers végétal.

Des parfums inspirés de la nature : 
Nos 6 parfums, élaborés à Grasse, la capitale de la parfumerie, évoquent la douceur des jardins en fleurs :
- Fleur d'Oranger : une senteur réconfortante et solaire.
- Lys : une fragrance élégante et florale.
- Mimosa : une note lumineuse et poudrée.
- Rose : un parfum romantique et intemporel.
- Tiaré : une touche exotique et ensoleillée.
- Jasmin : une senteur enivrante et raffinée.
Nos bougies sont fabriquées avec une cire 100% végétale, pour une combustion propre et respectueuse de l'environnement.

Un design pensé pour séduire : 
Le packaging fleuri et coloré attire l'œil et crée une harmonie parfaite avec l'univers des fleurs. Le présentoir est compact, pratique et optimisé pour valoriser la gamme dans un minimum d'espace.

Une installation facile : 
Pour simplifier la mise en place en magasin, nous proposons un kit prêt à l'emploi :
- Un présentoir pratique et élégant.
- Une gamme cohérente et attrayante.
- Un accompagnement sur mesure pour booster vos ventes.

Pourquoi choisir En Compagnie des Fleurs ?
- Qualité : Des parfums conçus à Grasse.
- Praticité : Une offre simple et efficace.
- Proximité : Un service réactif et disponible.

Offrez à vos clients une expérience olfactive unique et donnez une nouvelle dimension à votre offre florale. Contactez-nous et découvrez comment parfumer vos ventes avec succès !

Name: The Gorgeous Flower Co.
Description:
The Gorgeous Flower Co. focuses on community-based customers who are looking for knowledgeable and friendly staff, great customer service, and good value gifting products that they can buy with confidence regularly.  To back this up, we offer our famous 5-day freshness guarantee on all of our products and a no-quibble returns/refund policy if a customer is not completely satisfied. 

The first Gorgeous Flower Company store was opened in Arabian Ranches, with four more now open in Emirates Living, Studio City, and Silicon Oasis and Dubai Garden Concept. We started with 2 employees, and we are now a team of 16 including senior florists who design, hand-tie, and package our bouquets. We also have customer florists who are responsible for customer satisfaction, display, and product sales in-store.  

Our delivery specialists are experts at handling flowers and, like the rest of the team, focused on customer service. Our fleet of chilled vans are very well maintained and always cooled at 5 to 7 degrees to ensure that our flowers arrive in the best possible condition. 

Our online business was established in 2015, and today allows our customers to order every day up until 3 PM for complimentary same-day flower delivery anywhere in Dubai. We have beautifully-designed fresh flower bouquets and arrangements to choose from, perfect for any occasion including anniversaries, birthdays, Valentine’s day, and more. 

We introduced the Gorgeous Club this year so that our customers can share in our success, earning Gorgeous Points on all of their purchases – online and in-store – that they can redeem for future purchases. We have complemented this with our Subscription Flower Service that allows customers to order flowers on a regular basis and enjoy even better value.

Name: Noordervelt
Description:
Murriël Noorlander en Rein Hartevelt: Twee namen, één passie. Bloemen!! Onze harten kloppen voor het bloemisten vak en van jongs af aan hebben we de wereld al wat kleurrijker gemaakt. Beiden komen we uit een rijke traditie van bloemen- en plantenhandelaren. En nu bundelen we onze krachten om Rotterdam te verrijken met een unieke bloemenervaring.
Rotterdam, met haar 'niet lullen maar poetsen' mentaliteit, is het perfecte canvas voor onze onderneming. De stad bruist, vernieuwt en wij gaan daar deel van uitmaken. Met ruim 40 jaar gezamenlijke ervaring in de wereld van bloemen, van lokale markten tot internationale grootmachten, zijn we geen groentjes. Rein's artistieke vingervlugheid samen met Murriël's zakelijk inzicht vormt een team dat niet te stoppen is.
Of je nu zoekt naar een persoonlijk gebonden boeket dat het verhaal van een moment vertelt, de bloemrijke aankleding van een bruiloft, of een op maat gemaakt interieuradvies, wij zijn er voor je. Maar ook bedrijven willen we helpen floreren. Van verse bloemen op de balie tot relatiegeschenken die door heel Nederland ontroeren.
Stel je een plek voor in hartje Rotterdam: Een oase vol duurzame bloemen, planten en zijdebloemen waar je kunt wegdromen bij een kop koffie. Waar elke creatie een ode is aan Moeder Natuur. En waar elke klant als vriend de deur uit gaat, met een grote glimlach en een hart vol verwondering.

Name: Circular Orchids
Description:
Welcome to Circular Orchids, where innovation meets sustainability in the floral industry. We are dedicated to transforming how businesses, hotels, and healthcare organizations experience and manage floral arrangements.

Our Mission:
To revolutionize the floral industry by promoting the circular economy, reducing waste, and providing beautiful, sustainable orchids that enhance spaces and contribute to a greener planet.

What We Do:
Circular Orchids specializes in providing high-quality, eco-friendly orchids on a rotational basis. Our unique approach ensures that our plants remain vibrant and healthy, while minimizing waste and maximizing environmental benefits.

Our Greenhouse:
Our orchids are cultivated in the greenest European greenhouse, owned by Ronald Koeleman from Koeleman B.V. in Ter Aar. This state-of-the-art facility uses cutting-edge sustainable practices to grow our plants, ensuring the highest quality while protecting the environment.

Why Choose Circular Orchids:

- Sustainability: We are committed to the principles of the circular economy, ensuring that every orchid is reused and recycled in the most eco-friendly manner.

- Quality: Our orchids are grown in optimal conditions, resulting in stunning, long-lasting plants that enhance any space.

- Innovation: We continuously seek innovative ways to improve our processes and reduce our environmental footprint.

Our Clients:
We serve a diverse range of clients, including government organizations, financial institutions, hotels, and healthcare facilities, helping them to achieve their sustainability goals while beautifying their environments.

Join the Circular Revolution:
Partner with Circular Orchids to lead your organization towards a more sustainable future. Let’s work together to make a positive impact on the environment and set new standards in the floral industry.

For more information and to explore partnership opportunities, visit our website or contact us directly. Let’s make sustainability bloom!

Name: Luxury Floral Studio

Name: Sedumdach
Description:
Willkommen auf dem Linkedin Profil von Sedumdach.de ihrem Online-Anbieter für Dachgarten-Kassettensysteme. Seit 2008 ist unser Partnerunternehmen mit der Produktion und dem Vertrieb von gebrauchsfertigen Sedum-Produkten für die Dachbegrünung mit Hingabe beschäftigt.

Aufgrund des allgemein steigenden Interesses an Gründächern und der Zunahme des Internethandels, haben wir uns entschlossen, die Sedumdach.de UG haftungsbeschränkt) ins Leben zu rufen.

Hier wollen wir Ansprechpartner für den Heimwerker und do it your self-Kunden sein. Unser Ziel ist es, mit unserem kleinen engagierten Team ein Sedum-Kassettensystem zu produzieren, das unsere Kunden in Qualität und Nachhaltigkeit zufriedenstellt und ihnen die Möglichkeit eröffnet, ihr kleines Dachgartenparadies in Eigenregie zu gestalten.

Die Sedumdach-Kassetten werden nach Bestellung tagesfrisch geerntet, verladen und ohne Zwischenstopps bzw. aufwendigen Umladevorgängen in Logistikzentren direkt zu Ihnen nach Hause geliefert. Kurze Wege, frische Ware. Denn Sie stehen für uns an erster Stelle!

Und es bleibt noch viel zu tun.

Begriffe wie Nachhaltigkeit, Regenwassermanagement, Klimawandel und Biodiversität sind an der Tagesordnung und für uns eine Herausforderung, im Rahmen unserer Möglichkeiten zielstrebig an Lösungen zur Verbesserung unserer Klima- und Umweltbedingungen zu arbeiten.  Daher experimentieren und innovieren wir weiterhin für eine grünere Welt.

Come on Board and grow with us. You are more than welcome!

Name: Liorose Blooms & Gifting
Description:
Liorose Blooms & Gifting was born from a deeply personal journey... one of healing, rediscovery, and divine inspiration. During a season of stillness and reflection, floral artistry revealed itself not just as a creative outlet, but as a calling… a way to spread love, light, and joy through intentional beauty.

What began as quiet moments of arrangement for weekly Hours of Worship has blossomed into a luxury floral design atelier that honours the soul behind every bloom. Inspired by our founder’s daughter, Liora, meaning “The Lord’s gift of light to us”, Liorose Blooms & Gifting is rooted in spiritual truth, artistic expression, and heartfelt service.

We offer bespoke floral design experiences for corporate environments, homes, events, and wellness seekers... each crafted to uplift, calm, and inspire. From weekly office subscriptions that transform workspaces… to soulful art pieces and mindfulness-infused workshops… our creations more than beautiful...they are purposeful, they inspire and awaken the spirit.

Whether you’re a business looking to energize your team and impress your clients, a homeowner seeking serenity, or a wellness enthusiast yearning for deeper connection through creativity... we meet you where captivating beauty meets higher-purpose and meaning.

At Liorose Blooms & Gifting, floral artistry is more than decor & aesthetics. It’s an uplifting offering. An inspiring message. A moment of light in someone’s day. Trust us to bring love, light and joy into your life.

#LoveFromLiorose #Floraldesign #LioroseBloomsGifting #FloralArt #Consciousness

Name: Coroa de Flores ABC
Description:
Quem somos
 

O site Coroa de Flores ABC é uma parte da Floricultura Elaine Theodoro que após quase 20 anos atendendo com flores para todas as ocasiões, viu a necessidade de ter uma loja de coroas de flores online.

Isso aconteceu para facilitar que nossos clientes que estão passando pelo momento delicado como a morte de alguém querido possam fazer a compra das flores para funeral com mais agilidade e sem nenhuma burocracia. 

 

Mesmo em plataformas distintas os objetivos de nossa empresa continuam os mesmos.

Conheça nossa razão de existir:

Missão
Facilitar que pessoas enviem homenagem rápido para todos os locais do Brasil independente de que lugar do mundo elas se encontrem

Visão
Ser uma empresa reconhecida por sua excelência e pontualidade na entrega de produtos que levem carinho.

Valores
Liberdade geográfica e temporal
Agilidade em todos os processos 
Criar prosperidade e oportunidades para outros com responsabilidade social e ambiental
Se o cliente não ficou satisfeito, o negócio não foi feito
Inclusão - Todos têm potencial de desenvolvimento, independentemente das suas diferenças individuais, basta oportunidade e acessibilidade.
Estar aberto a mudanças é um valor constante em nossa empresa
Respeito 
Honestidade



Agradecemos a preferência,

Equipe Coroa de Flores ABC.com.br

Name: Sellwood Flower Company
Description:
Sellwood Flower Company is your Portland, Oregon, stop for fresh, local flowers and plants, garden-style floral design, and unique gifts curated from mostly-local artists.

At Sellwood Flower Company, we create beautiful, sustainable floral arrangements that celebrate special moments in the lives of our customers. By sourcing locally and prioritizing eco-friendly practices, we support local farmers and our environment. Our commitment to community engagement and collaboration with local businesses fosters a sense of connection and shared purpose.

You'll find us arranging our locally-sourced blooms along the walkway behind a century-old Victorian house on Sellwood's Antique Row. Check our website often for current bouquet specials, event services, special events, and the latest fun ideas in floral design.

We offer a wide variety of add-on gifts including Planet Oregon wines, Smith Tea, Moonstruck Chocolate, Petal Press Portland (cards, prints, flower presses), Mad Sass bath products, Makerspace Sellwood and Hello Friend Designs cards, and custom gift packages. We do weekly deliveries for offices, country clubs, hotels, and restaurants. We are the house florist for Waverley Country Club and The Nines Hotel. We offer a weekly flower subscription so you can have fresh flowers delivered every week, or at whatever interval you choose. 

We will help you with your floral needs and dreams for the big moments of your life. We are a full-service florist providing florals for your wedding, corporate event, funeral, baby shower, birthday party, Bar Mitzvah, Bat Mitzvah, Quinceañera, I love you, or "just because" floral deliveries.

We service and deliver flowers to the entire greater Portland area including Milwaukie, Lake Oswego, Dunthorpe, Oak Grove, Beaverton, Tigard, Gresham, Happy Valley, Portland Heights, Laurelhurst, Council Crest, OHSU, South Waterfront, Downtown, Hawthorne, West Moreland, East Moreland, Division, Macadam Avenue, and Sellwood.

You'll see this reflected in their designs, which are lush and bloom heavy with minimal greens, and lots of delicious layers. Rococo carefully selects a daily floral menu and intentionally choose to work with seasonal varieties.

Aside from walk-in visits at their Somerville-based retail store, Rococo offers bouquets and arrangements for pick-up and delivery to the greater Boston area. They also host workshops for groups to learn about floral arranging, deliver weekly flowers to private residences and business, and design impressive event flora.. Rococo is all about elevating a special occasion with flowers - from centerpieces to large installations, Rococo can do it all (and would really love to!).

At Photosynthesis, we are passionate about bringing the beauty of nature into people's lives. As a premier designer plant store, we curate a stunning collection of unique and captivating plants that breathe life and charm into any space.

Why Choose Photosynthesis?

- Exquisite Collection: Discover a curated selection of rare and enchanting plants that add a touch of magic to your living spaces.

- Expert Guidance: Our knowledgeable team is here to guide you on your plant journey, from choosing the perfect green companion to caring for it with love.

- Sip & Plant Workshops: Unleash your creativity in our exclusive Sip & Plant workshops. Create your own botanical masterpiece while sipping your favorite drink and connecting with like-minded plant enthusiasts.

- Private Events: Elevate your celebrations with our private Sip & Plant events. Perfect for team-building, hens parties, or special gatherings, it's a delightful experience that fosters bonding and fun.

- Specialized in Self-Watering Systems: We offer cutting-edge self-watering systems that keep your plants happy and healthy, even when life gets busy.

- Terrarium Specialists: Delve into the enchanting world of terrariums, where miniature ecosystems thrive. Our terrariums bring a touch of wonder to your living spaces.

- Sustainable Practices: We are committed to environmental stewardship. Many of our products are crafted from recycled materials, promoting eco-friendly living.

- Unparalleled Customer Service: Your satisfaction is our priority. We strive to exceed your expectations with personalized service and prompt assistance.

Join us on this green adventure as we transform your spaces into lush sanctuaries that inspire and rejuvenate. Connect with nature at Photosynthesis, where wonder blooms every day.

Description:
Evlai Flowers is a Dubai-based luxury floral boutique redefining the language of flowers through sophisticated design, artistic expression, and exceptional service. With a curated collection of premium blooms sourced from around the world, we create floral arrangements that transcend trend and tradition—designed to stir emotion, elevate interiors, and mark life’s most cherished moments.

Founded as part of the Evlai Design group, our brand combines floral artistry with a deep understanding of luxury aesthetics. Our boutique, located in the heart of Dubai Marina at the InterContinental Hotel, offers walk-in experiences alongside our fully digital ordering platform, ensuring seamless access to elegant florals with same-day delivery across Dubai.

Our portfolio includes partnerships with five-star hotels, iconic venues, and discerning clients who value quality, beauty, and distinction. We are also committed to sustainable practices, supporting responsible sourcing and eco-conscious floral design.

Whether it’s a birthday, an anniversary, a corporate event, or a quiet moment of personal joy, Evlai Flowers brings an elevated floral touch to every occasion.

Description: Since 1986, Beneva has been the best florist in Sarasota and the greater Tampa Bay region. From the day we opened our doors, our exceptional customer experience and top-quality products made us a leader in the industry. That, combined with decades of experience, has allowed us to master our processes to perfection, building a loyal client base that has become part of our family. Beneva has three different branches that offer exceptional and distinct customer experiences in the business of emotions: Beneva Flowers, Beneva Weddings and Events, and Beneva Plantscapes. Each arm of our operation thrives under the guidance of our talented team of experts.

Name: Floral Design by Desi Skorcheva
Description:
Да внесем природата удома! Водещото при нас е изработката на композиции от саксийни цветя, които са интересни, иновативни, с различни текстури и изцяло от естетвени материали. Издържат дълго във времето и донасят много красота и свежест в интериора. 
Подходящи за дома, офис и хотел. С тях ще внесете необходимата доза интерес и свежест, и същевременно ще намалите разхода за декорация с рязан цвят.
Уникален почерк във всяка творба. Изработени с помощта на съвременни техники, в крак със световните тенденции. 
Модерни визии, внимание към детайла, съвършенство... Са само част от нещата, които ни водят в нашата работа. 
Нека ви представим новото лице на флоралния дизайн.

Name: Florist IQ
Description:
Florist IQ - Empowering Florists to Thrive with Smart Pricing

Welcome to the Florist IQ LinkedIn page! We're here to revolutionize pricing strategies in the floral industry and empower florists to unlock their true profit potential.

Florist IQ is the leading software solution designed specifically for florists. With our innovative platform, we streamline pricing processes, provide data-driven insights, and optimize profitability for floral businesses of all sizes. Say goodbye to manual calculations and hello to simplified pricing strategies that drive success.

Join our growing community of forward-thinking florists who are embracing smart pricing with Florist IQ. Together, we're shaping the future of the floral industry by making pricing more efficient, effective, and profitable.

Connect with us to stay updated on the latest trends, industry insights, and success stories in the world of floral pricing. Let's transform your floral business and thrive in today's competitive market. Visit our website to learn more about Florist IQ and how we can help your business bloom.

#FloristIQ #SmartPricing #FloralIndustry #Profitability #PricingStrategies #FloristSoftware

Name: Flavora
Description: Flavora entwickelt nachhaltige essbare Blumensträuße aus essbaren Blumen und Kräutern, die Dekoration und Kulinarik vereinen. Unsere Sträuße werden regional, saisonal und ohne gesundheitsschädliche Pestizide angebaut. So können die Sträuße nach ihrer Zeit als Dekoration noch als frische kulinarische Zutat verkocht werden. Unser nachhaltiges Konzept adressiert den hohen CO2-Ausstoß, den übermäßigen Einsatz giftiger Pestizide sowie Ressourcenverschwendung in der Floristikbranche.

Name: Flagship by Ferns N Petals
Description: Spreading happiness with artistically and unconventionally since 2006. We deal in Premium Flowers, Corporate Office Events and Gifting.

Name: Gek Op Bloemen
Description:
Bij Gek op Bloemen zijn we er dol op om een mooie sfeer te creëren met onze prachtige kunstbloemen! Onze abonnementen zijn divers en dat biedt voor ieder wat wils, zodat je altijd kunt genieten van de schoonheid van bloemen in je interieur. We zijn er trots op dat onze kunstbloemen niet alleen mooi zijn, maar ook een duurzame keuze vormen.
In tegenstelling tot echte bloemen, die snel verwelken en regelmatig vervangen moeten worden, blijven kunstbloemen jarenlang stralend zonder dat je je zorgen hoeft te maken over water geven of verwelking. Dit betekent minder verspilling en een kleinere impact op het milieu. Op deze manier kun je op een stijlvolle en verantwoorde manier genieten van bloemen in je huis!

Name: La Pose Fleurie
Description:
La Pose Fleurie est un nouveau lieu de vie kids friendly à Saint Maur des Fossés, bienveillant, simple et sans prise de tête. 

On propose un choix audacieux de plantes et fleurs coupées, surtout des fleurs de saison et locales, dans la mesure du possible. On met en avant le travail d'artisans et petits créateurs.  

Dans la salle d'activité nous proposons des ateliers variés de pratiques douces comme le yoga ou le pilates (mais pas que) des ateliers créatifs et pédagogiques pour les grands et les petits. 

À La Pose Fleurie tout le monde est important ! Nous avons pensé cet espace pour les bébés, les enfants, les mamans, les papas, mais aussi les grand-parents, les tontons, les tatas, les professionnels de la petite enfance, les célibataires, les couples …. bref, vous avez compris, tout le monde est la bienvenue !

Name: fleurs de vie
Description:
Bist du auf der Suche nach einer attraktiven und nachhaltigen Alternative zu frischen Blumen?
Möchtest du eine langlebige Freude verschenken oder deinem Zuhause einen Hauch natürlicher Eleganz verleihen?

Meine Trockenblumendekorationen werden individuell nach deinem Geschmack gestaltet: Du kannst die Grösse, die Blumenfarben und – falls erforderlich – die Farbe des Gefässes selbst wählen. Dabei verwende ich ausschliesslich Trockenblumen aus eigener Produktion, die zu 100 % natürlich getrocknet werden.

Ob als Geschenk oder für dich selbst: Wähle im Online-Shop dein gewünschtes Lieferdatum und lasse deine Trockenblumen-Kreation bequem schweizweit versenden oder direkt zu dir nach Hause liefern.

Möchtest du keine Neuigkeiten verpassen? Folge mir auf Instagram und lass dich von meinen neuesten Kreationen inspirieren!
____________________________________________________________________________

Mehr als nur Blumen

Exklusiv
Jede meiner Kreationen wird mit viel Savoir-faire, Geduld und auf Bestellung gefertigt. Ich arbeite ausschliesslich mit Trockenblumen aus eigener Produktion – für einzigartige und unverwechselbare Dekorationen.

Personalisierbar
Von grossformatigen Wanddekorationen bis hin zu kleinen Details in Naturtönen oder lebendigen Farben: Du bestimmst, welche Kombination am besten zu dir passt.

Zeitlos
Trockenblumen sind langlebig, pflegeleicht und bezaubern durch ihre natürliche Schönheit. Sie bringen zeitlosen Charme in jeden Raum, ganz gleich, ob an einem hellen oder dunklen Standort.

Name: Plantera Chile
Description:
Somos Plantera, un vivero online fundado para transformar espacios cotidianos en exuberantes junglas urbanas. Creemos en la magia que ocurre cuando las plantas y las personas coexisten, compartiendo energía, aire puro y belleza.

En Plantera, cada planta es seleccionada y cuidada con amor y dedicación, asegurándonos de que sean sanas y fuertes. Nuestro objetivo es que cada miembro de nuestra creciente comunidad de Planter@s reciba no solo una planta, sino una compañera de vida. Una entidad viva que transformará su espacio, ofreciendo una experiencia única y mágica de la naturaleza en la comodidad de su hogar, oficina o cualquier lugar que desee transformar.

Name: Noëlla's Flowers
Description:
Spark joy & be a part of something greater – Noëlla’s Flowers is both Huntsville’s premiere Parisian floral destination and the home of day-brightening fresh blooms whose purchase contributes to real hope for foster teens. 

A portion of all Noella’s Flowers’ proceeds directly benefit Make It Matter: The Collective, our local nonprofit committed to providing practical resources to teens exiting the child welfare system. Make It Matter engages community partners to pursue foster teens’ smooth transition to self sufficiency through 1:1 mentorship, quality and affordable housing, education and employment opportunities, and other services. At Noëlla's we offer a meaningful experience in our storefront, provide floral services for every occasion, can host your event in our event space The Parisian by Noëlla, ship your loved ones flowers nationwide, and more. 

We are here, with your help, aiming take an imparted spark of joy that we strive to create on a daily basis and ignite it across our community!

Description:

However, driven by a lifelong passion for creativity and an innate love for florals, Diana decided to pivot and follow a new path.

In December 2022," Flowers of Sydney"launched a flourishing new chapter by establishing Flowers of Sydney as a  floral designer specializing in corporate and event arrangements. Combining a meticulous attention to detail with an artistic flair, [Your Name] now crafts exquisite floral creations that elevate any occasion, bringing a touch of elegance and creativity to the world of corporate and event settings.

With a unique blend of industry experience and creative vision, Diana & her team are dedicated to transforming floral design into an unforgettable experience.

Name: Blossoming Way Florist
Description:
Welcome to Blossoming Way! We are a family-owned business with a passion for creating beautiful floral arrangements that bring joy and happiness to our clients.

We believe that every flower has its own unique beauty, and we take pride in creating arrangements that reflect this beauty. We are dedicated to providing fresh, high-quality flowers that are sourced from local growers whenever possible. Our team is also committed to being flexible and understanding when it comes to our clients' needs, from pricing to styles and new ideas.

As a Catholic business, we are deeply committed to giving back to our community. We regularly donate our time and skills to help with church events, and we are always open to new opportunities to give back.
We offer a wide range of services, from wedding and funeral arrangements to gifts for any occasion.

Our goal is to provide our clients with an unforgettable experience that leaves them feeling happy and satisfied.
We want our clients to know that we are dedicated to providing authentic, fresh, and exotic flowers that warm the heart and create unforgettable moments.


We believe that every client is unique and we are always willing to create a new idea to bring their vision to life. We hope to have the opportunity to bring happiness and beauty to your life through the art of floral arrangement.

Description:
Floral Fusion Shed is an independent florist based in Colchester, serving customers across Essex since 2023. We specialise in bespoke floral design for weddings, events, sympathy tributes, corporate displays, and everyday occasions.
Our Approach
We believe flowers should be personal, seasonal, and sustainably sourced. Every arrangement is handcrafted to reflect individual client needs, using fresh blooms from trusted local suppliers. We prioritise British-grown flowers where possible and minimise waste through careful stock management.
Services
Wedding Floristry: Bridal bouquets, buttonholes, ceremony arrangements, reception centrepieces, and complete venue styling.
Events and Celebrations: Bespoke designs for birthdays, anniversaries, christenings, and corporate functions.
Sympathy and Funeral Tributes: Coffin sprays, wreaths, posies, and standing tributes created with care and sensitivity.
Corporate Floristry: Weekly office displays, reception arrangements, and client gifts with flexible contracts.
Everyday Flowers: Hand-tied bouquets and seasonal designs. Same-day delivery across Colchester or collection from Turner Road.
Floristry Workshops: Group sessions teaching wreath-making, bouquets, and seasonal arrangements.
Why Choose Us
As an independent florist, we offer genuine alternatives to mass-market chains through personal service, attention to detail, and quality craftsmanship.
Contact us for consultations, quotes, or to discuss your requirements.

Name: Paper Flower
Description:
Velkommen til Paper Flower!

Vi er stolte af at præsentere Paper Flower, en pioner inden for fremtidens blomsterløsninger til erhvervslivet. Vores mission er at forene æstetik med hensynet til miljøet ved at tilbyde håndlavede papirblomsterbuketter, der ikke blot er smukke, men også skånsomme mod vores planet.

Med vores unikke tilgang til blomsterservice gør vi det nemt for virksomheder at skabe inspirerende og miljøvenlige arbejdsrum. Vi tror på, at ægte forandring starter med små handlinger, og derfor har vi udviklet en cirkulær forretningsmodel, der reducerer CO2-udledningen og begrænser affaldet ved at genbruge og reparere vores buketter løbende.

Vi stræber efter at inspirere virksomheder til at træffe ansvarlige valg og vælge Paper Flower som deres foretrukne blomsterleverandør. Vores innovative tilgang og dedikation til kvalitet og miljøvenlighed gør os til det ideelle valg for virksomheder, der ønsker at gøre en positiv forskel for både deres arbejdsmiljø og planeten.

Name: Fleur & Blume Ltd
Description:

We have had the privilege of collaborating with prestigious brands such as GHD, YSL, and the BBC’s River City, while also earning heartfelt praise from our local community and press.

From hand-tied bouquets and elegant centrepieces to large-scale installations, wreaths, and corsages, our work combines artistry, attention to detail, and a commitment to exceptional quality. 

Beyond our creative expertise, we take pride in delivering a seamless, personal service—sourcing the finest blooms, managing logistics, and tailoring every design to reflect our clients’ unique style.

At Fleur & Blume, we continually embrace new trends and techniques, ensuring our floristry remains fresh, inspiring, and unforgettable.

Van alle bloemberichten samen wordt één groots boeket gemaakt, kant en klaar in een glazen vaas bezorgd bij de ontvanger. Eenvoudig verrassend! 
Bestel via bloembericht.nl.

𝗚𝗲𝘇𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗻𝗹𝗶𝗷𝗸 𝗰𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗮𝘂
Je geeft het met bijv. collega’s, familie, vrienden, club- of koorleden, enz. Elke bijdrage levert een prachtig & persoonlijk boeket op.

Geef het bijvoorbeeld bij:
 Afscheid collega
 Bedankt
 Uitvaart
 Jubileum
 Felicitatie
 Beterschap & sterkte
 Cadeau juf/meester
 Nieuwe baan/woning

Verrassend én troostvol
Verrassend als felicitatie bij allerlei gelegenheden, maar ook heel troostvol bij verdriet en verlies door de hartverwarmende woorden.

Zoek je een origineel gezamenlijk cadeau met inhoud?
 Geef een bloembericht
 Aan elke bloem een persoonlijk bericht
 Makkelijk te bestellen
 Een onvergetelijke combi

𝗛𝗼𝗲 𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗸𝘁 𝗵𝗲𝘁
Eén persoon start het initiatief op bloembericht.nl en nodigt anderen met een link uit om mee te doen. 
Lees op de website hoe makkelijk het werkt en als initiatiefnemer heb je er verder geen omkijken naar. 

Het ontstaan
In coronatijd was ik uitvaartondernemer (Amenti Uitvaartverzorging). Omdat in het begin niemand aanwezig mocht zijn bij het afscheid bedachten we het 'bloembericht'.
Het bood de mensen die er niet bij konden zijn een mooie manier om toch 'aanwezig' te zijn en hun woorden van troost te delen met de nabestaanden. 

Aan de impact van een boeket bloemberichten is niets veranderd: prachtige bloemen & persoonlijke woorden voor de ontvanger. Nu ook te bestellen voor andere gelegenheden waarbij je samen iets moois wil geven met betekenis. 
Hét boeket dat je zelf zou willen krijgen!

Après avoir travaillé pendant plusieurs années pour des boutiques ou des ateliers floraux axés sur l’évènementiel, séparément, nous avons décidé de nous rejoindre et d’allier nos compétences, afin de proposer une offre qui nous ressemble, avec des valeurs qui nous sont chères.

Name: La Part des Violettes
Description:
En boutique, le taux de perte est de 15 à 25% pour les fleurs coupées. Les matériaux et emballages utilisés par les fleuristes génèrent beaucoup de déchets plastiques. Les fleurs sont cultivées avec des produits chimiques dangereux pour l'environnement et la santé humaine, puis elles sont importées de Hollande, du Kenya ou de Colombie à grand renfort de transports polluants. Et que dire des grandes chaînes de distribution où l'on trouve des bouquets d'une qualité approximative...

La Part des Violettes, créée en 2021, est une micro-entreprise qui se donne pour mission de replacer la fleur au coeur d'une dynamique de développement durable, tout en dépoussiérant l'image un peu "vieillotte" qu'on lui donne !

Fleuriste à Fontaine-lès-Dijon, je travaille à la commande depuis mon atelier. Ma spécialité ? Les créations florales inspirées par les univers de la fantasy.

Je travaille avec des fleurs de saison, mais aussi des fleurs en tissu, en papier, en sucre ou en chocolat. Des messages, contes ou petits poèmes sont disponibles en option pour accompagner les commandes de mes clients.

Toutes mes créations sont personnalisables quel que soit l'événement (mariage, baptême, deuil, anniversaire, naissance, événement d'entreprise...).

Je propose également des animations autour de l'art floral, des interventions pédagogiques, un service de design floral, et des formules d'abonnement.

Les livraisons sont effectuées sur Dijon et dans un rayon de 20 km (secteurs Gevrey-Chambertin, Genlis, Bretigny-Norges, Val-Suzon et Lantenay).

Name: Nelly Florist Bandung
Description:
Nelly Florist Bandung adalah destinasi utama bagi para pecinta bunga di kota ini. Kami adalah pusat keindahan alam yang menyajikan bunga-bunga segar dengan sentuhan profesionalisme dan keahlian dalam industri florist. Dengan pengalaman bertahun-tahun, kami telah menjadi nama yang diandalkan oleh banyak pelanggan setia.

Di Nelly Florist Bandung, kami percaya bahwa bunga memiliki kekuatan luar biasa untuk memperindah kehidupan kita. Setiap helai bunga yang mekar adalah ungkapan cinta, kebahagiaan, keindahan, dan harapan. Itulah mengapa kami berkomitmen untuk menyediakan bunga-bunga terbaik dan terindah untuk setiap kesempatan.

Kami menawarkan beragam pilihan bunga segar yang dikumpulkan dengan cermat dari petani bunga terpercaya. Mulai dari mawar yang anggun, tulip yang memukau, lili yang harum, hingga bunga matahari yang ceria, kami memiliki berbagai macam jenis bunga untuk memenuhi selera dan kebutuhan Anda.

Tim ahli florist kami dengan penuh dedikasi akan membantu Anda memilih rangkaian bunga yang sempurna. Baik itu untuk pernikahan, ulang tahun, hari kasih sayang, atau momen spesial lainnya, kami akan menciptakan karya seni floral yang indah dan mengesankan. Setiap rangkaian bunga kami dirancang dengan keahlian dan keindahan yang tak tertandingi, memperhatikan setiap detail untuk menciptakan tampilan yang memukau.

Selain itu, kami juga menyediakan layanan pengiriman bunga yang cepat dan handal. Kami memahami betapa pentingnya waktu dalam memberikan kejutan atau menghiasi acara Anda. Oleh karena itu, kami akan memastikan bahwa rangkaian bunga Anda tiba tepat waktu dan dalam kondisi sempurna.

Nelly Florist Bandung bukan hanya sekadar tempat untuk membeli bunga, tetapi juga destinasi inspirasi. Kami menyediakan kelas dan workshop florist bagi mereka yang ingin mempelajari seni merangkai bunga. Kami ingin berbagi pengetahuan dan keterampilan kami kepada Anda, sehingga Anda juga dapat menciptakan keindahan dalam hidup Anda sendiri.

Name: SEPT AVRIL (7 AVRIL)
Description:
Chez 7 AVRIL, l’art floral devient une signature.
Nous créons des univers végétaux sur mesure pour les entreprises, hôtels, restaurants et lieux d’exception, à travers :

- Des abonnements floraux réguliers. 

- Des décorations événementielles haut de gamme. 

- Des projets de visual merchandising alliant élégance et mise en scène.


Chaque création est pensée pour sublimer les espaces, renforcer une identité visuelle et transmettre une émotion durable : celle que seule la beauté du végétal peut susciter. 

Fondée par Isabelle Sénélas, passionnée de l’art floral, la maison 7 AVRIL a été transmise à Gilles Pothier, Meilleur Ouvrier de France, Champion du Monde des Fleuristes et Chevalier des Arts et des Lettres, avant d’être reprise par Valentin Posson, qui a œuvré plusieurs années à ses côtés. Aujourd’hui, il perpétue cet héritage d’excellence française en y ajoutant sa sensibilité contemporaine et son sens du détail.

Basé aux portes de Paris, notre atelier s’adresse aux entreprises en quête d’un partenaire de confiance pour imaginer, réaliser et entretenir des décors floraux raffinés. 

Chaque projet est conçu avec exigence, discrétion et passion ; trois valeurs au cœur de notre métier.

 Avec 7 AVRIL, le floral devient un art de vivre.

Name: Napučené
Description:
Pěstujeme květiny s respektem k přírodě a vášní pro udržitelnost. Z našich vlastnoručně vypěstovaných květin tvoříme kytice pro každou příležitost – od svateb a oslav až po firemní akce.  Kromě květin nabízíme také nezapomenutelné workshopy, kde se můžete naučit vazbu květin, načerpat inspiraci a spojit se s přírodou. Naším cílem je přinášet radost, krásu a smysluplnost, a přitom podporovat ekologické hodnoty.

Jsme místem, kde se harmonicky propojují tradice, kreativita a komunita. Ať už hledáte unikátní kytici nebo zážitek, který vás obohatí, u nás najdete vždy to pravé.

Name: Foxglove Florist
Description:
Foxglove is a unique florist in Cashmere, Christchurch, creating beautiful flowers for every occasion, including weddings and events.
Our whimsical, bespoke arrangements include locally-grown flowers and foliage and are available for order online or by phone, and can be delivered Christchurch and Canterbury-wide.
Foxglove is a specialist wedding and event florist and offers flower subscriptions for personal and corporate clients.
Small-group workshops are run in the Foxglove workspace over the winter months, and topics are varied, ranging from hand-tied bouquet, wreath-making, vase arrangements and flower crowns.
Foxglove is housed in a unique, enticing, characterful space, where flowers can be ordered and picked-up, and beautiful, unusual and interesting homewares- mostly related to flowers and gardens- can be viewed and purchased.

Description:

Our purpose is deliberate: to foster an environment where customers derive joy from their purchases. At the core of our mission is the empowerment of women and children seeking a second chance.

We aim to create products that serve as a source of inspiration and love, not only for the giver but also for the recipient. Embrace Roots is more than a business; it's a celebration of diverse roots and a testament to the strength and resilience of women entrepreneurs. With each purchase, you contribute to our vision of empowerment and positive change. Thank you for embracing our journey and being a part of something truly special.

Our achievements are rooted in the artistry of captivating floral design, adept event coordination, and an unwavering commitment to delivering unparalleled customer service. At our flower shop, we collaborate closely with every customer to transform their ideas into reality, infusing each creation with personalized creativity and distinctive style. طراحی را میتوان به معنای خلق محصولی با هدف ارتقاء کیفیت زندگی فردی دانست؛ برند «آشکین» با تمرکز بر طراحی گل در فضایی آغاز به کار کرد که پیشتر گلها صرفاً بدون مفهوم، داستان یا هدف مشخصی در کنار یکدیگر قرار میگرفتند. این برند فعالیت خود را از سال ۱۴۰۱ آغاز کرده و از گل به عنوان مادهی اولیه برای خلق آثاری هنری بهره میبرد؛ آثاری با هدف تأثیرگذاری بر زندگی و روح مخاطب.

استودیو طراحی گل آشکین امروز در تلاش است برای دعوت به خلق لحظاتی که ارزش به یاد ماندن دارند. در جهانی که زندگی روزمره گاه ما را از درون تهی میکند و ما باور داریم ساختن خاطرات، چه کوچک و چه بزرگ، همان چیزیست که به زندگی جان میبخشد.

Description:

Name: The Flower Place Miami
Description:
The Flower Place Miami was started more than 25 years ago by a first-generation florists, husband and wife, who brought their passion for petals from New York City to sunny South Florida, along with their kids and dreams.

The small family business flourished when they began selling their hand-picked flowers and bouquets on Miami Beach’s Lincoln Road Farmers Market. From there, The Flower Place Miami partnered with local farmers to create a community and help deliver some of the most affordable flowers across Miami. 

Today, the Flower Place Miami is run by the family’s second-generation florist and is women-led, curating flower activations for every day needs as well as memorable moments like bridal events, graduations, and baby showers.

We see flowers as a love language that is spoken fluently among the South Florida community. Whatever the celebration might be, there is always an occasion for flowers and we are here for it all.

Name: Evergreen Macedonia
Description:
At Evergreen, we specialize in vibrant aesthetics, lush greenery, and healthy plants that enhance both beauty and well-being. Our mission is to inspire a love for plants across all generations, combining aesthetics with the positive impact of nature on physical and mental health. We take pride in offering air-purifying plants, essential for creating healthier indoor environments by improving air quality. 

Евергрин се стреми за живописна естетика, бујно зеленило и здрави растенија кои го подобруваат изгледот на нашите домови и нашата благосостојба. Нашата мисија е да ја инспирираме љубовта кон растенијата кај сите генерации, комбинирајќи ја нивната естетска убавина со позитивното влијание врз физичкото и менталното здравје. Исклучително ги акцентираме растенијата кои го прочистуваат воздухот, важни за создавање поздрави простори преку подобрување на квалитетот на истиот.
