Name: KH Bloembollen
Description:
Mijn naam is Kris Hof, 23 jaar, en ik ben de oprichter en eigenaar van KH Bloembollen. Als zoon van een bollenteler ben ik letterlijk opgegroeid tussen de bloembollen. In mijn jeugd vond ik het fantastisch om mijn vader en oom te helpen in de vakanties en weekenden.
De klanten van mijn vader kwamen uit binnen- en buitenland. Omdat de mensen de tulpen zo mooi vonden, hadden ze het er voor over om de lange reis te maken. Vaak kregen we van de klanten de vraag of we onze bollen ook op internet verkochten. Toen dacht ik: laat ik het eens proberen. Zodoende zijn we 2020 gestart met het online verkopen van bloembollen. En daar heb ik tot de dag van vandaag geen spijt van. Mooie reviews en belletjes van tevreden klanten, dát geeft ons een kick om in 2021 weer de mooiste soorten aan te bieden op de website. Houd deze ook goed in de gaten, want er komen nog leuke aanbiedingen aan!

& Then She Bloomed is dedicated to creating stunning floral arrangements that evoke feelings of inspiration, empowerment, and heartfelt connection, that capture the essence of growth, transformation, and beauty.

We believe that everyone has the potential to bloom, just like that of a flower, slowly but surely growing into their fullest potential. 

Kirsty's time as an interior designer means she has a well practiced design eye for colour, texture, scale, styling (and mind for logistics!) all important design details in floristry too. Her role as cabin crew means she understands how we’re all so different and all experience a multitude of emotions. She celebrates how powerful the connection between emotion and nature is, through Floral Design. 

Based in Berkshire. Available locally and beyond.

Description:

Ryoko Arnwine, owner of HanaYou, is a Japanese floral designer and Ikebana practitioner. She studied Misho-Ryu Ikebana for 7 years in Osaka, where she worked as a floral designer for Ritz-Carlton. She is well-versed in both modern Western styles and traditional Japanese flower arrangement.

Ryoko practiced in New York from 2017 to 2025, where worked as a floral designer and instructor, offering her unique, cross-cultural blend of experience and techniques. She established HanaYou in 2023 to focus on her vision of making Ikebana more accessible to individuals and teams looking for a way to experience Japanese culture, de-stress, and come together.

Name: Müge Flowers Boutique
Description:
Elegance, delicacy, and luxury converge at the point where we exist for our valued customers. You deserve better. In the heart of Istanbul, we established Müge Flowers Boutique to make even the most ordinary moments of your daily life special and to crown the most important moments of your life.

Every flower has its own unique story, and we have mastered the art of transforming these stories into works of art for you. With flowers collected from the most exquisite areas of Istanbul, we offer you not just an arrangement, but a bundle of emotions. We strive to let you experience the gentle touch of a rose, the elegant posture of a tulip, and the grandeur of an orchid in their purest form.

At Müge Flowers Boutique, by speaking the language of flowers, we aim to offer you not just a service, but an unforgettable experience. Creating a haven in the chaos of Istanbul where you can take a breath and discover the beauties of nature is our greatest passion. Making each of our customers feel special is our most valuable success.

Challenging time with our same-day delivery option, we promise fast and flawless service to you, the precious residents of Istanbul who want to enjoy the moment. At any time of the day, we bring you the ease and pleasure of making a thoughtful gesture to your loved ones.

With every moment you experience with Müge Flowers Boutique, you will feel that "you deserve better." Because we prepare each flower arrangement thinking of you, aiming for perfection in every detail. Offering you the best is not just a job for us, it's a way of life.

In this unique flower workshop of Istanbul, we thought of you with every leaf, chose for you, designed for you. As the Müge Flowers Boutique family, we are here to ensure that every moment in your life is as perfect as you deserve.

Featherstone Flowers: Bespoke British Floristry for Corporate Clients

At Featherstone Flowers, we specialise in creating naturally abundant, timeless floral designs using flowers and foliage grown on our three-acre flower farm in the Hampshire countryside. Our commitment to British-grown, seasonal flowers sets us apart, ensuring each arrangement reflects the beauty of nature while supporting sustainability.

We provide a range of corporate services tailored to businesses looking to enhance their spaces and experiences with thoughtfully designed florals. From regular contract flowers that transform office and reception areas to impactful installations for events and product launches, our designs are crafted to make a lasting impression. 

Our team-building workshops and corporate away days offer a unique opportunity for creativity and connection, hosted in our historic 15th-century tithe barn or at your chosen venue. Participants can immerse themselves in the art of floral design, with expert guidance and a personal touch that fosters collaboration and inspiration.

Featherstone Flowers is the ideal partner for businesses seeking elegant, bespoke floristry with an emphasis on British provenance and exceptional design. We look forward to collaborating with companies that value creativity, sustainability, and the finest seasonal flowers.

Emme ole ainoastaan kukkakauppa, vaan pikemminkin kohtauspaikka, missä kohtaat tyylikkyyden ja saumattoman henkilökohtaisen kukkapalvelun. Kauneimmat kukkakimput, upea kukkasidonta ja ihastuttavat lahjat odottavat sinua. Tule inspiroitumaan ja anna kukkiemme tuoda iloa päiviisi!

Meillä on kivijalkaliikkeen lisäksi myös verkkokauppa, josta voit kätevästi tilata meidän tuotteita. Toimitus suoraan työpaikalle tai kotiovelle saman päivän aikana. Yrityksille tarjoamme erilaisia laskutusvaihtoehtoja.

Olemme avoinna ma-pe klo 9:30-17:30 ja lauantaisin 9:30-15:00 sekä sunnuntaisin 11:00-15:00. Pyhäpäivät voi vaikuttaa aukioloaikoihimme, katso niistä tarkemmin kotisivuiltamme! Osoitteemme on Hämeenkatu 9, 20500 Turku.

Tervetuloa!

Name: Auning Blomster / Nature by Hjort
Description:
Auning Blomster / Nature by Hjort 
Vi hjælper virksomheder med at styrke relationer til medarbejdere, kunder og samarbejdspartnere – gennem blomster, firmagaver og smagsoplevelser.

 Smagninger med noget særligt 
Hos Nature by Hjort tilbyder vi smagninger i mange varianter – altid skræddersyet til jeres ønsker.

 Nogle vil have øl, andre cocktails? Det kombinerer vi.
 Ingen minimum – vi byder indenfor i eget smagningslokale (15 pladser) eller kommer ud til jer.
 Smagninger kan laves til aktivitetsdage eller fyraften – fleksibelt og hyggeligt.
 Vi mikser vin, øl, portvin, cocktails eller spiritus – eller matcher drikkevarer til jeres menu.

 Vi hylder det lokale 
Vi samarbejder med små producenter og arrangerer 100% lokale smagninger – med øl, frugtvin, sodavand, spiritus og dips. Vores egne cocktails sikrer, at I smager noget helt nyt.

Vidste I, at der produceres mousserende frugtvine i Mols Bjerge, krydderiblandinger i Farsø eller Rom i Mellerup? Jylland rummer mange smagsoplevelser – og vi bringer dem til jer.

 Blomster & firmagaver 
Hos Auning Blomster leverer vi alt fra buketter og binderi til receptioner, jubilæer og events – lokalt, nationalt og internationalt via Interflora.

Hos Nature by Hjort skaber vi gavekurve, firmagaver og gaveløsninger med vin, øl, spiritus, chokolade, kaffe og specialiteter – altid med grøn omtanke og sans for kvalitet.

 Vores tjenester omfatter:
Blomsterbinderi, buketter & dekorationer
Firmagaver, gavekurve, vin & chokoladegaver
Smagninger & events (vin, øl, cocktails, portvin, spiritus)
Receptioner & jubilæer
Gaveløsninger med grøn omtanke
International levering via Interflora

 Vi kombinerer kvalitet, kreativitet og nærvær, så I får løsninger, der skaber værdi – både internt og eksternt.

 Kontakt os på 6354@butiksmail.dk
 www.auningblomster.dk | www.naturebyhjort.dk

Name: Sunselle
Description:
The international flower market demands scale, data-driven insights, and reliability. Sunselle unites sales, marketing, logistics, data, and supply chain under one roof, a unique platform connecting the entire chain from grower to customer.

With production locations in the Netherlands, Kenya, and Ethiopia, Sunselle guarantees year-round reliable deliveries and a broad, high-quality assortment of cut flowers. By perfectly aligning the seasons in Africa, we ensure maximum continuity and strength for our shared and potential customers.

Sunselle is a collaboration of leading growers combining their expertise, capacity, and vision. With 125 hectares of production area and more than 375 million stems per year, Sunselle has the scale and strength to be a reliable global partner.

Our ambition is clear:
- To be the world’s most powerful platform for cut flowers
- Sustainable, transparent, and future-focused
- Built on long-term partnerships and shared growth

Sunselle is open to collaboration with other growers who wish to join this strong collective.

Description:
Flowerbulbs Amsterdam: the flowering heart of flower bulbs and dahlia tubers.

Founded in August 2022, Flowerbulbs Amsterdam is a pioneer in the world of flower bulbs. Our aim? To deliver top-quality flower bulbs and dahlia tubers straight from the grower. We believe everyone deserves to enjoy premium flower bulbs without dealing with middlemen.

What are we proud of? Our unique boxes. A blend of quality and style, these bulbs and tubers come in modern, stylish packaging that's both recyclable and eye-catching. Each box is thoughtfully put together by our team, creating a one-of-a-kind product.

Our audience is diverse. We serve companies looking for the perfect gift for employees and business connections. We also reach out to individuals who want to buy these beautiful bulbs for themselves or to give as a special gift.

What makes us different? Our passion for presentation. While flower bulbs are typically sold in plain packaging, Flowerbulbs Amsterdam uses a modern approach, giving our customers a unique experience. This is confirmed by feedback from our customers: "What wonderful packaging and so original!"

At Flowerbulbs Amsterdam, it's not just about the bulbs, but also about the experience. Join us on this flowering adventure and surprise yourself or someone else with a bit of pure nature beautifully packaged.

Welcome to OXY, where every gift tells a story of connection, wellness, and sustainable elegance.  As the founder, I envisioned OXY to be more than a plant gifting service — it's a celebration of life's moments, a fusion of nature and emotion. Our curated plant packages are not just green companions; they are tokens of mindfulness, tailored for every occasion. 

At OXY, we believe in the transformative power of gifting. Whether it's to mark a milestone, express gratitude, or simply brighten someone's day, our plant packages are designed to create lasting memories. We go beyond traditional gifting by intertwining personalization, sustainability, and wellness. Each plant is a statement, a breath of fresh air, and a commitment to a greener planet. 

Our mission is to redefine the art of gifting, where every leaf tells a story of connection and care. Join us on this journey of fostering well-being, celebrating moments, and making the world a greener, happier place, one plant at a time.
#OXYPlants #GreenGifting #SustainableLiving

Whether you’re a seasoned plant lover or just beginning your green journey, we cater to all who appreciate the elegance and serenity that plants bring to the environment.

What We Offer:

- Exclusive Collection: Discover a handpicked range of unique indoor plants, each selected for their beauty and resilience.
- Personalised Consultations: Our experts provide tailored advice to ensure your plants thrive in their new home.
- Sustainable Practices: Committed to eco-friendly practices, we prioritize sustainability in every aspect of our business.

Name: Pūkuotas Vėjas
Description:
Pūkuotas Vėjas - patyrusių floristų komanda, kuri jūsų turimą erdvę pavers į jaukią, žalią ir įkvepiančią darbo aplinką. Tai gėlių studija, kurioje skirtingi gamtos pradai susijungia į vieną estetišką harmoniją. 

KUO GALIME PADĖTI? 
Viena iš mūsų teikiamų paslaugų - interjero dekoravimas augalais. Tai vis labiau populiarėjanti paslauga, skirta įmonėms, restoranams, viešbučiams, SPA centrams ir kitoms erdvėms. 

KAIP VISKAS VYKSTA?
Atsižvelgiant į patalpas, jų paskirtį bei apšvietimą, parenkame augalus, kurie tinka jūsų interjerui, ištveria kondicionierių poveikį ar šviesos trūkumą. Taip pat kuriame žaliąsias zonas, kurios yra vienos iš naujausių madų, kalbant apie šiuolaikines erdves.

KUO AUGALAI YRA NAUDINGI INTERJERE? 
Tai, kad augalai darbo ar viešose erdvėse sukuria jaukią aplinką ir valo orą. Sąmoningos įmonės dabar vis daugiau dėmesio skiria darbuotojams, jų kūrybiškumui, įkvėpimui, atsipalaidavimui gerinti. Šią funkciją puikiai atlieka augalai. Būtent čia geriausiai gelbėjame mes, kurių žinios padeda minimalistinę aplinką paversti jaukia bei parinkti ištvermingus augalus.

Name: Flower Land
Description:
It was in the early 1950s that the late George Borg, together with his family, first ventured into the floriculture industry. Mr. Borg, a passionate and visionary entrepreneur, was a pioneer in this field until handing over the family business to his son Ludgardo Borg in the 1960s.

His son was quick to understand the importance of investing in this industry by building the first ever cluster of greenhouses on the Maltese islands. This bold initiative was instrumental not only in sustaining the demand for retail and supply across Malta’s leading florists and with flowers exported to Covent Garden in London, UK.

The company kept growing at a steady pace and was baptised with the name ‘Flower Land’ under the tutelage of Joseph and Pauline Azzopardi (nee Borg) in 1981. Together they took floristry to new heights, introducing professional floral trade. What was novel back in the 80s is nowadays customary across Malta and Gozo.

Since then Flower Land remained synonymous with a trend-setting mentality in the floral industry. Today the company imports a portfolio of related quality products to complement the wide ranging styles of decorations offered at Flower Land.

The latest, ambitious project embarked is adding visibility to the Flower Land trademark on the World Wide Web. Under the tutelage of  Caroline Azzopardi, Clients can browse through an all-encompassing, regularly updated web-menu from the comfort of their own home.

Name: Flower Art By Anthon & Katrine
Description:
Hos Anthon & Katrine leverer vi blomster og planter i naturtro materiale.

Vi sørger for, du altid har smukke blomster og planter i din virksomhed. Som blomsterkunstnere gør vi os umage med at binde buketter af bæredygtige og naturtro blomster og indrette dine rum med naturtro planter.  

Vores buketter ligner til forveksling blomster fra haven, desuden er det en prisbevidst løsning for din virksomhed, og så er de langt bedre for miljøet. 

Med et blomster- eller planteabonnement fra Anthon og Katrine får du bekymringsfri service. Hver måned leverer vi en ny buket blomster der følger årstiden, bundet særligt til din virksomhed. Vores planteservice byder på et stort udvalg af planter og unikke løsninger, som f.eks. plantevægge, hængende haver og meget mere.

Name: FARMERR
Description:
Farmerr is your go-to spot for everything floral and green that makes sending as enjoyable as receiving. Our services range from delightful daily arrangements that will brighten your day to landscaping and more. We’ve created a seamless experience to bring you only the freshest straight from the source. Did you know that almost all of India’s top-quality produce is exported out? This is due to the large margins added by middlemen, which make the A-grade produce practically unaffordable to the public at large. We’re here to put an end to that. No middleman. No cutting corners. Just farm-fresh, happy produce.

We pride ourselves on working with on-trend flowers and creating one-of-a-kind arrangements you won't find anywhere else. From our nationwide three-day delivery, to same-day delivery in Bengaluru, we make gifting quick and easy. Lined with nearly two decades of farming experience, at Farmerr there’s something for everyone, for every occasion, big or small.

We are all about celebrating the little things we do for each other. Not just the big occasions. It’s being there for someone’s highs and stepping for the lows. Finding the courage to say sorry, and making someone smile just because. After all, unexpected florals are the best kind.

Name: Les Naturistes
Description:
Bienvenue chez Les Naturistes 

Nous sommes une entreprise passionnée par la fusion de la nature et de l'art. Notre mission est de créer des espaces uniques et inspirants en utilisant des éléments végétaux pour éveiller les sens, favoriser le bien-être et raconter des histoires mémorables.

Chez Les Naturistes , nous croyons que la scénographie végétale surpasse la simple décoration pour devenir une véritable expérience sensorielle. Chacun de nos projets est une œuvre d'art vivante, conçue pour émerveiller, apaiser et connecter.

Notre équipe dévouée de fleuristes et de passionnés de l'environnement travaille en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour transformer leurs espaces, qu'il s'agisse de bureaux, de restaurants, d'hôtels, d'événements spéciaux ou de lieux de vie, en des havres de verdure.

Nous croyons en l'importance de la durabilité et de la responsabilité environnementale. C'est pourquoi nous privilégions les plantes durables, adoptons des pratiques éco-responsables et mettons en œuvre des solutions innovantes pour minimiser notre impact sur la planète.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre voyage pour créer des espaces où la nature prend vie, où la créativité s'accroît et où la durabilité est au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Ensemble, nous pouvons faire de chaque environnement un endroit où la vie s’épanouit.

 Pour en savoir plus sur nos projets et pour collaborer avec nous, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter. Nous sommes impatients de créer des scénographies végétales exceptionnelles pour vous.

#ScénographieVégétale #DesignVert #BienÊtre #Durabilité #NatureEtArt

Name: Plant in da House
Description: Plant in da House, yolculuğuna 2021 yılında çoğu bitkisever gibi sukulentlerle başladı. Günlük hayatın içinde minik, yeşil bir leke gibi var olan o sukulentler büyüdü, çoğaldı. Paylaştıkça ve öğrendikçe monsteralar, calathealar, peperomialar geldi... Şimdi çok kalabalığız. Plant in da House, bitkilerle yaşamanın herkes için ulaşılabilir olmasını hedefler. Bitkilerle yaşamak, gündelik hayatın içinde doğanın bir parçası olduğumuzu bize hatırlatan, sakinleştiren ve bir kaçış duygusu yaratan bir yaşam biçimidir. Plant in da House bu duyguyu sürdürülebilir hale getirmek için bir başlangıç yapılmasına olanak sağlıyor. Çeşitli bitki türlerinin yanı sıra el yapımı seramik saksılar, tasarım aksesuarlar ve hayatınıza dahil edebileceğiniz birçok farklı done ile sizleri selamlıyor.

Description:
Plants make people happy. Choose sustainable gifts with EASYPOT - gift a plant subscription or plants with GIFT E-CARD. It is for everyone!

 Plants subscription concept – subscribe to 1, 3, or 6 months and get a surprise plant delivered to your doorstep every month. Order it for yourself or send it as a gift for your millennial cousin or plant-loving grandma.

 We deliver our plants in secure and environmentally friendly packages with standard delivery in the Baltic States and Europe.

Choose the features, variety, and style of your surprise plants. Tell us if you have any pets, if your place has a lot of light or you live in a cave, and other relevant details that we need to know to assure our surprise plant lives its best life together with you.

We'll ship your new plant within 3 days after your purchase and you'll get your future plants delivered on the same day every month.

It's our goal to help you avoid killing your plants straight away. The plant will come with care instructions and we'll be here every step of the way.

Name: Flowers by Yllod
Description:
Welcome to Flowers by Yllod, where contemporary designs merge with sustainable solutions. Our name underscores our mission to offer a fresh, reversed perspective on floral decorations—'Yllod' being Dolly spelled backwards, reflecting our innovative approach.

We specialize in custom flower arrangements and provide a range of services, including installations and custom flower arrangement subscriptions. Our expertise extends to business-to-business event decor, enhancing corporate and business occasions with unique, sustainable floral designs. We innovate by using unconventional materials and accessories, like color spray, to transform the natural state of our raw materials.

With a commitment to innovation and a distinctive flair inspired by vibrant, tropical, and contemporary Caribbean creative tactics, we aim to revolutionize the Indiana floral industry.

At Flowers by Yllod, we are dedicated to delivering exceptional quality and service, creating unforgettable floral experiences for every occasion.

Name: Floralize
Description:
At Floralize, we're reimagining the floral industry with a focus on sustainability and style. Inspired by the Netherlands, where flowers are part of daily life, we’re here to make florals effortless and eco-friendly for homes and offices around Chicago. 

Our high-quality silk flowers are indistinguishable from fresh flowers and beautiful forever, but they don’t need the upkeep. Thoughtfully crafted, each arrangement brings color and good vibes to any space, whether you want to buy or rent.

Why Floralize?
-  Lifelike beauty: Fool anyone with silk flowers that look like fresh flowers. 
-  Sustainable & Eco-Friendly: You don’t have to throw away flowers every week. They’re here to stay! 
-  No Maintenance: Enjoy flowers that need no watering or care. We even selected matching vases for you ;) 
-  Free Delivery in the city of Chicago

Discover how Floralize can transform your space with flowers that last. Visit our webshop or reach out to learn more.

P.S. We also offer rentals for businesses, making it easy to create a warm, welcoming atmosphere with our luxury silk flower arrangements.

Name: Flowerism Studio
Description:
Founded in 2018, Flowerism was born from a vision to transform the perception of artificial flowers. We specialize in crafting unique, durable floral arrangements that provide sustainable, long-lasting solutions for offices, hotels, restaurants, and various hospitality spaces—requiring no maintenance at all. Our stunning, seasonless displays are designed to leave a lasting impression, ensuring beauty that doesn’t fade in just days.

In addition to our exquisite arrangements, we offer the Flowerism Subscription service, designed to enhance flexibility and convenience. With this service, we visit your location quarterly to refresh your floral displays, aligned with seasonal trends and changing aesthetics. This not only brings fresh energy to your space but also introduces new visual expressions that delight guests and create a welcoming atmosphere.

Our customizable stems empower you to mix and match your favorite blooms, allowing you to design unique bouquets tailored to any occasion or décor. Whether you're looking to enhance an interior project, beautify an event, or celebrate a wedding or film production, our lifelike flowers provide the perfect alternative to fresh blossoms. They capture the essence and beauty of real flowers while remaining vibrant and enduring over time.

We proudly operate a physical store located in central Copenhagen at Valkendorfsgade 15, where you can see our flowers in person. You can also visit our webshop at www.flowerismstudio.com to purchase our arrangements or learn more about what we offer.

At Flowerism, we are passionate about helping businesses transform their environments into sustainable and inspiring spaces. Our solutions not only elevate aesthetics but also contribute to a more environmentally responsible future by reducing waste and promoting the use of long-lasting floral alternatives. Discover how our flowers can enhance your space and create lasting impressions on your clients and guests.

Name: Flowers By Anoes
Description:
Bent u opzoek naar de mooiste zijdeboeketten, bloemstukken en zijdeplanten? Dan bent u bij Flowers by Anoes aan het juiste adres. Ik kan u voorzien in alle kleuren en maten.

Ondanks de ruime keuze op de website, kan het zijn dat u zelf wat voor ogen heeft. Zoekt u iets wat er niet tussen staan? Laat het mij dan weten via een e-mail, zodat we samen naar de mogelijkheden kunnen kijken.

Ik voorzie u graag van persoonlijk advies. Zo is het bloemenstuk of boeket altijd naar uw eigen wens samengesteld.

Bedrijven
Wenst u een fleurige en sfeervolle aankleding van uw bedrijfspand? Doe dit met een zakelijk bloemenabonnement.
Zo heeft u 4 keer of 2 keer per jaar een sfeervol zijde bloemenstuk of boeket staan bij de receptie of in een vergaderzaal.

De bloemen veranderen met de seizoenen mee. Daarmee heeft u altijd een gepaste aankleding van de ruimte. Het is natuurlijk ook mogelijk om de bloemen naar eigen wens samen te stellen.

Het is tevens ook mogelijk om een particulier bloemenabonnement af te sluiten.  Meer informatie staat vermeld onder het kopje ‘particulier bloemenabonnement’.

Trouwerijen
Ook tijdens uw bruiloft voorzie ik u graag van mooie bruiloftsdecoratie met zijdebloemen en boeketten. Daarom verhuur ik trouwbogen opgemaakt met mooie zijdebloemen naar keuze.

Zo bent u op de mooiste dag van uw leven voorzien van een sfeervolle omgeving.

Indien gewenst neem ik de complete verzorging van bloemen graag op mij en uiteraard voorzie ik hierin van advies. Dit is allemaal bespreekbaar.

Meer informatie: info@flowersbyanoes.nl

Name: Royal Florist
Description:
Established as a flower shop in 1968, **Royal Florist** has been a cornerstone of the Richmond Hill community, dedicated to bringing joy and comfort through beautifully crafted floral arrangements. Our passion lies in creating exquisite designs that resonate with every occasion, from heartfelt personal moments to grand corporate events.

At Royal Florist, we pride ourselves on sourcing the freshest blooms to ensure each arrangement reflects elegance and sophistication. Our commitment to quality and personalized service has made us the preferred choice for clients seeking exceptional floral artistry.

Conveniently located at Unit 35A, 10520 Yonge St, Richmond Hill, ON L4C 3C7, we offer prompt and reliable delivery services throughout the area. Whether you're celebrating a milestone, expressing sympathy, or simply brightening someone's day, Royal Florist is here to make every moment memorable with our bespoke floral creations.

Discover more about our offerings and place your order at www.royalflorist.ca

Name: Bukiety Floral
Description:
Bukiety Floral was originally founded in 1996 by two passionate individuals who saw an opportunity in the market for a unique brand to be built offering stunning, unique, high quality floral arrangements that delivered not only a product, but an experience. We now call this the “Art of Floral.” 
 
This artisty and passion is even demonstrated in the company name itself, “Bukiety”, which in Polish means bouquet or bunch of flowers and pays homage to one of the founders’ own Polish heritage.  
 
Over the last nearly 30 years, Bukiety has built a strong brand reputation for being Chicago’s Premier Custom Floral Design studio. It was a company built by its people, and dedicated to creating “Uroda,” the Polish word for beauty.

Bukiety Floral believes fresh floral can transform any space into a place of unique beauty.  We are a floral design studio that specializes in providing stunning and artistic floral arrangements for weekly clients, gift orders, events, and weddings.

We work with building property managers, corporate offices, hotel and restaurant general managers, corporate and individual event planners, and individual clients to provide dazzling floral arrangements for any space or occasion.

Our commitment to creating individual floral artistry, and not mass-produced arrangements, enables us to focus on our business and personal clients like no other florist in Chicago.

Call or email us to set up a time to conduct a walk-through of your space and to discuss how we can best fulfill your floral needs.

Name: FloraDoor
Description:
FloraDoor is owned and operated by White Orchid, an Egyptian company that started in 2002.
FloraDoor is a reputed florist, delivering pretty and prim flower bouquets in Egypt. We have an excellent team of dedicated florists who are passionate about what they create, and dependable drivers and assistants to assure that we can provide the absolute best florist service possible.
We are involved in all aspects of florists, from gift bouquets to the most luxurious hotel flower decorations and large corporate events. We do it all.

Name: The Green Door Florist
Description:
The Green Door Florist, based in Clontarf/Killester, Dublin, is your go-to friendly florist, offering a wonderful selection of fresh flowers and plants from worldwide suppliers, including many from Ireland.

With over 18 years of experience, we provide exceptional service with a personal touch, offering unique styles perfect for gifting on any occasion, from birthdays and anniversaries to Mother’s Day and Valentine’s Day. 

We feature seasonal flowers in our weekly designs and custom-made arrangements making every bouquet truly special. 

We also offer unique flower arrangements and designs for business receptions and workspaces, as well as hassle-free fresh flower subscription services. For events such as meetings, conferences, or trade shows, we can make you stand out with our floral designs. 

We love helping nearly-weds create their dream day with our wedding services, where we assist with colour schemes, themes, styles, choice of flowers, and arrangements.

Our customers say our shop is like no florist they’ve ever visited before, and we like it that way. 

Get in touch soon and experience our personal touch for yourself!

Name: Botané
Description:
Botané was created in response to a clear global shift: interiors are designed for calm, coherence, and longevity — yet florals remain disposable, maintenance-heavy, and waste-driven.

Botané introduces botanical design as a permanent interior element, designed to remain rather than disappear, defining a new category at the intersection of interior design and art.

Each composition is defined by proportion, texture, and spatial balance, becoming an integral part of how a space is experienced.

Name: Aquarossa Farms
Description:
Aquarossa Farms was founded in 2021 as the e-commerce branch of Primarossa International, a flower farm established in Guatemala in 1997 by Fabiola Bautista and Juan Carlos Ucros, pioneers in the country's flower industry.

At Aquarossa Farms, we specialize in delivering premium, farm-fresh flowers directly to your doorstep through our convenient service. By cutting out intermediaries, we eliminate waste in the supply chain, ensuring better value for our customers while supporting over 250 women-led households who take care of our farm in Guatemala. 

All of our farms are Rainforest Alliance Certified, adhering to sustainable practices that prioritize social, economic, and environmental responsibility in our flower production.

Name: Airosa.pe
Description:
Airosa.pe — El arte de regalar eternidad.
En Airosa, creemos que un regalo puede trascender el tiempo.
Cada rosa preservada es una obra delicada que captura la belleza de un instante y la convierte en un gesto eterno.
Nuestras cajas de rosas — creadas con precisión artesanal y personalización exclusiva — son símbolos de amor, gratitud y elegancia que permanecen mucho más allá del momento en que se entregan.
Airosa.pe nació con la misión de redefinir el arte de regalar: transformar cada entrega en una experiencia sensorial, estética y emocional.
Desde Perú, diseñamos detalles que hablan el lenguaje del lujo silencioso: sofisticación sin exceso, emoción sin palabras.

 Experiencias personalizadas, regalos con significado, belleza que perdura.
https://airosa.pe

Name: Studio Frö
Description:
Studiö Frö on lupaus kokonaisvaltaisesti paremmasta kukkakokemuksesta. 

Kesäsesongin aikaan me suosimme kotimaisia lähikukkia, jotka ovat viljelty mahdollisimman luonnonmukaisesti ilman lämmitettäviä kasvihuoneita. Toukokuusta lokakuuhun kestävän sesongin jälkeen käytämme kuivattuja luonnonmateriaaleja sekä kukkia, jotka tuodaan huolella valitsemiltamme viljelijöiltä Hollannista maateitse Suomeen. 

Palvelemme yrityksiä tapahtumakukituksilla, PR-lähetyksillä, tilakoristeluilla ja kestotilauksilla. Järjestämme myös räätälöityjä kukkapajoja yritysten erilaisiin tarpeisiin.

Kiinnostuitko? Laita meille viestiä, niin pureudutaan aiheisiin tarkemmin.

Name: Fleur et Style Armentières
Description:
L’HISTOIRE DE 
FLEUR ET STYLE
“Il y a de nombreuses années de cela, le 3 octobre 1991, naissait le magasin Fleur et Style, une date mémorable pour nous, puisqu'elle coïncide avec le premier anniversaire de ma filleule. Depuis lors, notre boutique a connu une croissance remarquable, triplant sa surface de vente au fil des ans, et nous devons cette réussite à vous, notre clientèle fidèle.

Notre principale mission est de combler vos attentes. Notre équipe est dévouée à rendre chaque moment de votre vie inoubliable grâce à notre créativité, notre dynamisme et notre engagement à vous servir au mieux. 
Chez Fleur et Style, nous considérons notre travail comme une véritable collaboration d'équipe, où chaque membre est comme un membre de la famille.

L'excellence dans notre travail, la créativité, l'énergie débordante, et la force d'une équipe unie sont tous mis au service de notre clientèle. 

Merci de faire partie de notre histoire et de nous permettre de fleurir chaque chapitre de votre vie.”

Annabelle Degryse, gérante du magasin

Name: Alia Flowers
Description:
Founded in 1978 by the late Alia Koleilat, Alia Flowers has built a legacy of creativity, beauty, and compassion. Alia, known for her love of art, fashion, and antiques, opened her first branch in Adliya. This location, one of the first businesses in what is now one of Bahrain’s most vibrant districts, has become a local landmark over the decades.

Building on this deep-rooted history and heritage, Alia Flowers has continuously embraced innovation and technology to evolve the traditional flower shop concept. Today, we offer a comprehensive range of services that include flowers, chocolates, interior landscaping, stage/set-building, gifts, event management, and consultation. With branches in eight different locations across Bahrain, we are supported by a talented team of florists, event designers, and dedicated staff.

As we continue to grow, Alia Flowers is proud to provide Bahrain’s highest-quality florist services to a broad client base, including both individuals and corporate customers. Our warehousing and distribution centers handle large-scale orders and events, while our integrated dispatch center ensures efficient, timely delivery across Bahrain.

Our Services Include:

-Luxury Floral Arrangements
-Event Floral Design
-Plant Maintenance
-Bespoke Bouquets
-Seasonal Floral Collections
-Corporate Flower Services
-Premium Plant Curation
-Same-Day Flower Delivery
-Floral Subscriptions

gather is a modern flower brand built around a simple belief: flowers should be part of everyday life, not just special occasions.

Name: Borgona
Description:
Borgona, ce sont des créations Made in France réalisées à base de fleurs séchées et avant tout un objectif, celui de faire la promotion d’un nouveau mode de consommation plus durable. 

Nous sommes partis du constat qu’en moyenne, de la production à la mise en vente, seulement 4 fleurs fraiches sur 10 sont utilisées. Dès lors, nous avons souhaité faire des fleurs séchées, le point de départ de notre projet. De plus, nous souhaitions permettre aux personnes qui ne peuvent pas s’offrir de bouquet de fleurs fraiches car trop “éphémères et coûteuses” d’avoir une véritable alternative durable.

En parallèle de nos créations nous collaborons avec d’autres créateurs dans le but de créer un véritable éco-système. Ainsi, nous souhaitons vous proposer une offre complète en mélangeant différents savoir-faire dans les domaines de la décoration, l’habillement, la gastronomie et l’art.

Name: Luv Bud Boutique
Description:
About Luv Bud Boutique:

Where Affordability Meets Floral Artistry 

Luv Bud Boutique blossomed from the desire to change the way you experience flowers. Founded by two passionate individuals weary of overpriced bouquets and uninspiring options, we embarked on a journey to make floral gifting accessible, creative, and personal.

Our Story:

In 2023, we decided to redefine the floral industry. Our mission was simple: to bring the natural beauty and emotional power of flowers within reach of every consumer. We believe that everyone deserves a chance to share the joy, love, and positive energy that blooms can bring, without worrying about the cost.

What Sets Us Apart:

Bespoke Floral Artistry: At Luv Bud Boutique, we don't believe in generic arrangements. We're committed to crafting unique, custom arrangements and bouquets tailored to your exact specifications. Your vision is our masterpiece.

Affordable Elegance: We understand the importance of quality and affordability. Our commitment to fair pricing ensures that you can celebrate life's moments without spending more than you have to.

Our Reach:

Currently operating out of the 3 big cities (Durban, Johannesburg and Cape Town), we're devoted to delivering your floral dreams right to your doorstep. Though we don't offer same-day delivery (yet), our commitment to excellence remains unwavering.

Join Our Floral Journey:

As we expand our horizons to Durban and Johannesburg in the near future, we invite you to follow our growth and the stunning floral creations we bring to life. Our Instagram showcases our artistry, promotions, client deliveries, and even a few good-natured jokes.

Why Luv Bud Boutique?

We are your love buds, your partners in spreading joy, and your go-to source for the everyday elegance of flowers. Our commitment to affordability, quality, and the artistry of nature sets us apart. We're not just a flower shop; we're a movement to make the world more beautiful, one bud at a time.

Let's become buddies!

Chaque composition est réalisée avec instinct et passion, mettant en valeur la beauté naturelle des fleurs sans artifice. Nos créations audacieuses et inattendues attirent l’œil et invitent à la contemplation, offrant des instants de poésie et de rencontre entre la nature et votre espace.

Name: Les Artisans Fleuristes de France
Description:
Groupement de fleuristes indépendants. Notre réseau regroupe des fleuristes qui souhaitent rester indépendants tout en bénéficiant de la force d’un groupe (nombreux avantages : communication, marketing, achats, conseils et formations).

Le site artisansfleuristesdefrance.com a été créé pour permettre aux artisans d’avoir accès à la vente en ligne facilement, mais toujours avec la volonté de leur laisser leur indépendance : chacun à son espace personnel, simple d’utilisation, et est libre de choisir les produits qu’ils souhaitent mettre en vente sans avoir à se soucier de la gestion du site.  Sélectionnés par des professionnels, nos artisans qualifiés sont des spécialistes de la fleur et des plantes. Ils travaillent dans le respect de l'environnement et des saisons.

Name: Le Papillon Blanc Ltd
Description:
Le Papillon Blanc Ltd operates as The Flower Shoppe.  
We are a local florist located in South East London, (SE12 0AA). 

The beauty of the shop is found within the special team of expert florists that run the store, who love producing original and exciting floral. 

We offer a range of services, from bouquet deliveries across London to installations – all of our flowers are fresh, seasonal and hand-delivered straight from our South East London store. 

Value Proposition: 
Our retail florist business offers high-quality artistically designed and customised floral arrangements for the discerning consumer. By offering on demand and ready-to-go bouquets through our store and website we can fulfil orders for local customers and those outside our local area to expand our market reach. We can further extend our reach through deployment of flower carts at weekends to venues and outdoor markets. We are part of a network of over 600 florists spread across the UK and enjoy additional national sales through this network.  Our shop sells plants, vintage home décor and other merchandise which complements our main floral products.

Competitive Advantage:
Our competitive advantage stems from a 30 year history of strong local connections that we have maintained and modernise our website offerings, improved billing flexibility through our payment provider, higher quality flowers and plants, strong relations with our customers, an optimised location on a busy road near a train station, and most important we surpass at offering larger, distinctive and customise designs where customers can be selective and chose the specific flowers that they want in their arrangement.
Customer Relationships:
We take pride in being a reliable independent florist, with great attention to detail and supportive of the local community. From hotel and restaurant launches to conferences, themed parties, and ongoing corporate contracts we cater to all! Whatever the occasion, the flowers will be lovingl

Name: Lone Star Bloom
Description: The only vertically integrated family of floral brands importing both perishable & non-perishable product from five countries, consolidating product at two borders, distributing product throughout the country to its' wholesale operations, last mile that product to retail florists (both owned and non-owned), and delivering cut floral arrangements to doorsteps nationwide.

Name: Fleuriste Jungle Pop Genève
Description:
Jungle Pop a pour vocation d'offrir une nouvelle ère au métier de fleuriste par un art floral moderne, pop et éco-responsable.

En plus d'offrir un vaste choix de fleurs et d'objets de caractère en boutique, Jungle Pop propose ses services aux entreprises, commerces et particuliers dans les domaines suivants: 

• ABONNEMENTS FLORAUX ENTREPRISES
Nous pensons que chaque lieu possède son identité, c’est pourquoi nous vous proposons des créations sur mesure hebdomadaires ou mensuelles adaptées à votre image de marque.

• AMENAGEMENTS D'ESPACES
Grâce aux nombreuses variétés de plantes dont nous disposons en boutique et sur commande, nous vous offrons un service d’aménagement aussi bien pour vos espaces intérieurs que pour vos petits espaces extérieurs tels que terrasses et balcons. 

• SOIRÉES d'ENTREPRISES, SALONS, INAUGURATIONS
Nous vous accompagnons dans la réalisation des décors floraux de vos évènements professionnels. En nous inspirant de votre image et de l’identité qu’elle véhicule, nous créons des projets qui mettront en valeur votre activité avec élégance.

• FESTIVITÉS ET ÉVÈNEMENTIEL
Quels que soient vos évènements, nous apporterons à vos festivités un caractère floral à la hauteur de vos attentes.

Name: Floral Sourcing
Description:
Floral Sourcing is een jong, dynamisch en gepassioneerd team dat zich inzet voor het leveren van bloemen en planten van hoge kwaliteit. We willen niet alleen een bijzonder assortiment aanbieden, maar ook een partner zijn die begrijpt wat u nodig heeft om u in de markt te onderscheiden.

Onze focus ligt op duurzame relaties met zorgvuldig geselecteerde kwekers en leveranciers, zodat we een uniek en vers aanbod kunnen garanderen. De missie van Floral Sourcing is het selecteren en kopen van heel goede kwaliteit bloemen en planten die toegevoegde waarde bieden voor onze klanten en partners. We werken nauw samen met zorgvuldig geselecteerde kwekers en importeurs. Door onze marktkennis en inkoopvaardigheden willen we de concurrentiepositie en winstgevendheid van onze leden versterken.

Name: Belle Epoque B.V.
Description:
Belle Epoque Rozen – Specialist in Unieke Tuinrozen

Bij Belle Epoque Rozen bieden we een uniek assortiment van meer dan 800 rozenvariëteiten, direct van de kwekerij naar uw tuin. Onze collectie omvat rozen van vooraanstaande veredelaars zoals Meilland, David Austin, Tantau en Kordes. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in rozen die niet alleen prachtig bloeien, maar ook karakter en charme toevoegen aan elke tuin.

Ons Assortiment:

Klimrozen en ramblerrozen die elk oppervlak tot leven brengen
Engelse rozen met hun iconische vorm en geur
Moderne rozen in unieke kleuren en variëteiten die u nergens anders vindt
Bij Belle Epoque staan we bekend om onze uitstekende klantenservice. Ons team van rozenexperts staat klaar om u te helpen bij het kiezen van de perfecte roos voor uw tuin, en biedt deskundig advies over de verzorging en het onderhoud van uw planten. Wij begrijpen dat elke tuin uniek is, en daarom denken we met u mee om de beste keuze te maken.

Wij leveren rechtstreeks van de kwekerij, zodat u altijd verzekerd bent van de hoogste kwaliteit. Onze rozen worden zorgvuldig gekweekt en geselecteerd om ervoor te zorgen dat ze gezond en sterk bij u aankomen, klaar om te groeien en te bloeien in uw tuin.

Waarom kiezen voor Belle Epoque Rozen?

Exclusieve en zeldzame rozenvariëteiten
Directe levering van de beste kwaliteit rozen
Klantenservice die verder gaat dan de verkoop
Advies op maat voor tuinliefhebbers
Bij Belle Epoque draait het om passie voor rozen en de beste ervaring voor onze klanten. Volg ons voor de nieuwste rozenvariëteiten en tips voor een bloeiende tuin!

Name: Les filles d'à côté
Description:
N'allez pas chez le fleuriste, venez chez nous, comme si vous arriviez chez des amis !

Chez les filles d'à côté, on propose une nouvelle expérience florale en recréant un espace de vie au sein de notre boutique de fleurs. 
Chez les filles d'à côté, on vient, on passe un moment agréable, on commande un bouquet, on s’arrête pour boire une infusion, lire un livre, discuter avec les gérantes et les voisins, et on repart avec des plantes, des fleurs, des tips, des anecdotes… 
Évidement on peut aussi juste y passer mais l’endroit est chaleureux et on s’y sent bien comme quand lorsque l'on arrive chez des amis.

Name: Bart & Bastian
Description:
Wir sind Cousins aus Holland. Mit unseren Gesichtern stehen wir für Qualität. Wir lieben Blumen und Nachhaltigkeit, sind Pflanzenfans mit langjähriger Erfahrung, berufsbedingte Frühaufsteher und voller frischer Ideen für Innovationen, die wir in unseren Familienbetrieb Verdel einbringen. Unser erklärtes Ziel: Ihnen ein abwechslungsreiches Sortiment für ein blühendes Zuhause anzubieten. Mit schönen Supermarktblumen und Pflanzen aus Holland, die Sie direkt in ausgesuchten Edeka, Rewe und Globusmärkten erhalten und in die man sich ganz einfach verlieben muss. Als ideales Geschenk in stylischer, schwarzer Verpackung und natürlich auch zum selber Schenken. Schließlich machen frische Blumen nicht nur glücklich, sie zaubern auch Farbe in den Tag und in das Leben.
Let flowers make you happy & colour your day!

Name: FLEURS DE LA SAGESSE
Description:
Since 1980, “Fleurs de la Sagesse” has been succeeding in the creation of various floral compositions. Our main aim is to create simple and astonishing arrangements, bouquets and many more that will satisfy your desires. 
We encourage our team to achieve their own personal and professional creations, so we can please your desires because we believe that the best coming out of each of us enriches all of us!

As always Fleurs de la Sagesse is ready to go beyond expectations!

Description: Named after our dog Lily and her favorite flower, a lily! We aim to spread happiness throughout DC, Maryland, and Virginia. Name: DP Saini Florist & Bakers
Description:
DP SAINI Florist is India's leading online florist company, delivering fresh flower bouquets & basket arrangements of various designs along with sweets, cakes, chocolates, soft toys and other gift items for Birthday, Anniversary, Love & Romance, Since 1991, DP Saini Florist has catered to more than 1 million happy & satisfied Indian as well as NRI customers. DP Saini Florist has strong florist vendors, network in more than 500 cities in India to send flowers gifts to Faridabad, Delhi, Gurgaon, Noida, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, etc.

Name: ALYNAMOSS
Description:
Vous êtes architectes, designers, agenceurs, maîtres d'œuvres, décorateurs ou chefs d'entreprises, et vous cherchez une décoration intérieur au concept innovant et incluant une démarche écoresponsable, alors le mur végétal stabilisé est la touche artistique sans entretien et 100% naturelle adaptée à cette demande. 
Situé dans le puy de Dôme, Alynamoss étudie dans un 1er temps votre environnement afin de définir les conditions optimums pour le projet végétal. En collaboration avec vous, nous réalisons dans un second temps un rendu visuel en 2D afin de vous projeter rapidement dans votre futur univers végétal.
Pour terminer, nous intervenons sur le lieu afin de procéder à l'installation du mur végétal en quelques heures seulement.
Le mur végétal est 100% naturel, pas d'entretien, pas d'arrosage, pas de dégagement de CO2, pas d'allergène ni aucun insectes! Sa durée de vie varie entre 5 et 10 ans.

Name: Grupo Flora - Corporativo
Description:
Somos o Grupo Flora - Corporativo, um atendimento especial para as Pessoas Jurídicas. <3

Hoje, somos a maior rede de Flores Online do Brasil - com envios que vão de norte a sul, de forma simples, rápida e sempre para o mesmo dia, se assim precisar. ;)

Nossa missão, nasceu ao identificar que vários dos nossos clientes são empresas. Nossos clientes PJ fazem envios aos seus colaboradores, parceiros, clientes e muito mais. Através de nossos envios, se fazem presentes em momentos únicos como aniversários, condolências, boas-vindas entre muitas outras datas.

Pensando nas compras do mundo corporativo e todos os seus processos, nós temos como objetivo oferecer um atendimento que seja #DEScomplicado, #personalizado e #ágil, trazendo facilidades para os compradores, diminuindo processos e fazendo entregas rápidas.

Atuamos em parceria com com RH's de grandes empresas brasileiras (líderes de vários segmentos), onde conseguimos trabalhar com personalizações de produtos, descontos e faturamentos.

Afinal de contas, as pessoas jurídicas também amam. <3

Name: Epicflowers S.A.S
Description:
Epicflowers nació con el fin de compartir con los ecuatorianos las flores más hermosas y de más
alta calidad, llevando flores frescas desde nuestras fincas a tu hogar.

Nosotros somos la línea de venta nacional de la flor y decoración floral de Agrogana . Somos una
empresa que cuenta con sus propias fincas en el Valle del Cotopaxi y tenemos más de 25 años de
experiencia en flores.

Agrogana es una florícola ecuatoriana que fue fundada en 1995, en ese entonces solo producíamos
rosas. Hoy, producimos Spray Roses, Ranunculus, Anemones, Poppies, Scoop, Matildas, Delphinium,
Dianthus, Thistle, Lisianthus y, por supuesto, Rosas y exportamos nuestros productos a todo el mundo.

En Epicflowers buscamos brindarte una experiencia artística con flores en donde el lienzo en blanco
es cada mesa, florero o lugar donde las pinturas son las flores, y con ellas haremos una obra de arte
inolvidable.

Name: Groot & Groot Peonies
Description:
Welcome to Groot & Groot Peonies! Groot & Groot Peonies strives to offer peonies of the highest quality possible to our customers. We can realize this because of our unique methods during; cultivation & harvesting and processing. This goes for both fresh flower and root production. Our entire company is organized to secure the highest quality possible in relatively large production amounts. We invite you to visit our company if you’re curious about our procedures!

Groot & Groot Peonies is also reviewing its assortment continuously. We strive to be innovative and offer our customers the most exclusive and latest available varieties.

Groot & Groot Peonies offers its customers year round supply of fresh peony flowers. We can realize this because of our production farms and partners in multiple different climate zones. At this moment we have production locations and partners in: Italy, France, The Netherlands and South–Africa. Groot & Groot Peonies operates on a global level and has significant experience in doing business abroad.

Name: SAS LES COMPAGNONS DE LA NATURE 31
Description:
HISTOIRE ET CREATION DE L’ENTREPRISE :
Issue d’une famille d’horticulteur français de cinq générations au rayonnement international et à la tête de plusieurs fleuristeries dans la région toulousaine c’est en 1981 que Mme Daydé crée « La Jardinerie toulousaine » Un concept de libre-service spécialisé dans les plantes à massifs et les végétaux, directement produits sur l’exploitation.
En 2015, l’exploitation est reprise par Jean-Claude Daydé et Sandra (sa fille) ainsi que deux autres associés. Cette nouvelle direction sera à l’initiative de la modernisation de la jardinerie et de la poursuite des pratiques culturales plus écologiques. Elle accorde aussi une grande importance à la clientèle et à sa satisfaction. Une nouvelle politique commerciale est mise en place (carte de fidélité, animations, promotions)
L’entreprise étant soucieuse des enjeux écologiques et du respect de l’environnement, la famille décide d’utiliser des systèmes de protection biologique intégrés préservant la biodiversité, tels que les insectes auxiliaires (coccinelles, syrphes, nématodes…). Pièges à phéromones, pièges chromatiques englués sont aussi utilisés en tant qu’alternatives aux produits phytopharmaceutiques.
NOS SECTEURS D’ACTIVITE :
-	La pépinière, les plantes de saison et les plantes d’intérieurs, avec un grand choix de variétés. 
-	Nos productions : nous cultivons et vendons notre propre production, gage de qualité.
-	La fleur coupée : nous vous proposons des bouquets frais tout au long de l’année déjà prêt ou à confectionner par nos fleuristes. Mariage, baptême, enterrement, nous vous confectionnons les pièces de votre choix.
-	Epicerie :  Nous mettons en avant des produits du terroir.
-	Salon de jardin et barbecue : pour préparer votre été en toute tranquillité.
SERVICES ANNEXES :
-	Nous vous proposons de vous livrer consulter tarif et zone en magasin. 
-	Vous souhaitez faire un cadeau, nous emballons les produits pour une attention réussi.

Name: Świeże Kwiaty
Description:
Świeże Kwiaty to wyjątkowe miejsce, pełne pozytywnej energii i pasji do kwiatów. Znajdziesz u nas wyjątkowe kwiaty, pochodzące z naszego rodzinnego gospodarstwa i zaprzyjaźnionych dostawców. 

Przykładamy najwyższą uwagę do jakości, przyglądamy się każdej gałązce, która trafia do bukietów. 

Stworzyliśmy miejsce, dzięki któremu możesz cieszyć się pięknymi, świeżymi bukietami bez względu na to gdzie mieści się Twoja firma. 

Swiezekwiaty.pl to miejsce pełne pięknych, pachnących kwiatów i cudownych historii, które towarzyszą nam podczas przygotowywania specjalnie dla Was wyjątkowych bukietów. To miejsce, w którym każdego dnia pomagamy firmom tworzyć pozytywną energię w biurze, a pracownikom dbać po relacje biznesowe z swoimi kontrahentami.

 Votre Source de Bonheur Floral 

Que vous cherchiez à exprimer votre amour, à célébrer une occasion spéciale ou simplement à ajouter une touche de fraîcheur à votre quotidien, Cerf Moi une Fleur à Saxon est là pour vous servir. Blom vast een abonnement dat bij jou past. Zo kies je zelf de stijl en grootte van jouw boeket en hoe vaak het geleverd wordt. Wij doen de rest! Ga je voor een wekelijks, tweewekelijks of maandelijks bloemenabonnement? Hou jij van een knap klassiek boeket of ben je meer voor trendy veldboeket? Alles is mogelijk. Het beste van alles? Name: Hela Livets Blommor
Description:
Hos oss finns det blommor i alla dess former, krukväxter, snittblommor och olika binderier. Vi har även ett litet men noga utvalt sortiment av presenter i olika prisklasser. Blombinderier till bröllop, fest och begravning. Öppet torsdag och fredagskvällar samt lördagar. Däremellan finns det alltid blommor hemma som kan budas ut eller levereras enligt överenskommelse. Beställningar tas emot via mail eller telefon.

Min strävan är att göra varje arrangemang eller binderi personligt och skapar allt med stor omsorg och kärlek. 
Väljer mitt sortiment utifrån vad jag själv tycker om- det är mycket grönt, blommigt, naturmaterial och gammeldags charm. 
Tycker om att återbruka och letar gärna gamla möbler, fat, skålar och annat speciellt material jag behöver på loppisar eller begagnat marknaden.

Name: Silk Flower Store
Description:
Waar schoonheid, creativiteit en een passie voor bloemen samenkomen.

Silk Flower Store is ontstaan vanwege mijn passie voor bloemsierkunst en een sluimerende drang om mijn creativiteit te uiten.

Ik geloof in duurzaamheid en zie hoe mooi zijden bloemen kunnen zijn. Ze doen eigenlijk niet onder voor echte bloemen, maar je hoeft ze natuurlijk geen water te geven en verwelken doen ze nooit. Bloemen voor thuis, op kantoor, in de aula van een school, maar ook zeer geschikt als corsage of rouwstuk.

Met een collectie in verschillende stijlen, kleuren en afmetingen vind je altijd iets moois voor jezelf of om iemand mee te verrassen. Er is ook ruime keus in kunst in zijde voor op kantoor, openbare gebouwen of bij plechtigheden. Handgemaakte en prachtige creaties voor elke gelegenheid.

Bij Silk Flower Store kies je voor handgemaakte kunst, uitstraling en duurzaamheid.

Name: rustikka.dk
Description:
rustikka er et dansk livsstilsbrand, grundlagt af Christina Klingenberg, som bl.a. producerer bæredygtige og langtidsholdbare blomsterdekorationer af høj kvalitet.
Med et stærkt ønske og afsæt i at gøre en forskel, har vi taget kampen op mod de store CO2 syndere friske blomster og planter. Ligesom vi gør op med “køb og smid væk” kulturen, som den afskårne blomsterindustri bærer præg af. I stedet leverer vi langtidsholdbare blomsterdekorationer til private og erhverv verdenen over, som skaber stor wow effekt, som ikke skal vedligeholdes, og som kan genbruges igen og igen.
Alle vores blomster bliver produceret i EU under åben himmel uden brug af skadelig kemi, hvorefter de fragtes til vores naturskønne rammer lige uden for Kolding nærmere bestemt i Skartved, som danner rammerne om både showroom, kontor, blomsterværksted og lager. Her bliver blomsterne nøje sorteret og sammensat til smukke blomsterdekorationer af vores dygtige dekoratører, som producerer alt fra buketter og kranse til svævende blomsterskyer, borddekorationer, vægkonstellationer og meget mere. 
Vi er specialister i speciallavede dekorationer, og hjælper i dag mange i hotel- og restaurationsbranchen samt i detail med at sætte et bæredygtigt aftryk, som både resulterer i en stor ressourcebesparelse og ikke mindst økonomiske fordele og en stor wow effekt. Det er dén filosofi, vi benytter, når vi designer og udvikler nye kollektioner til rustikka, og det er den tilgang, der skaber den unikke rustikka-stil.

Évènementiel :
Envie d'apporter une touche florale & durable à votre déco ?

Communiquez-nous vos envies, vos inspirations, et nous réaliserons vos rêves les plus fous.

Nous pouvons vous proposer différents types d’ornementations florales afin de sublimer votre univers, et le rendre encore plus unique.
 Vous souhaitez donner du peps à votre vitrine ? Vous inaugurez un nouveau lieu ? Boticia est là pour vous accompagner.

J'ai pour habitude de faire des prestations sur-mesure et haut de gamme afin d'apporter un service à la hauteur des attentes de mes clients.

 Hoje nosso expertise entrega arranjos personalizados, assinaturas florais, decoração para seu evento / celebração (criação/projeto/instalação), além de manutenção e consultoria para nossos clientes.

Description:
Laventa Florals is een bloemenzaak die zich specialiseert in evenementen en workshops. Van huwelijken tot bedrijfsevents, teambuildings of een winkelopening, voor alle soorten evenementen kunnen jullie mij inschakelen. 

Samen bekijken we de mogelijkheden en maak ik een moodboard aan dat we dan toepassen op jullie gelegenheid. We houden daarbij rekening met de locatie, thema en het kleurenpallet. 

Met Laventa Florals geloof ik erin dat bloemen (zowel zijden bloemen voor blijvende installaties, als verse bloemen) een grote extra kunnen betekenen voor elke gelegenheid. Ze bieden namelijk een wow-factor aan waar jullie gasten/ klanten nog lang aan zullen terugdenken. 

Creër een eerste blijvende indruk bij jullie klanten/ gasten door bijvoorbeeld een bloemenboog aan de ingang van de locatie te plaatsen. 
Hang een bloemenwolk op in de etalage van jouw winkel om jouw collectie te benadrukken. 
Of stel, samen met mij, een weelderige bloemen façade samen, waardoor jullie winkel/ bedrijf extra opvalt in het straatbeeld. 

Tijdens een verkennend gesprek bekijk ik graag met jullie de mogelijkheden om zo meer impact te creëren met bloemen tijdens jullie events!

Name: Aarstidens Blomster
Description:
Aarstidens Blomster bygger på stærke værdier. Vi fokuserer på miljø, socialt ansvar, høj faglighed og garanterer naturligvis for bedste kvalitet på vores sortiment. I forretningen kan du finde mange danske og økologiske varer, og vi har nøje udvalgt vores leverandører efter forretningens værdigrundlag. Aarstidens Blomster har forkus på bæredygtighed og tilbyder nu bæredygtige buketter sprøjtefrie og pesticidefrie, og vores blomsterspande er lavet af genbrugsplast :0) Når vi sender blomster ud bruger vi genanvender vi papkasser, så intet går til spilde. Hvis vi ikke har genbrugspapkasser, så benytter vi os af FSA godkendte blomster-papkasser. 

Vi sætter en ære i at hjælpe dig med at finde den helt rigtige gave – og ønsker du sparring og vejledning er du altid meget velkommen til at kigge forbi. Vi kan hjælpe dig med at finde den rigtige gave eller lave en personlig buket, som passer lige til modtageren. Vi kan også hjælpe dig med, hvad du skal skrive i dine kort eller på bånd til bårebuketter.

Aarstidens Blomster er medlem af Euroflorist, og vi bringer ud i hele fra egen forretning både via transport firma og med egne chauffører – Vi kan derfor levere til hele Danmark og endda også til udlandet. Er du nysgerrig for at vide mere, læs vores handelsbetingelser :0) 

Og hvis du leder efter blomster til din forretning eller firmagaver, så kan vi sagtens klarer en faktura. Send blot din bestilling til mette@aarstidens-blomster.dk

Description:
Plants In Paradise is een innovatief bedrijf dat elk evenement omtovert tot een prachtig paradijs met behulp van hun eigen bloemen en planten. Het bedrijf is opgericht door Pim Schrier, een getalenteerde bloemist met een passie voor groen.

Het team van Plants In Paradise begrijpt dat bloemen en planten niet alleen decoratief zijn, maar ook bijdragen aan de sfeer en het welzijn van de gasten. Daarom nemen ze altijd de tijd om te overleggen met hun klanten en te begrijpen wat voor soort sfeer ze willen creëren. Vervolgens maken ze unieke bloemstukken en groendecoraties die perfect aansluiten bij de visie van hun klant.

Als u op zoek bent naar een evenementenbedrijf dat uw visie kan omzetten in een prachtige realiteit, kijk dan niet verder dan Plants In Paradise. Het team staat klaar om uw evenement om te toveren tot een paradijs met hun eigen bloemen en planten.

Name: Arthouefa
Description:
Supermarchés, marchés, grandes boutiques de décoration et d’aménagement d’intérieur sont tous aujourd’hui remplis d’articles de décoration et de fleurs en plastiques non dégradables et contribuant, chaque jour qui passe, à la pollution de l’environnement et à l’abandon du savoir faire artisanal africain.
Pourtant, plusieurs des 17 objectifs de développement durable ne cessent de tirer la sonnette d’alarme. Nous pouvons citer les ODD n° 11, 12, 13 et 15.
Ce constat est l’élément de base de notre décision de création de l’entreprise ArtHouefa (Art- l’art ; Houefa - maison agréable, paisible à vivre et en accord avec la nature). Notre objectif est de rétablir puis de promouvoir d’une part l’art authentique africain, et d’autre part, l’intégration de plantes vertes d’intérieur dans tous les espaces : lieu de travail, maison, espace loisir, etc). Il nous faut valoriser à la fois la nature, mais aussi ces anciennes pratiques qui mettent en valeur la terre, le bois et d’autres matières biodégradables qui sont sans conséquence sur notre environnement.
Ainsi, nous proposons des plantes et accessoires écoresponsables, des articles de décorations issus de l’artisanat ou de la menuiserie locale et sous régionale et bien plus encore.

Name: Elven Garden Flower
Description: Fleuriste confirmée et expérimentée, Elven Garden Flower saura vous faire voyager à travers les mondes fantastiques, fantaisistes et oniriques pour habiller et décorer tous vos évènements et mariages, traditionnels ou médiévaux.

Name: Cumberland Flower Farm
Description:
Cumberland Flower Farm grows cut flowers for weddings, funerals and homes in west Cumbria on our 6 acre small holding. Our flowers are grown using regenerative and old-school market garden techniques, and we practice Sustainable Floristry. 

Outside of our own flower season, we are 'Grown not Flown' champions, only ever using British grown flowers.

Name: Flowers By Joanne
Description:
Since 1976, Flowers by Joanne has been part of the heartbeat of the Hibiscus Coast. Founded nearly five decades ago by Joanne — a talented florist with a deep love for her community — our shop quickly became known for elegant floral design and warm, personal service. Generations of locals have trusted us to help celebrate life’s most meaningful moments, from weddings and births to heartfelt goodbyes.

Today, Flowers by Joanne continues that legacy with the same passion and care. Every bouquet is handcrafted in our local Silverdale shop using fresh, seasonal blooms, combining timeless techniques with a modern touch.

We’re proud to remain a family-owned, independent florist — steeped in tradition, yet always evolving. Whether you visit us in person or order online, we’re here to help you express what words alone can’t say.

Still here for you, just as we’ve always been — since 1976.

Name: Floristry

Floristry biedt luxe vazen met zijden bloemen aan. Tijdloos, elegant, en stijlvol. Dat is de uitstraling en het concept van onze vazen met zijden bloemen. Van de beste kwaliteit en met veel passie samengesteld.

Chez Terra Flora, nous vous offrons bien plus que des fleurs et plantes artificielles : nous vous proposons un univers de solutions adaptées à vos besoins.

Description:

Name: Norris - Master Florists

Creative Director Anja Norris is available for consultancy requirements, talks and keynote presentations. Email hello@norris.store for more information.

We are British Florists Association members and fellows of the Institute of Professional Florists.

Name: Blumen Risse GmbH & Co. KG

Name: Flor.idas

Name: Boutique Atelier du Moulin
Description: Boutique Atelier du Moulin est un atelier floral spécialisé dans l'événementiel. Véronique est à l'écoute de vos besoins et saura vous guider et créer des confections florales qui seront uniques, à votre image et inoubliables.

Name: Watkins Flowers of Distinction
Description:
This is why we do what we do:

Owners Sallie Taggart and Ed Carpp, and the staff of Watkins Flowers of Distinction, believe that everyone yearns for beauty in his or her life.  We strive to bring beauty into your life by offering inspired floral designs created by talented, artistic, seasoned designers; and, through our retail store which merchandises hard-to-find beautiful gifts, fragrances, and accessory home decor.

Our ordering process makes it easy to order, especially on a repeat basis.  And, we deliver daily to the Greater Raleigh metropolitan area in our clean, professional, well-maintained vans.

We accomplish all of this by challenging the trends in the floral industry, doing the opposite of the vast majority of our competitors.  Rather than lowering standards to compete with grocery stores and the soul-deadening offerings of cheap online flower sellers, we search for only the finest, freshest flowers and process them properly.  We keep our flower buckets bacteria-free; and, we cut, hydrate, and feed all of our flowers upon arrival.  Yes, this costs more; but, the results are fresher, longer-lasting flowers that will bring beauty and joy into your life for an extended period and provide you with greater value for your purchase.

Our shop is state-of-the-art.  We strive to be a conscious, caring global citizen.  All of our equipment, from the walk-in cooler to all-LED store lighting, is low-energy usage and high-efficiency.  Our reach-in floral cooler runs on hydrocarbon refrigerants which impacts minimally on the environment and is the most pollution-free technology currently available.  We eliminated sinks that tend to spawn flower-killing bacteria in favor of an overhead water source system at each work station.  As much as possible, our flowers are sourced from local growers and suppliers who practice sustainable, organic farming methods.

Watkins is among the most Google-reviewed and highest-rated florists in the Triangle area of North Carolina.

Name: Agapanthe et Compagnie
Description:
À propos de nous
Chez Agapanthe et Compagnie, chaque fleur raconte une histoire, et chaque composition est une œuvre d'art façonnée avec soin par nos petites mains expertes et attentionnées. Notre équipe de fleuristes diplômés et passionnés est à votre écoute 7 jours sur 7 pour transmettre vos émotions à travers des fleurs fraîches, élégantes et créatives.

Nous savons que chaque occasion mérite d’être sublimée par des fleurs, qu’il s’agisse d’une déclaration d’amour, d’un anniversaire, d’un événement ou simplement d’un geste de gentillesse. C’est pourquoi nous vous proposons une large gamme de bouquets, de compositions florales et de plantes.

Tout au long de ce site, vous trouverez un aperçu de nos réalisations, preuve de notre savoir-faire et de notre engagement à vous offrir le meilleur de la nature. Nous vous remercions sincèrement de nous faire confiance pour embellir vos moments précieux.

Notre magasin
Situé au cœur de Nîmes, notre boutique de 100m² vous accueille chaque jour pour découvrir notre large sélection de fleurs et plantes pour l’intérieur et l’extérieur. Des bouquets en poche d’eau de 10 à 60€, des compositions florales, ainsi que des jardins de plantes vous attendent pour répondre à toutes vos envies. Si vous souhaitez une création sur mesure, notre équipe est là pour réaliser votre bouquet personnalisé.

Nous assurons également un service de livraison rapide et soigné, du lundi au samedi entre 8h30 et 18h, ainsi que le dimanche matin entre 8h30 et 10h30, ainsi qu’un service de livraison dans un rayon de 15 km autour de Nîmes.

Horaires d'ouverture
Du lundi au samedi : 8h00 à 19h30
Le dimanche & jours fériés : 8h00 à 13h00

Coordonnées

Email : agapanthe-et-compagnie@orange.fr
Adresse : 42 Rue du Forez, 30000 Nîmes, France

Nous vous invitons à venir nous rencontrer dans notre boutique, ou à nous contacter par téléphone pour passer commande ou organiser une livraison.

Name: KYTKY OD PEPY a.s.
Description:
Zabíváme se prodejem řezaných a hrnkových květin s podporou tuzemských pěstitelů. Rádi se prezentujeme jako malá radinná firma, která razí filozofii, že kytky jsou pro radost. Není to jen pro příležitosti narozenin a omluv :D a nemá to být luxusní položka v nákupním seznamu. 
Dlouhodobě se tedy snažíme zprostředkovat prostředí farmářských trhů a naučit našeho zákazníka, aby se zastavil pro kytku jen tak, domu do vázy, prostě jen proto, že udělá radost a ještě vám chvilku vydrží čerstvá :)

Name: Agricenter Piacenza
Description:
Da più di 35 anni Agricenter Piacenza opera nel settore del verde a 360 gradi. Si tratta di una realtà affermata e conosciuta sul territorio. L'azienda si occupa sia della vendita piante, fiori e articoli di giardinaggio nei due punti vendita presenti a Piacenza, che della realizzazione di giardini e aree verdi, nonché di potature e progettazione, installazione e manutenzione di impianti di irrigazione e anti-zanzare. 
Agricenter Piacenza è una realtà in continua crescita ed è caratterizzata da un forte orientamento alla persona, con grande attenzione al servizio al cliente e allo sviluppo professionale e personale dei collaboratori. Lavorare in Agricenter Piacenza significa entrare in un'Azienda che offre uno strutturato percorso di formazione in ingresso e che prevede importanti progetti di sviluppo e molteplici percorsi di carriera.

Name: Blumenharmonie Wilma
Description:
Blumenharmonie Wilma ist ein Meisterfloristik Betrieb in Wien Hernals.
Wir verarbeiten hauptsächlich österreichische Blumen und Pflanzen. Bei uns bekommt ihr frische, heimische Rosen auch im Winter. 
Hier binden gelernte Floristinnen Blumensträusse, gestalten Gestecke, binden Kränze und Trauerkränze und beraten bei der Auswahl der passenden Zimmerpflanzen ob blühend oder Grünpflanzen.
All das liefern wir auch innerhalb von Wien an die gewünschte Adresse, Firmen, Spitäler, sowie alle Friedhöfe.
Für Firmenkunden interessant:
Das BlumenAbo;
unsere Vasenfüllungen, die wöchentlich frisch ins Büro geliefert werden.

Name: Sincerely Florals
Description: Sincerely Florals is a boutique floral design business specializing in creating personalized, elegant, and artistic floral arrangements for events, weddings, and special occasions. Founded in 2021, Sincerely Florals is driven by a passion for blooms and a commitment to providing exceptional floral artistry that captures the essence of every moment. We offer a range of services, from custom floral installations to hands-on floral design workshops, allowing clients to create their dream floral experiences. At Sincerely Florals, we believe in the power of flowers to transform spaces, inspire creativity, and celebrate life’s most beautiful moments.

Name: April & Fritz
Description:
April & Fritz’s owner, Bree, has vivid childhood memories of spending time on her grandparents’ property - some of the happiest times of her life, and where her love for flowers & nature began. She remembers time spent climbing trees, playing with the dogs and chickens, and exploring their plant-filled garden and nursery. The home was a gathering place where the family would come together to celebrate life’s moments; big and small.

After working at a global technology company for 5 years (with a side hobby of floristry beginning to bloom), Bree was made suddenly redundant. She decided to see this as an opportunity to follow her dreams and start her own floral design business. As she sat down to start planning, she came back to one question: ‘why am I passionate about this?’. Her memories brought her back to her grandparents’ property; the flower gardens; and the time spent with family. Bree looked through old photo albums, reliving the memories, and came across a photo of her and her brother in their grandparents’ garden with their two dogs - April & Fritz. And just like that, the brand was born.

Name: Kaza das Flores
Description:
A Kaza das Flores foi fundada em 2004 por Fátima Fernandes, profissional com mais de 30 anos de experiência em arte floral e detentora de um recorde do Guinness World Records pelo maior bouquet de noiva do mundo (2002).

Desde o seu início, a Kaza das Flores dedica-se a oferecer produtos de elevada qualidade, trabalhando com flores nacionais e importadas para garantir aos seus clientes frescura e excelência todos os dias. A equipa é continuamente formada para criar, com rigor e sensibilidade, arranjos florais capazes de surpreender até os gostos mais exigentes.

Paralelamente, a marca desenvolve um trabalho de design e criação floral para eventos, que vai desde casamentos a eventos corporativos e lançamentos de marca, criando ambientes únicos e personalizados para cada ocasião e dimensão.

Ao longo dos anos, a Kaza das Flores tem vindo a crescer e a inovar, tanto ao nível das técnicas como da oferta, expandindo a sua presença para o canal online.

A loja online apresenta uma seleção cuidada de arranjos florais únicos, plantas e produtos complementares — como chocolates e peluches— pensados para transformar até os momentos mais simples em ocasiões verdadeiramente memoráveis.

Name: MicroUniverso

floral design

Name: The Nature CBD
Description:
En The Nature CBD somos unos verdaderos amantes de la naturaleza, de la tierra y de todos los beneficios que se pueden extraer de ella de forma limpia y sencilla. Por eso todo nuestro catálogo está producido con la tecnología más avanzada y limpia, para ofrecer productos totalmente naturales, libres de pesticidas, sustancias OGM, herbicidas, conservantes y siempre en un envasado 100% reciclable.

Seleccionamos los mejores cultivos de CBD a lo largo de Europa, con especial foco en la calidad y el entorno de producción. Garantizamos un control exhaustivo en nuestros productos, consiguiendo el CBD de mejor calidad y siempre respaldado por los correspondientes certificados.

Nuestros productos utilizan las mejores genéticas de cáñamo sin THC, que se han ido mejorando a lo largo del tiempo para adaptarse a las necesidades de un cliente cada vez más exigente.

Name: Fiorile Firenze

Name: Floetica
Description:
