Name: Sparks Florist
Description: For over six decades, Sparks Florist has been the heartbeat of floral design in Nevada, offering more than just bouquets—we offer experiences. Family-owned and operated through three generations, our shops bring together the charm of a local family business with the polish of a floral empire. We specialize in custom arrangements and floral event design that add a personal touch to life’s most significant moments. With locations and delivery that span Reno, Sparks, and Lake Tahoe, we're your go-to for both the everyday and the extraordinary. From DIY classes to kids' workshops, we're not just in the business of flowers; we're in the business of joy. Our commitment? Quality you can see, service you can feel, and floral designs that make every occasion unforgettable.

Name: FaVish Blooms
Description: Favish Blooms is a premier floral design studio dedicated to creating exceptional, artistic arrangements for every occasion. Based in the vibrant Al Jadaf district of Dubai, we cater to a discerning clientele through both our beautiful retail boutique and curated corporate gifting programs. We believe in the language of flowers and the power of perfect customer experiences.

Name: Planterly
Description:
The Planterly team is a group of flower lovers with a combined background in horticulture and design. Our goal is to bring seasonal beauty to homes and businesses by creating eye-catching flower planters and window boxes.

Our service area is currently a 25 mile radius around the Dallas, PA area.

Name: Dubai Flowers
Description:
Welcome to Dubai Flower Profiles and Pages! We are the leading company in the floral industry, proudly associated with Green Art Factory. At Dubai Flower Profiles and Pages, we specialize in providing exquisite and fresh flower arrangements, catering to a wide range of occasions and preferences. Whether you're looking for a stunning bouquet, an elegant flower box, or a mesmerizing glass arrangement, our skilled team of floral artists is here to bring your vision to life.

Our commitment to quality is unwavering, and we source the finest flowers from around the world to ensure that each arrangement surpasses your expectations. From vibrant roses to delicate lilies, from exotic orchids to charming tulips, we offer an extensive selection of blooms that will add beauty and joy to any space.

In addition to our stunning floral arrangements, we also offer a diverse range of indoor and outdoor plants, including succulents, terrariums, cacti, and more. Our expertise extends to hydroponics and aquaponics, providing sustainable and innovative solutions for green enthusiasts.

At Dubai Flower Profiles and Pages, we understand the importance of a well-rounded living environment. That's why we offer a range of services to enhance your space, including pets and aquariums. From playful companions to serene aquatic landscapes, we bring nature's wonders to your doorstep.
To explore our offerings and discover the perfect floral arrangement or green addition for your home, office, or special event, visit our linked website. Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on the latest trends, industry news, and exciting promotions. Join our network of floral enthusiasts and professionals, and let's create a blooming community together.

Transform your surroundings with the beauty of nature. Choose Dubai Flower Profiles and Pages, your trusted partner for all things floral and green.

Name: Capri bloemen
Description:
Bloemen zijn voor mij meer dan een product ze brengen gevoel, kleur en verbinding.

Als eigenaar van Capri Bloemen zet ik me elke dag in om mensen blij te maken met bloemen die écht passen bij het moment.

Of het nu gaat om een persoonlijk boeket, een sfeervolle bruiloft of de wekelijkse bloemen op kantoor bij ons draait het om kwaliteit, stijl en aandacht.

 Specialisaties: maatwerkboeketten, bruiloften, rouwarrangementen, bedrijfsbloemen, abonnementen

 “Bloemen zeggen wat woorden niet kunnen.”

Name: Rossahut
Description: Real roses that lasts up to 365+ days.

Name: Le Rose Atelier
Description: Le Rose Atelier is a floral design firm whose mission is to give voice to every emotion and feeling through the luxurious beauty of flowers. We craft personalized, one-on-one experiences that transform each creation into a unique masterpiece. We serve a diverse clientele that includes both social and corporate sector, and consistently deliver the freshest and most exquisite blooms, arranged in a timeless, modern, and sophisticated manner with an unwavering attention to detail.  We offer floral and event design, gift bouquets, and weekly floral subscription services in the New York tri state area.

Name: STUDIO ORTIE
Description:
Le studio créatif ORTIE vous propose des fleurs principalement de saison.
Sélectionnées avec soin, chacune des fleurs et feuillages seront
positionnés précisément dans le seul but de sublimer votre espace.
Influencé par les forêts primaires, nous privilégions une vision vertueuse, des projets qui s’adaptent aux saisons.

Name: Calluna Flower Truck
Description:
At Calluna Flower Truck, we deliver the beauty of fresh, locally sourced flowers directly to you. Our signature "Build Your Own Bouquet" (BYOB) experience allows you to create your own floral design, making every bouquet personal and unique. 

Owner Elissa Abod, blends her expertise in Industrial-Organizational (IO) psychology with her flower passion, to enhance employee well-being. By leveraging the restorative power of flowers, we aim to contribute to healthier, more productive workplaces where employees thrive.

Name: Forage Ojai
Description:
Forage Ojai is a boutique floral studio and concept shop in the heart of Ojai, California—where artistry, intention, and the natural world meet.
Founded by floral designer and creative director Elizabeth Cohn, Forage Ojai is known for its distinct approach: each arrangement is treated as a one-of-a-kind composition, guided by the materials themselves and the season at hand.

Our work spans weddings, private events, installations, and daily florals, as well as immersive workshops that blend floral design with mindfulness and creative exploration. With over 25 years of international experience—and features in Vogue Weddings, Martha Stewart Weddings, Elle Decor, and Style Me Pretty—Forage Ojai has become synonymous with modern, soulful luxury.

Offerings:
Weddings | Events | Installations | Workshops | Retail | Corporate Partnerships

Every design begins with listening—to nature, to intention, to the quiet poetry in the details.

 Ojai, California
 www.forageojai.com

Name: La Boîte Aux Lilas
Description:
Dirigée par un professionnel de l’événementiel et artisan fleuriste, La Boîte Aux Lilas transforme vos projets professionnels en expériences végétales uniques, où créativité, précision et sens du détail se mettent au service de vos objectifs.

Nous accompagnons les entreprises et agences dans trois grands univers :

Scénographie et décoration événementielle : séminaires, soirées, lancements de produits, halls d’accueil…

Bouquets d’accueil et fleurissement d’espaces : halls, bureaux, hôtels, restaurants… avec entretien inclus.

Ateliers entreprise : team building créatifs ou animations ludiques pour inspirer, fédérer et faire vivre un moment hors du quotidien.

Avec plus de 2000 clients accompagnés et des collaborations avec de grandes marques de la mode et du luxe, nous répondons aux demandes les plus exigeantes avec professionnalisme, sens du détail et précision.

Notre promesse : un accompagnement sur-mesure où nature, amour et expertise se rencontrent pour créer des espaces et des événements qui inspirent, apaisent et laissent une empreinte durable.

Name: Al Jowder Flowers & Landscaping
Description: Al Jowder Flowers & Landscaping is an flower company based out of Dubai Flower Center, Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

Name: Flower Guy
Description:
Welcome to Flower Guy, where our ethos is woven from the threads of kindness, connection, and the unparalleled beauty of blooms. Born from a deep-seated passion for floristry and a mission to craft Bloom Bonds that transcend the ordinary, we are not just about flowers—we're about the moments they create and the hearts they touch.

At Flower Guy, we pride ourselves on being more than just florists; we are born and bred floral artisans dedicated to the art of gifting. With over 39 years of collective experience in the industry, our team brings a wealth of knowledge, creativity, and love to every posy we craft. Our bespoke range of affordable flowers and gifts is thoughtfully curated for those who cherish the act of giving, celebrating the simple joy of connecting with loved ones and the community around us.

Our core values of kindness, connection, and appreciation are at the heart of everything we do. We understand that flowers are more than mere decorations; they are unifiers, healers, and teachers of self-love and care. Our creations aim to facilitate a space where emotions can be expressed, memories cherished, and beauty appreciated in its purest form.

Our mission is bold yet simple: to Walk in Beauty with our community, delivering 1 million posies by 2027. This journey is about reaching a number and spreading love, hope, and positivity, one flower at a time. It's about co-creating a world where kindness is the language spoken by all and where every bloom bond formed is a step towards a more compassionate and connected world.

Join us at Flower Guy, where every flower tells a story, and every delivery is an opportunity to make someone's day brighter. Together, let's continue to spread love, nurture connections, and walk in beauty, one posy at a time.

Flower Guy: Crafting Bloom Bonds, Nurturing Love and Beauty in Every Bouquet and Gift.

Name: Kabék suculentas
Description:
En Kabék Suculentas creamos diseños vivos con suculentas y cactus que transforman espacios cotidianos como hogares, oficinas y dormitorios, promoviendo bienestar, conexión con la naturaleza y decoración consciente.

Ofrecemos plantas, sustratos y fertilizantes con un enfoque estético y accesible, fortaleciendo el vínculo entre el cuidado vegetal y el bienestar personal.

Nuestro vivero se encuentra en Upala, Costa Rica, un entorno rico en biodiversidad, donde es posible observar aves como los trogones, parientes del quetzal, que inspiran el espíritu de Kabék. También contamos con un punto de distribución y entregas en Santo Domingo de Heredia, facilitando el acceso a nuestros productos en otras zonas del país.

KABÉK significa quetzal en lengua cabécar, un símbolo de belleza viva, libertad y conexión con nuestras raíces naturales.

Name: Flowers Nicole
Description:
We are ethical florists, sympathetic to life’s challenges, who strive to facilitate time out in our busy lives. We offer a moment to stop, breathe and feel better about your day with the enchanting power of the humble flower. 

For our face-to-face customers who meet us at our Norwich station location, we promise to stop you in your tracks, draw you to the present moment and bring a smile to your face as you hurry through the bustle of a train station.

For our corporate customers, we endeavour to bring a sense of calm, peace and wellness to the workplace that makes your employees and customers feel genuinely valued.

For our franchisees, we offer a proven floristry business in a box that elevates your floristry skills into a flourishing clicks and bricks enterprise.

Website https://www.flowersnicole.uk/

Name: Paula's Blooming Hope
Description:
Family-owned and operated since 2016. Each week, we select freshly-grown farm sourced products to create custom arrangements for all of your floral needs.

Contact us today for holidays, birthdays, weddings, and other special events to brighten someone's day - or your own!

Description: Walter Pine is renowned for it's artfully inspired floral designs and curated selection of houseplants and gifts.  Rooted in artistry and guided by curiosity, Walter Pine is built around the belief that beauty has the power to ground us, connect us, and bring a sense of wellness to the everyday.  We're your local florist, your destination for gift giving and partner in all life's celebrated moments.

Name: Tulip Cowboy
Description:
Tulip Cowboy is a floral design studio based in Portland, Oregon. 

Founded by Emma Strgar, Tulip Cowboy seeks to bring beauty + joy through experimental public installations and interactive events. 

Tulip Cowboy is known for their Floral Rodeos which are arrangement classes that pop-up all over the city of Portland, allowing attendees to explore the city and make new friends. Additionally, Tulip Cowboy offers special orders, event design, corporate team-building, and private events. Follow us on Instagram @tulipcowboy to learn more.

Name: Dolce Flore
Description: En Dolce Floré, somos más que una tienda de flores; somos un rincón de elegancia y encanto dedicado a ofrecerte productos de la más alta calidad. Nos especializamos en embellecer tus momentos más importantes, desde eventos especiales como bodas, graduaciones, XV años, bautizos y aniversarios, hasta ese gesto especial que ilumina cualquier día ordinario. Nos enorgullece generar confianza con una atención especializada tanto para clientes minoristas como para la cobertura de eventos exclusivos. En Dolce Floré, cada día puede ser extraordinario!
Location: San Agustín Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico, Guadalajara

Name: Calathea Collection
Description:
En Calathea Collection, celebramos la belleza y la singularidad de las plantas. Somos más que una tienda de plantas; somos una comunidad apasionada por la naturaleza y el diseño, dedicada a ofrecer productos de alta calidad para aquellos que buscan embellecer sus espacios y conectar con el mundo natural.

Nos especializamos en plantas de colección, seleccionadas cuidadosamente para entusiastas y coleccionistas. Además, hemos desarrollado una línea exclusiva de productos inspirados en nuestras plantas favoritas, combinando diseño minimalista con la esencia natural de cada hoja.

¿Por qué elegirnos?
 Calidad superior: Nos enfocamos en ofrecer plantas de alta calidad.
 Diseño auténtico: Nuestros productos están inspirados en la naturaleza, diseñados para resaltar tu estilo de vida.
 Compromiso con el medio ambiente: Apostamos por prácticas sostenibles en cada aspecto de nuestro negocio.

Nuestra visión:
Crear un espacio donde la naturaleza y el diseño converjan, inspirando a nuestra comunidad a reconectar con el entorno natural.

Únete a nuestra comunidad!
Síguenos para descubrir novedades, consejos sobre el cuidado de plantas, colaboraciones exclusivas, y oportunidades para formar parte de nuestro equipo en crecimiento.

Name: Lilac and Willow Flowers
Description:
Lilac & Willow is located in the heart of Rose Bay. Our store is filled with gorgeous fresh florals, plants, orchids, vintage treasures, ceramic pots, gifts and cards for all occasions.

Whether it be a weekly house flowers, a Birthday Bouquet of Summer Peonies, a Potted Orchid, a Posy of the Softest Pink Sweet pea for your Daughter, a bunch of Hydrangea for your kitchen bench, a bunch of tulips, a Fiddle Fig for your lounge room , birthday flowers or flowers for a funerals our attention to detail and love for the flowers remains the same.

Name: Novapetal Flower Lab
Description: At Novapetal Flower Lab, our goal is to revolutionize the Arizona floral sector with our exceptional flower design, catering to both individual and B2B flowers needs. Our mission is to accentuate the beauty of nature through our creative and artistic approach to floral arrangements. Striving for excellence, we source the freshest flowers from around the globe to provide superior arrangements, plants, and home accents with a naturally wild elegance. Specializing in same day flower delivery in Phoenix and offering bespoke floral solutions for corporate events and parties, we infuse each creation with seasonal blooms, striking colors, and diverse textures. Our dedication to freshness, artistry, and swift service in Phoenix, Paradise Valley, Scottsdale, and beyond drives our innovative impact on the floral industry in Arizona.

Name: Nuwara
Description:
Nuwara is the floral ally of contemporary elegance. Co-founded by the brother-sister duo, Sara and Saad Bellakhdar, this distinct floral label is redefining the art of flower arrangements by focusing on bespoke, artful compositions.

Born from their individual creative pursuits, Nuwara is a manifestation of Saad and Sara’s passion for enhancing spaces and moments with meticulously crafted floral designs. The brand’s philosophy centers on the power of flowers to transform ordinary spaces into scenes of breathtaking beauty, emphasizing artistry and personal expression in each arrangement.

Nuwara—meaning ‘flower’ in Arabic—celebrates the delicate balance of nature and the refined craftsmanship of floral art. This is about creating connections; it’s thoughtful, aspirational, and, above all, a testament to the siblings’ commitment to elevating floral design to an art form—hence, Nuwara. The brand culture is designed to foster a deep, genuine connection between people and the natural elegance of flowers, allowing each arrangement to make a personal statement.

The creation of Nuwara was sparked by both their aligned visions and their deep-rooted understanding of the cultural and environmental impact of floral art. With years of experience in creative fields, Saad as a multi-disciplinary artist and Sara with a background in fashion and interior design, they have utilized their skills to establish a family business that embodies a shared dream.

Name: Bloom Boom Boutique Florist
Description:
Bloom Boom is where floral artistry meets experiential design. We’re a premium florist in West Hollywood that doesn’t just deliver arrangements—we create immersive experiences. From bespoke event installations and flower bars to hospitality subscriptions and hands-on workshops, we operate at the intersection of design excellence and memorable moments.

Our 620 N La Cienega Blvd location serves as both a creative studio and a 40-guest event venue, hosting everything from brand activations to micro-weddings. We’re known for our artistic approach, same-day reliability, and ability to help commemorate life's magical moments.

Name: Lily Fleur Arabia
Description: Lily Fleur is a Kuwait based luxury floral arrangements boutique founded by floral experts who offer custom Floral services for events, weddings, corporate parties and much more. Contact us today and let’s start planning your next event!

Name: florame.ai
Description: We are a technology startup transforming the floral industry, bringing innovation to a sector that has long relied on traditional models. By integrating artificial intelligence and IoT sensing technologies, we develop an intuitive, scalable, and accessible solution that recreates the authentic bouquet purchasing experience across any device, combining digital efficiency with artisanal care and emotion.

Name: Bloom Hub
Description:
About Bloom Hub Bloom Hub is a fast-growing, customer-loved flower and gift delivery service in Brisbane and the Gold Coast. We specialise in same-day delivery of fresh Flowers, Fruit Baskets, Gifts, and Plants, making every occasion memorable. 

Our Mission

 We bring beautiful moments to life through quality products, reliable delivery, and thoughtful service. Our dedicated team of florists ensures every order is carefully crafted to make someone’s day unforgettable. 

Bloom Hub Connect – Fulfilment for Florists & eCommerce 

Through Bloom Hub Connect, we provide end-to-end fulfilment solutions for florists and online businesses. From storage and packing to same-day delivery, we help brands scale efficiently while maintaining high-quality service for their customers. 

Looking Ahead: Bloom Hub continues to grow, expanding services and reach to serve more customers and partners every day.


Contact Us

 Email: hello@bloomhub.com.au
 Phone: 1300 975 399
 Website: www.bloomhub.com.au

Name: Bloemenhandel Rinus & zn
Description:
Wij hebben altijd de meest verse en sfeervolle bloemen die in ieder geval een week blijven staan!
Ook voor binnen- en buiten planten hebben wij een voorliefde!
Wij zijn, met uitzondering van maandag, alle dagen geopend vanaf 09:00 uur tot 18:00 uur.
Vanzelfsprekend zijn wij na 18:00 uur wel te bereiken voor bestellingen of bezorgingen. 
Wij bieden abonnementen aan voor zowel bedrijven als particulieren vanaf € 22,50 per week. Dit is inclusief bezorging en een eventuele leenvaas.
Bestellen en bezorgen kan via onze website, of u belt ons op. 
Een persoonlijk rouwboeket? Wij gaan graag met u in gesprek om de wensen te bespreken.

Name: Atelier Héclo
Description: fleurs de saison • plantes • accessoires

Name: Adam's Greenly S.L.
Description:
En Jardines Adam, viveristas con amplia varidad de plantas mediterráneas y ornamentales, tenemos casi 30 especies de palmeras disponibles. Cada una de ellas cuidada con la mayor dedicación por nuestro equipo de expertos en jardinería. 


Somos profesionales en servicios de poda y mantenimiento y ventas de plantas mediterráneas, ornamentales y gran variedad de frutales, con más de 18 años de experiencia en el sector. En Jardines Adam tenemos en cuenta la época o estacionalidad en la que nos encontremos, la ubicación y entorno del jardín, disponibilidad de tiempo y quién se ocupa de los cuidados del mismo, así como sus gustos o preferencias. Igualmente, podremos asesorarte sobre el riego, poda y otras tareas de mantenimiento de jardines.

Si tiene algún evento cercano, no compre plantas para unas horas o días, Viveros Adam le ofrece la posibilidad de alquilar plantas y flores naturales para todo tipo de eventos: Bodas, Congresos, Convenciones, Stands, Hoteles y cualquier otro espacio que se desee decorar para resaltar y agradar a sus invitados o clientes.

Tenemos a su disposición, una amplia variedad de plantas y flores naturales para alquiler tanto en la ciudad, como a todo el país, realizando el montaje de la cantidad que sea necesaria. Nuestro servicio de alquiler lo puede contratar por el tiempo que lo necesite, horas, días o meses… Tenemos la solución que estaba buscando.

Realizamos trabajos de paisajismo, decoración, mantenimiento de zonas verdes y tratamientos fitosanitarios. Realizamos diseño de jardines modernos y clásicos, también diseñamos sistemas de riego adaptados a las necesidades de cada tipo de  planta y optimizamos el consumo hídrico de cualquier jardín, para un menor consumo y mejor aprovechamiento.

Además, ofrecemos servicio de construcción y mantenimiento de piscinas de todo tipo, realizamos movimiento de tierras, limpieza de parcelas y solares, contamos con toda la maquinaria necesaria.

Name: Coasy
Description: Hi, we're COASY. We are trying to create a community and bring you the latest pieces from the world of minimalism.

Name: Bear Root Cottage
Description:
Welcome to Bear Root Cottage — a florist, apothecary, and gift shop rooted in grace, grown with care, and inspired by the simple beauty of connection.

We’re Malinda and Randy, partners in life and in creativity. What began as a dream to slow down and create something meaningful has blossomed into a space where artistry, intention, and community come together.

Malinda’s love for flowers runs deep — nurtured in her grandmother’s garden, where blooms and memories intertwined. After years in Information Technology, she felt called back to her roots in the Four Corners of Colorado — to family, to purpose, and to the joy of designing something beautiful by hand.

Randy’s background in IT and business intelligence brings balance to that creativity. With more than two decades spent helping organizations grow through strategy and smart systems, he now lends that same thoughtful approach to the behind-the-scenes rhythm of Bear Root Cottage — making sure every idea has the structure to flourish.

Together, we’ve built Bear Root Cottage as a reflection of what we value most: beauty, balance, and belonging. Each bouquet, remedy, and gift is crafted with intention — a small reminder that care still matters and that even the simplest things can carry deep meaning.

Here, flowers are more than decoration — they’re connection. They tell stories of love, comfort, and celebration. And just like our own story, they remind us that everything good takes root in grace.

Name: After Hours Flowers

Name: Wild Haven Flower Farm
Description: At Wild Haven Flower Farm, we cultivate a diverse range of stunning cut flowers, perfect for adding a touch of natural beauty to any occasion. Specializing in weddings, special orders, and events, we bring personalized floral arrangements to life, ensuring every bouquet reflects your unique style and vision. Experience the charm and elegance of fresh, locally-grown blooms at Wild Haven, where nature’s artistry meets your special moments.

Name: Fiorella- The Flower Boutique
Description:
Established in 2017, Fiorella – The Flower Boutique was born from a vision to elevate India's floral gifting experience to unparalleled heights. Recognizing a gap in the market for luxurious and high-quality floral offerings, we set out to redefine how flowers are gifted and appreciated. Our offerings include a diverse range of floral products, from roses and lilies to hydrangeas and sunflowers, available in bouquets, boxes, and cake boxes. We also provide specialized services such as floral décor for events and corporate gifting.
At Fiorella, we blend premium quality blooms with innovative designs to craft bespoke floral experiences that exude elegance and exclusivity. Our curated arrangements are meticulously designed to capture the essence of luxury, ensuring that every bouquet tells a unique story.
Because at Fiorella, we believe in Making Memories Unforgettable.

Name: Floralle FZ-LLC
Description: Floralle is a startup that is redefining the luxury gifting industry - through luxurious floral arrangements and other gifting items all being sold online at unbeatable prices. Whether a gift is being sold, or a floral arrangement is sought for a home or work space - Floralle is the new way to go.

Name: Fleur Studio Co
Description:
Fleur Studio Co was created to be a multi-concept location for the community. A space where you can grab flowers, have lunch meetings, grab a last-minute gift, a coffee to go or dine-in, rent out the space for your next party or learn how to make your own floral designs at one of our seasonal workshops!

We are open Tue-Fri, 12-6 pm for you to come to grab flowers, and gifts, or grab a coffee with your friends, have a work meeting or study from the shop. 
Fleur Studio also hosts seasonal floral workshops and provides private workshops/events. Additionally, Fleur Studio provides the venue and studio rentals. Host your next photo session, birthday, yoga class, or event at our spot. 

To learn more or read about our frequently asked questions, visit our website and click on FAQs.

Name: Floell
Description: Floell.dk er en dansk virksomhed, der specialiserer sig i at skabe naturtro, kunstige planter og moskunst, der bringer et strejf af natur ind i ethvert rum, uden behovet for vedligeholdelse. Med et øje for detaljer og kvalitet, tilbyder Floell.dk et bredt udvalg af kunstige planter, buketter, træer, og unikke akustik plantevægge, der passer til både private hjem og erhvervslokaler. Vores produkter er designet til at tilføje en grøn dimension til dit miljø, skabe en behagelig atmosfære, forbedre arkustikken og forbedre dit rum æstetisk, alt imens de fjerner besværet med daglig pleje. Hos Floell.dk er vi dedikerede til at bringe naturens skønhed til dig, på en bæredygtig og praktisk måde.

Name: Maua Boutique
Description:
Maua Boutique offers a thoughtfully curated collection of handmade artisan gifts and floral bouquets, each made with love in our workshop in Logan Central. 

But Maua is so much more than a gift store - it is a jobs-focused social enterprise led by young women from refugee and migrant backgrounds. Our mission is to tackle social isolation and loneliness in our communities. For every 10 bouquets or gifts sold a spot in one of our creative workshops is funded for a woman finding her feet in her new Australian life so she can connect and flourish with her community.

Name: Gadea Loreak
Description: Tienda online de referencia para comprar ramos de flores secas de alta calidad y belleza. Nuestros productos son únicos y especiales, y están inspirados en los valores de sencillez, vitalidad y tranquilidad que son tan importantes para nosotros.

Description: Wie zijn wij? Wij zijn Bloemen & Trends by Kobie, een bloemenwinkel gelegen op het station in Sittard. Wij hebben dagelijks verse snijbloemen, boeketten, diverse binnen en buitenplanten en leuke trendy woonaccessoires. Ook verzorgen wij alle soorten bloemwerk voor Bruiloften, Communie’s en Uitvaarten. Tevens leveren wij aan bedrijven dmv een zakelijk abonnement.

Name: EJB FLORISTRY

Name: Blumenladen Flora Melodie
Description:
Flora Melodie Leipzig spezialisiert sich auf die Verwandlung von Geschäftsumgebungen durch maßgeschneiderte Blumendekorationen. Unser Angebot richtet sich an Firmenkunden, die Wert auf eine ansprechende, inspirierende Atmosphäre legen. Von regelmäßigen Blumenlieferungen bis hin zu individuellen Gestaltungen für Events und Messestände, wir bieten einen umfassenden Service, der Ihr Unternehmen visuell aufwertet und eine positive Markenwahrnehmung fördert.

Für Firmenkunden: Einzigartige Blumenabonnements und Eventgestaltung
- Blumenabonnements: Beginnen Sie jede Woche mit frischer Energie. Unsere Abonnements umfassen wöchentliche Lieferungen von Blumenarrangements, die perfekt auf Ihr Firmenimage und die räumlichen Gegebenheiten abgestimmt sind. 
- Eventfloristik: Ob Firmenfeier, Produktlaunch oder Kundenevent – wir kreieren florale Highlights, die Ihr Event unvergesslich machen. 
- Messestanddekoration: Stechen Sie auf Messen mit kreativen und markengerechten Blumendekorationen hervor, die Ihre Unternehmensbotschaft unterstützen und Besucher anziehen.
- Blumengeschenke für Mitarbeiter: Zeigen Sie Wertschätzung mit individuellen Blumensträußen für Geburtstage, Jubiläen oder besondere Leistungen.

Unser Versprechen: Qualität, Kreativität und Nachhaltigkeit
Flora Melodie steht für kreative Blumenkunst und nachhaltige Praktiken. Wir nutzen saisonale und regionale Blumen, um nicht nur ästhetisch ansprechende, sondern auch umweltfreundliche Lösungen anzubieten. Unser erfahrenes Team aus Floristen arbeitet eng mit Ihnen zusammen, um Ihre Vorstellungen präzise umzusetzen und Räume in lebendige Kunstwerke zu verwandeln.

Entdecken Sie Flora Melodie Leipzig
Besuchen Sie unsere LinkedIn-Seite, um mehr über unsere speziellen Dienstleistungen für Unternehmen zu erfahren. Lassen Sie sich von unserer bisherigen Arbeit inspirieren und finden Sie heraus, wie wir auch Ihr Unternehmen mit der Kraft der Blumen bereichern können.

Name: Black Orchid Flowers
Description:
Our mission at Black Orchid flowers is to kindly use a beauty and uniqueness of every flower stem and to create a meaningful work. We are team of women that follows their dreams, desires and talent while still staying dedicated to their families, community and nature. It is hard to find a workspace of your dream, so why not to create it yourself, decided we one day! A bouquet of flowers its not just random stems tied together in bundle. It’s a message you want to share, emotion you want to gift, feeling and memory you would like to awaken. Colors, texture, fragrance. It’s an arrangement in a luxurious vase for your home decor or hand tied bouquet in a newspaper tissue you want it to be handled with love, cherish and a special touch of a knowledgeable from professional florist. We pay attention to every small detail. 
Our luxury hand-tied bouquets are made to order by our team of master florists using the freshest, seasonal flowers and combining knowledge, expertise and passionate work. Whether sending flowers within Beverly Hills or further afield across the Los Angeles, all of our bouquets are carefully wrapped and presented with a luxe notecard.

Name: EverWild Floral Studio

EverWild is a floral design studio based in Nottingham, East Midlands. I create beautiful, bespoke arrangements for weddings and special occasions, as well as corporate team building workshops and events. The floral studio is also available for private hen do and baby shower workshops.


EverWild started out as an idea: what if we could bring people together using the power of flowers? What if we could create a space where people could connect through art?

That's why EverWild is here—to use the beauty of flowers to connect people together.

Learn more about us and how we can work together here: www.everwild.shop

Name: The British Flower Club
Description:
At The British Flower Club, we believe beautiful flowers shouldn’t cost the earth. That’s why we deliver 100% British-grown flowers all year round, supporting local growers and dramatically reducing carbon emissions compared to imported blooms.
With a ‘Field to Vase’ ethos, we celebrate the changing seasons, offering fresh, fragrant, and sustainably grown flowers with 90% lower carbon emissions than imported stems. Our flexible subscription service of weekly, biweekly, or monthly deliveries brings the best of Britain’s fields straight to your door.
By choosing British flowers, you’re not just filling your home with natural beauty—you’re backing local farmers, protecting biodiversity, and making a conscious, eco-friendly choice.

Name: Flaurals
Description:
Flaurals Floristry is a bold, women-owned floral design studio rooted in the far north of Scotland. Founded by Laura Manson and based in Halkirk, Caithness, Flaurals offers fresh, creative floral design for weddings, events, and everyday moments. Hand delivered with a side of sass, care, and community spirit.

We specialise in biodegradable , sustainable floristry using seasonal blooms and plastic free packaging. Whether it’s a £10 honesty box bouquet or a stand out statement floral installation in the Highlands, each design is intentional, modern, and deeply personal. From hatboxes to “Wow” bouquets (£100+), every product reflects our commitment to accessibility and artistry.

Flaurals is best known for:
 Wedding flowers across Scotland. From wild, garden-gathered bouquets to insta worthy floral arches!
 Seasonal ranges for Mother’s Day, Valentine’s, and Pride, with local delivery
 A rotating collection of houseplants including ficus, monstera, and echeveria
 Creative collaborations with fellow Scottish brands (think: bridesmaid boxes and bespoke bud vases)
 Pay-it-forward bouquets and inclusive gifting rooted in care and community

We serve customers who want more than just flowers. They want connection, beauty, and a brand that reflects their values. Whether they’re Caithness locals picking up blooms from the honesty box or brides trusting us to bring their vision to life, we’re here to celebrate people and moments with florals that feel like them.

Get in touch via WhatsApp or DM for custom orders, wedding enquiries, or plant parenting tips. We’re always happy to help.

We also specialize in branded event favors and signage, creating custom place cards, tent cards, buffet markers, table displays, and entrance signs for corporate events, business gatherings, and personal celebrations. Name: Skötselfria Wexter AB
Description:
Vi specialiserar oss på marknadens bästa utbud av konstgjorda växter som skapar verklighetstrogna intryck och mer trivsamma miljöer. Våra produkter passar i allt från privat till offentlig miljö och med över 30 år i branschen har vi gedigen erfarenhet av att skapa konstgjorda växtlösningar till alla tänkbara miljöer. 

År 2024 förvärvades vi av företaget Redeko Flowers, detta har stärkt vårt sortiment och gett oss ännu bättre förutsättningar att erbjuda högkvalitativa och innovativa lösningar för våra kunder.

Besök gärna våra butiker på Karlbergsvägen 36 eller Nybrogatan 48 i Stockholm och utforska vårt breda sortimentet på www.wexter.se eller www.redekoflowers.se. 

Vi erbjuder kostnadsfri konsultation vilket innebär att vi kommer ut på plats och kommer med idéer till kund på passande växter och tillhörande krukor. Vi sköter allt från planering till plantering/ montering. Vi erbjuder snabb leverans, flexibilitet och ett trevligt bemötande. 

Välkommen att låta det grönska i ditt hem eller företag med Wexter och Redeko Flowers!

Name: Madame Alice fleuriste
Description:
Madame Alice Fleuriste - Fleuriste écoresponsable à Québec. Bouquets uniques avec fleurs locales et verdure abondante. Livraison gratuite (50$ et +) dans Québec, y compris Charlesbourg (fleuriste près de Charlesbourg). Satisfaction garantie ou argent remis ! Démarche artistique axée sur l'utilisation de la nature et des textures pour des compositions florales naturelles. Bouquets personnalisés, des camaïeux harmonieux, des palette de couleurs élégantes. Explorez des noms évocateurs tels que "Bouquet Couché de Soleil" ou "Bord de Mer" avec nous. Choix de fleurs locales. Exprimez vos émotions à travers des bouquets uniques qui racontent votre histoire. Expérience florale artistique et exceptionnelle chez Mme Alice Fleuriste à Limoilou.

Elle s'amuse quelque fois à courir les marchés et à offrir des ateliers humoristiques et créatifs. Finalement, Madame Alice est une véritable maniaque de plantes vertes et saura certainement vous conseiller sur l'entretien et la gestion de vos petits amis verts.

Description: Founded by Ayesha Merchant, Floral Rush specializes in floral decor. An experienced, full-time florist. Name: Musketier Blumen GmbH
Description:
What started in 1995 with three people and one sales vehicle has grown over the years into a tightknit family firm with four sales vehicles and direct deliveries from the Netherlands six days a week. As the prime flower supplier for the Swiss market, every day a small team looks for the most exclusive and best quality cut flowers. That the customer is key is perfectly normal for everyone at Musketier.

Musketier’s strength? An extensive and high-quality assortment. And the aim to deliver 100% fresh products. Thanks to our extensive knowledge and good connections, we can supply the best quality of cut flowers. Much may have changed over the years, but the core values of ‘service & quality’ have remained the same.

Kate Hill Flowers, an esteemed name in Melbourne's flower gifting and wedding florist, established in 2007. 

Kate Hill is renowned for her impeccable style, quality and attention to detail. For over 20 years Kate Hill Flowers has worked tirelessly to build an unrivalled reputation in Melbourne as master wedding florists and masters of luxury floral gifts. 

Our boutique retail store located in Melbourne, Victoria, specialises in crafting luxurious floral gifts for life's most special occasions. 

From retail gifting to exquisite wedding flowers, styling, and planning, we infuse every creation with our unique contemporary style. 

Our commitment to quality ensures the very freshest and finest blooms in Melbourne. 

Our passionate team of designers pours love into every arrangement, just as we do for our cherished customers. 

We deliver across all Melbourne metro areas, making gifting easy. Experience and fall in love with Kate Hill Flowers.

Name: Tutta Bella Florist
Description:
Tutta Bella Florist - Where our standard is excellence and “All Things
Beautiful.” For over 25 years, we have been among the leading names in high-end, custom floral design, serving the Inland Empire and beyond. Specializing exclusively in weddings, corporate events, funerals, and special occasions, our team of expert floral designers are dedicated to turning your vision into a spectacular reality. At Tutta Bella Florist we understand that each event is unique, and we pride ourselves on delivering a personal touch to your vision. Our skilled artisans work closely with each client to craft bespoke floral designs that not only meet but exceed expectations. Whether it’s an opulent wedding, a black-tie corporate gathering, or a heartfelt funeral/celebration of life, we are committed to providing unparalleled service and stunning floral displays.
Come and discover why we are the number one choice in the Inland Empire for luxury floral design. Let us bring beauty, style, and creativity to your next event.

Description:

EverWild has a unique model, eliminating the common waste of most floral shops by allowing you to order by size and have the freshest in-season flowers delivered same day or on a subscription basis.

Visit www.EverWildFlorals.com/Story to shop and learn more!

Name: Le temps des Flœurs
Description:
Chez Le Temps des Flœurs, nous sommes convaincus que chaque bouquet peut faire du bien : à ceux qui l’offrent, à ceux qui le reçoivent et à ceux qui le créent.

Nos distributeurs automatiques de fleurs, installés dans les lieux du quotidien (gares, centres commerciaux, hôpitaux, bureaux…), rendent le plaisir d’offrir accessible à toute heure.
Nos bouquets sont confectionnés avec soin par des personnes en situation de handicap, au sein d’ateliers d’insertion.
Chaque composition soutient ainsi une double mission : rendre les fleurs plus accessibles et favoriser la réinsertion professionnelle.

 Nos engagements :

Des fleurs fraîches, séchées, de saison et accessibles (à partir de 11,99 €)
Des distributeurs élégants et autonomes en énergie
Un impact social concret au service d’une société plus inclusive

Ensemble, faisons fleurir les lieux de vie. 
Contactez-nous pour accueillir un distributeur dans votre espace !

Name: All The Flowers
Description:
Nachhaltiger und regionaler Blumenanbau – Blumen aus der Region.

All The Flowers bringt nachhaltige Floristik in Ihr Unternehmen. Auf unserer Farm nahe Berlin wachsen Blumen ganz ohne Pestizide, Monokulturen oder beheizte Gewächshäuser. Unser wöchentliches Blumenabo bietet eine stilvolle und umweltfreundliche Alternative zu herkömmlichen Schnittblumen. 

Unsere saisonalen, regionalen Bouquets sind nicht nur ästhetisch ansprechend, sondern verkürzen durch kurze Transportwege den ökologischen Fußabdruck Ihres Unternehmens.

Unsere Philosophie: Blumen von hier
Wir stehen für Regionalität und Nachhaltigkeit. Unsere Blumen werden mit Liebe zur Natur angebaut und gestaltet – ohne lange Transportwege und ohne intensiven Ressourcenverbrauch.

Unsere Mission: Natur in den Arbeitsalltag bringen
Mit All The Flowers setzen Sie ein grünes Statement: frische, langlebige Blumen, die Ihren Arbeitsplatz verschönern und gleichzeitig Ihre Umweltbilanz verbessern.

Name: CRAZYFLORA
Description:
Crazyflora is a Bengaluru-based leader in the plant and flower industry, serving residential, corporate, and institutional clients across India since 1998. We specialize in the supply, trade, manufacturing, import, and export of fresh flowers, orchids, a diverse range of indoor and outdoor plants, premium planters, high-quality seeds, organic fertilizers, and professional gardening tools. As one of the country’s top online plant nurseries and gardening suppliers, Crazyflora is recognized for delivering exceptional value, reliability, and curated green solutions for every need.

For more than 25 years, our team of horticultural experts has provided access to rare and exotic plant varieties, advanced terrarium solutions, and tailored advice for both casual gardeners and seasoned professionals. We are particularly known for our innovative terrarium workshops, which blend creativity, wellness, and hands-on learning—ideal for corporate teams, schools, and community groups seeking immersive experiences. Our commitment extends beyond products: we offer exclusive offers, garden care guidance, and support for sustainable, eco-friendly gardening practices. Whether you are looking for office plants, gift solutions, or specialty workshops, Crazyflora is a trusted partner for transforming any space with greenery.

To connect, explore our online store, or learn more about our plant solutions and terrarium workshops, visit www.crazyflora.com or contact +91 74115 00651.

Name: Tania.T Créations
Description:
Ma mission: donner vie à des créations en fleurs naturelles stabilisées. Je dis créations car elles peuvent prendre de nombreuses formes : bouquets, compositions, tableaux, couronnes, suspensions, etc.

Ces créations trouvent leur place et valorisent n’importe quel lieu : pour réchauffer l'ambiance d'un lieu d'accueil, pour végétaliser un bureau, pour apporter calme et douceur à une salle de réunion, pour décorer une table, etc.

Je travaille pour des professionnels : hôtels, restaurants, entreprises, commerces.

Mon objectif est que vous puissiez trouver LA création qui vous convient le mieux : soit au travers des créations présentées, soit grâce à une création personnalisée. 
Il est également d'apporter, au travers de mes compositions, tous les bienfaits que mes balades en Cévennes me procurent: beauté, poésie, apaisement, bien-être et calme.

Bien entendu, je crée et je compose intégralement ma collection et j'utilise au maximum des végétaux français.

Au travers de cette aventure, j'aimerais mettre en lumière plusieurs valeurs qui me sont chères:
- l'écologie et plus encore le respect de la nature dans son intégralité
- le upcycling
- le reusing

Je me ferai un plaisir de vous orienter et vous conseiller si vous en avez besoin alors n’hésitez pas à me contacter.

Name: Florăria EMA Focșani
Description:
We firmly believe that flowers are more than just gifts. They are gestures, declarations, silent messengers of the most sincere thoughts, especially when words are not enough. This was the spark that ignited everything back in February 2010: the desire to offer our community in Focșani an authentic way to create precious emotions and memories. This is how Florăria EMA was born—a real, local flower shop in the heart of Vrancea, Romania.

We are a family business, a team of passionate florists who, for over 15 years, have dedicated thousands of hours to perfecting our craft. Every bouquet you see is an extension of this passion, handcrafted in our own workshop at 23 Ștefan cel Mare Street. For us, transparency is fundamental. That's why all our creations are photographed by us, ensuring that 'what you see is exactly what you get.' We are not an impersonal platform that just takes orders; we are the artisans who listen to your story and translate it into a floral arrangement.

Our journey has been one of constant growth. From our physical shop opened in 2010, we took the step online in 2012 with ematoader.ro, and the experience we gained even allowed us to develop national platforms. However, our roots remain firmly planted here. Every order, whether placed online or directly in our shop, is treated with the same responsibility: it is received, created, and delivered entirely by our own staff, ensuring your message reaches its destination in the best possible condition.

Our mission is to be your trusted partner for all the moments that matter—from bouquets that celebrate a birthday, to corporate arrangements that define a company's image, or event decorations that turn a special day into an unforgettable one.

We deliver fresh flowers and smiles throughout Focșani and the entire Vrancea county.

We invite you to step into our shop or explore our world online. Let's create beautiful gestures together!

Name: Wildflowers LLC
Description:
Wildflowers stands as a leading St. Louis florist, extending nearly three decades of dedicated service to the local community. Renowned for our exquisite floral designs, we craft captivating, garden-inspired arrangements suitable for both everyday moments and special occasions.

Our expertise spans a diverse range of floral services, including daily arrangements, funeral tributes, wedding bouquets, holiday decor, and large-scale event embellishments. At Wildflowers, we take pride in transforming spaces and events with the enchanting allure of flowers.

Beyond our commitment to artistic excellence, we are passionate about giving back to our community. Through volunteer efforts and flower donations, we contribute to various community events throughout the year, spreading the joy and beauty of nature.

Environmental responsibility is at the core of our values. Wildflowers actively participates in sustainable practices by composting organic materials and prioritizing recycling. In our dedication to eco-conscious clientele, we collaborate with local flower growers, ensuring a responsible and earth-friendly approach to the floral experience. Choose Wildflowers for not just stunning blooms but also a commitment to community, nature, and sustainability.

Excitingly, Wildflowers is embarking on a new chapter by delving into the cultivation of our own flowers. This venture represents a significant step towards enhancing our commitment to sustainability and ensuring the freshest blooms for our valued clients. By cultivating flowers in-house, we aim to exert greater control over the quality and variety of our floral offerings, fostering a deeper connection between our clients and the beauty of locally grown blooms. This initiative aligns seamlessly with our dedication to environmental stewardship, further reducing our ecological footprint and promoting a more sustainable floral experience. Stay tuned as Wildflowers nurtures this budding endeavor, bringing forth a harves

Name: Roxy Flowers
Description:
Roxy Flowers Design te ajută să alegi florile potrivite și aranjamentele florale unice pe care ți le dorești. Echipa noastră de designeri florali lucrează minuțios la cele mai mici detalii și vine în întâmpinarea ta cu aranjamente într-o gamă variată de stiluri de prezentare. Succint și profesionist: cele mai frumoase, naturale, proaspete, exotice, cu un colorit captivant, speciale și personalizate pentru fiecare client în parte. Te așteptăm cu drag în showroom-ul nostru sau ți le putem livra, cu bucurie, rapid, oricând ne contactezi.

Din dorința de a îți fi mai aproape, în mod natural, suntem acum și online, la un click distanță de tine și de cei dragi ție, gata de a-ți aduce ceea ce îți dorești, așa cum îți dorești.

Povestea Noastră
Și iată-ne bucuroși să ne prezentăm! Am înflorit frumos, am putea spune. Celebrăm 2 ani de când am deschis această florărie, având o experiență vastă de peste 20 de ani, cu entuziasm, cu pasiune pentru flori și design floral, cu zâmbetul pe buze, având convingerea că florile merită și că noi merităm, spunând atunci un mare „da” unor angajamente dintre cele mai importante: să facem să înflorească voie bună și zâmbete pe chipurile tuturor celor care vor vrea flori alături de ei în momentele importante. Întotdeauna am simțit că ne putem exprima mai bine prin mesajul florilor decât prin cuvinte. Coloritul? Superb și atât de simbolic! Poate fi roșu căpșuniu, trandafiriu, cărămiziu, rubiniu, pinot, sângeriu, rumen, incandescent, amurg, pentru că viața florilor înseamnă belșug, diversitate, autenticitate. Preferatul tău? Al ei? Al nostru? Încercăm să prezentăm culoarea din povestea noastră și prin câteva cuvinte, pentru că roșul e mai roșu atunci când știi să-l aranjezi. Mai departe? Creativi fiind, vă punem la dispoziție Frumosul așa cum îl vedem noi, mereu special și totodată atât de simplu, firesc și emoționant. Ne dorim să contribuim la experiențe frumoase și profunde, să vă oferim o parte din decorul unei povești în care să vă regăsiți

Name: El Jardín de Doña Olga
Description:
Somos una boutique especializada en jardinería y arte con plantas, ubicada en Cartago y parte del Grupo Empresarial Castillo Viera desde 2017. Nos dedicamos a crear piezas únicas de arte con plantas, como terrarios, kokedamas, arreglos con suculentas, cuadros vivos, mini jardines y plantas de interior en macetas decorativas, entre otros productos. También ofrecemos talleres de jardinería y arte con plantas dirigidos a niños, adultos y empresas.

Adicionalmente, brindamos el servicio de decoración de interiores y exteriores con plantas, transformando espacios en ambientes llenos de vida, armonía y belleza natural. Nuestros proyectos están diseñados para realzar la estética y crear una conexión con la naturaleza en cualquier entorno.

Nuestros productos y servicios no solo embellecen los espacios, sino que también aportan beneficios emocionales, como la reducción del estrés, la mejora del bienestar, el fomento de la creatividad y la conexión con la naturaleza. Al integrar la belleza de las plantas en el día a día, ayudamos a crear ambientes más relajantes y armoniosos.

Nuestra experiencia trasciende fronteras, habiendo impartido talleres en Costa Rica, Venezuela, Panamá, Guatemala y Estados Unidos, promoviendo la conexión con la naturaleza a través de la creatividad y el diseño.

Name: Flores Solidarias
Description:
En Flores Solidarias nos definimos como empresa social porque nuestra esencia está en transformar el trabajo en oportunidades reales para personas en situación de exclusión social.

Nuestra seña de identidad es unir belleza, propósito e impacto social a través de flores sostenibles, empleo digno y alianzas con empresas que quieren dejar huella real.

Nos mueve un compromiso claro: ofrecer productos y servicios que emocionen, inspiren orgullo y sumen impacto social, mientras ayudamos a empresas a cumplir sus objetivos ESG, fortalecer su cultura interna y conectar propósito y acción.

 ¿Qué experiencia tenemos?
Nacimos en Valencia en 2024 con un propósito ambicioso: DEMOSTRAR QUE UNA FLOR PUEDE CAMBIAR UNA VIDA.

En menos de un año hemos generado empleo digno para personas en exclusión, colaborado con agricultores locales y establecido alianzas con empresas comprometidas.
Ofrecemos.
•	suscripciones de flores para oficinas
•	regalos corporativos con propósito
•	decoración de eventos 
•	activaciones de marca conscientes, trabajando codo a codo con departamentos de RSC, ESG, RRHH, marketing y eventos.

 ¿Cómo trabajamos?
Combinamos excelencia artesanal, compromiso social y sostenibilidad ambiental.

Nuestros ramos se preparan con flores locales de kilómetro cero, nuestros equipos reciben formación y acompañamiento, y nuestras colaboraciones con empresas están diseñadas para ser prácticas, emocionales y medibles.
Cada 100 suscripciones permiten crear 1 empleo estable.

Cada colaboración suma al cambio: no es solo estética, es impacto social corporativo tangible.

 ¿Te unes al impacto social con propósito?
Escríbenos y te ayudaremos a crear un proyecto de flores con propósito para tu empresa: suscripciones, regalos, activaciones, eventos o cualquier propuesta que sume belleza, valores y compromiso.
 info@floressolidarias.com
 www.floressolidarias.com

#floressolidarias #impactosocialcorporativo #proveedoresconpropósito #employerbrandingemocional #activacionesdemarca

Name: VIPLANT - Viveiros e Garden Centres
Description:
A VIPLANT despontou em 1988 para responder à falta de produção de plantas ornamentais em território nacional. Fruto do empreendedorismo de dois grandes amigos, veio complementar o seu negócio de construção de jardins com o nome Viplant Viveiros do Algarve, instalando-se na localidade de Paderne.

Nos anos seguintes, graças a projetos de escala cada vez maior, onde se destaca a Expo 98, a VIPLANT vai crescendo e adaptando-se ao mercado. Os anos 2000 viram uma crescente procura por plantas ornamentais e, com ela, o florescer dos dois Garden Centres: em Oeiras e em Vilamoura. Aqui, pela primeira vez, todos os clientes – privados e profissionais – podem adquirir ou alugar diretamente plantas, acessórios de jardinagem, vasos, floreiras e artigos de decoração.

No final da década, a crise de 2008 tornou-se uma oportunidade para inovar e apostar no desenvolvimento tecnológico, o que permitiu abrir os horizontes da exportação. Através desta estratégia e com uma forte visão para a marca VIPLANT, esta tem continuado a crescer forte e com novos ramos a desabrochar.

Nos últimos anos, a VIPLANT cresceu em direção aos pedidos dos clientes e lançou o serviço VIPLANT Online para trazer a sua experiência de qualidade, proximidade e conhecimento à Loja Online. Contamos com mais de 100 variedades de plantas com distribuição para toda a Europa.

Name: AnthemionFlowers
Description:
Αποστολή λουλουδιών | Ανθοπωλείο στην Αθήνα
H παράδοση λουλουδιών σήμερα είναι πιο εύκολη, γρήγορη και οικονομική από ποτέ. Σίγουρα θα έχετε αναρωτηθεί - υπάρχει ανθοπωλείο κοντά μου; - το ανθοπωλείο μας θα φέρει τα λουλούδια που θα επιλέξετε στο σπίτι σας με δωρεάν μεταφορικά. Μιά ανθοδέσμη με τριαντάφυλλα είναι μια κλασσική επιλογή που μπορείτε να ευχηθείτε στην επέτειο σας. Πρωτότυπα δώρα για τον άντρα ή τη γυναίκα σας που θα εντυπωσιάσουν,ευχηθείτε χρόνια πολλά σε έναν αγαπημένο φίλο ή φίλη σας στα γενέθλια τους. Σίγουρα θα θέλετε να δείξετε τον ενθουσιασμό σας για τη γέννηση ενός νεογέννητου μωρού ή να ευχηθείτε με ένα επαγγελματικό δώρο σε κάποιον συνεργάτη σας. Μπορείτε να διαλέξετε απο τη τεράστια συλλογή μας που ανανεώνεται συνεχώς το δικό σας προσωπικό δώρο με λουλούδια και να εντυπωσιάσετε τον παραλήπτη σας.

Το ανθοπωλείο μας βρίσκεται στο Αιγάλεω και λειτουργεί από το 1992,πραγματοποιεί αποστολή λουλουδιών στην Αθήνα,σε όλες τις περιοχές της Ελλάδας και σε όλο το κόσμο.Εξυπηρετούμε την Αθήνα με αυθημερόν αποστολή λουλουδιών με ιδιόκτητα μέσα για να σας παρέχουμε τις καλύτερες υπηρεσίες. Στην υπόλοιπη Ελλάδα και στο εξωτερικό πραγματοποιούμε αποστολές λουλουδιών μέσω ενός εξαιρετικού δικτύου ανθοπωλών.

Στο online anthemionflowers θα βρείτε τα ποιοτικότερα λουλούδια όπως τριαντάφυλλα ecuador,οριεντάλ λίλιουμ,ορχιδέες,αλστρομέριες,ζέρμπερες,ηλίανθους,τουλίπες,παιώνιες κλπ σε πόλλες χρωματικές αποχρώσεις. Μπορούμε μαζί να σχεδιάσουμε τη δική σας ανθοδέσμη σύμφωνα με τα δικά σας γούστα και όπως το έχετε φανταστεί. Επίσης στο ανθοπωλείο μας θα βρείτε φυτά που θα προσφέρουν μια υπέροχη διακόσμηση στον προσωπικό ή επαγγελματικό σας χώρο.

Name: Daily Flowers
Description:
Daily Flowers is de eerste luxe bloemenformule van Nederland, met een duidelijke missie: bloemen van topkwaliteit op elk moment van de dag beschikbaar maken.
Onze kern ligt in de Automated Flower Stores (AFS). Dit zijn slimme, gekoelde bloemenautomaten die 24/7 verse boeketten aanbieden op high-traffic locaties in heel Nederland. Van winkelcentra en tankstations tot hotels en OV-knooppunten: de AFS zorgt voor maximale beschikbaarheid met minimale verspilling, dankzij technologie zoals dynamic pricing en realtime monitoring.
Naast ons snelgroeiende AFS-netwerk hebben we een fysieke flagshipstore op het Gelderlandplein in Amsterdam-Zuid. Hier komen kwaliteit, beleving en klantcontact samen.
Achter Daily Flowers staat een jong en gedreven team dat innovatie in de bloemenbranche versnelt. In 2025 breiden we uit naar meer dan 100 locaties. We bouwen aan langdurige samenwerkingen met vastgoedpartijen, retailomgevingen en andere partners die geloven in een vernieuwende, schaalbare en hoogwaardige manier van bloemverkoop.
Daily Flowers – altijd het juiste moment.

"ლილიუმი" არის ადგილი, სადაც ყოველი ყვავილი განსაკუთრებულია,

ლილიუმში, თქვენ იპოვით მრავალფეროვან არჩევანს ახალი, სურნელოვანი და ლამაზი ყვავილების კომპოზიციას, რომლებიც სიყვარულით და პროფესიონალიზმით არიან შექმნილნი. "ლილიუმში" ჩვენ ვიცით, რომ თითოეული ყვავილი არის განსაკუთრებული და შეუძლია თქვენი ემოციების, გრძნობებისა და სურვილების გამოხატვა.

რას გთავაზობთ "ლილიუმში"?

ახალი და ხარისხიანი ყვავილები: ჩვენი ყვავილები ყოველდიურად განახლდება, რათა უზრუნველვყოთ საუკეთესო ხარისხი და სიჯანსაე.
შესანიშნავი ბუკეტები და კომპოზიციები: ჩვენთვის მნიშვნელოვანია, რომ ყოველ შეკვეთაზე განსაკუთრებულად დავზრუნოთ, ამიტომ ჩვენი ფლორისტები ქმნიან უნიკალურ და შემოქმედებით ბუკეტებს.
სპეციალური ონისძიებების გაფორმება: საქორწილო ცერემონიები, დაბადების დეები, კორპორატიული ონისძიებები - ჩვენ შევქმნით შესანიშნავ დეკორს ნებისმიერი შემთხვევისთვის.
მიწოდების სერვისი: სწრაფი და მოსახერხებელი მიწოდება თქვენს სასურველ ადგილზე.
ჩვენი მიზანია, რომ "ლილიუმის" ყოველი სტუმარი იყოს ბედნიერი და კმაყოფილი. ჩვენთან ყვავილების შეძენა - ეს არის არა მხოლოდ პროდუქტის მიება, არამედ მთელი ემოციური გამოცდილება, რომელიც თქვენს გულში დარჩება.

მობრძანდით "ლილიუმში" და ამოაჩინეთ სილამაზის და სიყვარულის სამყარო ჩვენს ყვავილებთან ერთად!

Name: Fleuritel
Description:
Fleuritel est un fleuriste de renom basé à Casablanca depuis 1999. Nous sommes spécialisés dans la décoration florale pour les événements, mariages, salles de réunion, compositions de fleurs pour toutes les occasions et bien plus encore. Nous sommes le leader dans notre secteur d'activité et sommes reconnus comme l'artisan fleuriste de référence à Casablanca depuis plus de 20 ans.

Nous sommes fiers de fournir à nos clients des fleurs et des feuillages de la plus grande exploitation florale du Maroc chaque jour, ainsi que d'importer directement certaines fleurs d'Amérique du Sud ou de Hollande. Chez Fleuritel, nous avons une passion pour la création de designs floraux uniques et de qualité qui ajoutent une touche d'élégance et de sophistication à chaque événement.

Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour comprendre leurs besoins et leurs préférences afin de créer des arrangements floraux sur mesure qui reflètent leur style et leur personnalité. Notre équipe de professionnels expérimentés s'engage à offrir un service exceptionnel et une attention personnalisée à chaque client.

Choisir Fleuritel, c'est choisir la qualité, l'innovation et la créativité dans la conception florale pour rendre votre événement inoubliable.

Nous sommes fiers de compter parmi nos clients des entreprises de premier plan ainsi que des particuliers. Notre expérience nous permet de créer des designs floraux qui répondent aux exigences de chaque client, que ce soit pour un mariage, une soirée d'entreprise ou un événement privé.

Notre équipe passionnée est composée de professionnels qualifiés et créatifs qui ont une grande connaissance des fleurs et des tendances actuelles. Nous sommes constamment à la recherche de nouvelles idées et de nouveaux designs pour offrir à nos clients des arrangements floraux innovants et exceptionnels.

Name: EVIGR
Description:
Evigr jobber for å redusere flytrafikk ved å spesialisere seg på snittblomstindustrien, en stor kilde til globale CO2-utslipp. En betydelig del av verdens flytrafikk skyldes transport av ferske blomster, som ofte krever kjøling. Svinn er et stort problem, men det er uklart hvor mye som må kastes før produktene når butikk.

Vi benytter biotech-botanikk transportert med båt og bil, som varer 50-150 ganger lenger enn flytransporterte blomster. Vårt smarte sirkulære rotasjonssystem fremmer gjenbruk i bedriftsabonnementet vårt, samtidig som det reduserer CO2-utslipp med minst 98% og eliminerer i tillegg forbruket.

Evigr vektlegger bærekraft i alle ledd, fra produksjon til transport, kvalitet, emballasje og gjenbruk. Vi tilbyr rimelige priser, noe som gjør bærekraft til et lønnsomt valg.

Vårt bedriftsabonnement, "Four Seasons of Norway," er genialt for bedrifter som ønsker seg noe vakkert for å ønske kunder og ansatte velkommen, men samtidig tar hensyn til miljøet. Fremfor kjøp og kast av forbruksvarer leier vi ut blomster og kundene våre får levert nye design hver måned tilpasset de fire norske sesongene, samt deres interiør.

Vi tilbyr også plante og tre-avtaler, samt at vi heldekorer næringslokaler med permanenete dekorasjoner, slik som mosevegger og plantevegger. Velger man å benytte våre planter fremfor planteservice-avtaler reduseres også CO2-utslipp ved at man elimenerer behovet for ukentlig/månedlig vanning og stell og på denne måten reduserer kjøring. Det kan også være utfordrende å holde tropiske planter i Norge med tanke på lys, temperatur og luftfuktighet. Dette problemet utgår med våre produkter, da de uansett holder seg friske.

Evigr tar et proaktivt skritt for å redusere utfordringene i snittblomstindustrien, bidrar til å redusere belastningen på luftfarten, og fremmer en mer bærekraftig fremtid.

Learn how to make a handheld bouquet called a Tussie Mussie, create your own freestyle floral arrangement or sign up for an advanced floral masterclass.

Whether you’re booking a floral workshop for two or a team building experience for 20, our incredible staff will make sure you have an unforgettable experience!

Want to create an experience for your guests that’s not on our menu? We have decades of luxury event planning experience – speak to us about creating a unique event that’s perfect for you.

Capetonians’ stress levels have shot up 56% since the start of lockdown. Visit Flower Café and embrace the restorative power of flowers to decelerate and unwind. The Cape’s best local blossoms are delivered directly from the flower farm to our door and immediately stored in our cold room. That means you’ll enjoy their beauty in your home for even longer. Our floral artists will also teach you pro tips on how to care for your cut flowers: when you know how to look after your flowers, they always show their appreciation!

Flower Café guests leave our floral workshops sparkly-eyed and more connected with themselves.

Name: Dutch Floral Stories
Description:
Dutch Floral Stories was founded in 2022 with a vision to become a leader in Sustainable Luxury Haute Couture Silk Florals that are indistinguishable from real cut flowers. The refined florals inspired by Dutch Baroque still life paintings breathe elegance and sophistication and reflect an earth-friendly way of pursuing impeccable beauty as an art of living. We strive for high-quality, tailored, timeless, exquisite arrangements designed to guarantee satisfaction over time in the hope of creating a legacy.

Every arrangement becomes a timeless and unique experience of guaranteed beauty that lasts forever and will look its absolute best all year round, allowing you to significantly reduce costs while quickly and easily changing the appearance to different seasons to evoke new emotions and memories that honour the beautiful yet unique spirit of nature. At Dutch Floral Stories, we aim to leave an everlasting impression.

We are uncompromising when it comes to environmental responsibility. We have found unique bespoke sustainable answers for Hotel lobbies, rooms and suites, (private) airlines, (private) yachts’, medical- dental-and aesthetic centers, universities, wedding venues and other events but not limited to. Our high-end creations have no shelf life and are waste-pesticide- water- emission-CO2- bacteria-allergy and carefree. We implemented sustainability instead of relying on outdated methods, and as a result, we deliver long-lasting high-end green solutions while preserving our planet’s limited resources.

I always had an intrinsic motivation to bring rule-breaking beauty from the heart through art, writing and music in a longing to connect with others. This modern story is the living tale of  “Living Life in Bloom”.

Margot De Ruiter Hooykaas, Founder & Createur

Name: La petite abeille
Description:
La petite abeille, 100% fleurs françaises , élabore avec amour des créations végétales sur mesure pour vous, vos proches, vos équipes et vos clients. Nous livrons en mains propres et envoyons nos fleurs, partout en France. 


Redonner leur parfum aux fleurs ! 
La petite abeille est née d'une rencontre et d'une envie. 
Nous sommes toutes les deux des femmes passionnées, amoureuses de la nature, de ses parfums divins et en quête permanente de nouveaux producteurs, de nouvelles fleurs - qu’elles soient de jardin, étranges ou grandioses, nous jouons avec elles pour vous émerveiller-, de nouvelles plantes et d'objets de décoration pour que perdure le plaisir de vos sens, la joie du beau, l'élan du partage.

Le spécialiste des fleurs françaises à Bourgoin-Jallieu
Toutes nos fleurs coupées sont françaises, même les plus époustouflantes. Produites, pour la plupart, dans la région lyonnaise et le Var. Ce qui leur permet de durer plus longtemps en vase, chez vous, chez vos proches, chez vos clients, chez vos partenaires, et sur votre lieu de travail.  
Et nous vous faisons découvrir, tous les jours, des fleurs avec leur parfum naturel, préservé, tour à tour délicat ou envoûtant, selon les variétés et les semaines.  

Bien sûr, travailler des fleurs françaises, c'est aussi un choix fort, disons même un défi que nous relevons pour préserver notre belle planète. 
Nous voulons faire ce métier de coeur de la manière la plus éco-responsable possible.  

Amoureuses de la nature nous adorons aussi comprendre votre envie, votre projet, vos besoins, et créer, en équipe, pour vous et avec vous, le décor floral et végétal qui vous parle.  

Tous vos projets sont pour nous uniques, et les destinataires de nos créations et de nos services des personnes à choyer.

La petite abeille - Fleuriste
Sarra Bontempi et Juliette Saragoussi

Name: Bloemen Aan De Deur
Description:
Verras je medewerkers of klanten met een prachtig boeket of een super mooie bos bloemen voor het weekend. Bedank ze voor de goede samenwerking of de prachtige kwartaal- of jaarcijfers; vier samen met je klanten en personeel een speciaal jubileum of gewoon omdat het kan en ontzettend leuk is om bloemen cadeau te geven.

Wij leveren de bloemen bij jou aan de (bedrijfs)deur, zodat je het fleurige cadeautje persoonlijk kan overhandigen aan je medewerkers of klanten. Afleveren bij de klant of thuis afleveren bij ieder personeelslid is ook mogelijk. 

Wil jij een keer iets positiefs, kleurrijk, fleurig en vrolijk cadeau doen? Kies dan voor de boeketten- en bloemenservice van Bloemen Aan De Deur.

Mail naar info@bloemenaandedeur.nl of bel 06-248 28 112 voor meer informatie en vraag naar de mogelijkheden voor jouw bedrijf. Of bezoek onze site: https://bloemenaandedeur.nl/zakelijk

Name: Shakespeare Fleur
Description: Shakespeare fleur has been UAE leading online florist to deliver quality fresh flowers and beautiful gifts. To ensure that you and your recipients receive only the freshest flowers, we only source directly from reputable farms. Our quality blooms like roses, lilies, sunflowers, gerberas, orchids, hydrangeas and tulips, are flown in daily to ensure freshness. When placed in the trustworthy hands of our skillful florists, they transform into stunning floral arrangements that inject life to any room and delight all who lay eyes on them. To that, the perfect pairing would be a thoughtful gift hamper. Well-known gourmet treats, new-born baby and wellness products form indulgent hampers to celebrate all of life’s precious moments, and seasonal occasions like Christmas, Chinese New Year, Mother’s Day and Valentine's Day. Regardless of the occasion and season, young or old, we will always have a little surprise in store to Make Someone Smile Today.

Name: House of Silky Flowers ꕤ
Description:
Silk Flower Arranger | Floral Design | Event & Wedding Styling

House of Silky Flowers creates timeless floral statements using luxury silk flowers and plants. Founded by Stella Koedam, we blend aesthetics, atmosphere and craftsmanship into bespoke concepts for interiors, events and celebrations — always elegant, always personal. 

We design, rent and sell high-end silk flower creations for private and corporate clients. From subtle accents to immersive floral environments, every design elevates a space and tells a story.

Personal Styling & Custom Design Plans

Every project starts with a conversation. Our designers take the time to understand your space, purpose and desired atmosphere. From there, we create a tailor-made styling plan considering scale, color palette, textures, seasonality and surrounding interiors.

From concept to execution, we personally style every project on location, ensuring seamless, refined results. No standard solutions — only custom-made designs that feel effortless and leave a lasting impression.

From subtle details to full experiences

A small silk arrangement on a kitchen island, a bold flower wall at a hotel entrance, or a fully styled dinner, wedding or corporate event — our creations can transform any space into a unique floral experience.

Event & Party Styling 

We design everything from elegant table styling to themed celebrations, birthdays, jubilees, high teas and full-service events, creating floral moments that elevate every occasion.

Silk Flowers & Plants for Businesses 

Our premium silk flowers add freshness, sophistication and consistency to offices, restaurants, hotels and retail spaces, giving every room a luxurious wow-factor.

We’d love to schedule a no-obligation (online) introduction to explore the possibilities together.

Name: Giraffe Flowers | Giraffe Plants | Giraffe Christmas
Description:
Giraffe was born in March 2014 by a passionate ex-hotelier, who wanted to combine the ‘event supplier’ offering with a ‘hotel customer service’ attitude. Over 10 years later and Giraffe is now one of the best-known and respected florists and décor brands in Manchester.

We are known not only for our creativity, but also for our ‘can-do’ attitude. Great customer service is at the core of our business, and rather than being ‘just another supplier’, our aim is always to become an extension of the venue team we work with.
Based in our creative studio, we have a dedicated team consisting of excellent florists, as well as a specialist plant and Christmas teams.

You can find out more about our services at www.giraffeflowers.co.uk or follow us on social media to see our latest creations

Aqui, tudo são flores

Name: O'Nora LLC
Description: O'Nora LLC began as an idea for a modern, online flower delivery startup. But we quickly saw a greater opportunity to unlock the functional potential of flowers far beyond bouquets. Now it is a pre-launch biotech concept reimagining flowers as a scalable source of innovation across three growing markets: natural fragrance, sustainable botanical chemicals, and holistic remedies. Evolving from the roots of floristry, we aim to develop proprietary flower-based formulations that replace synthetics in beauty, health, and clean consumer products. We are currently seeking visionary investors and strategic partners to help bring this concept to life.

Name: SERRE NEW YORK
Description:
Enterprise Floral Design That Scales
SERRE NEW YORK is a full-service floral design house specializing in permanent installations for multi-location businesses and high-impact commercial environments. We deliver the same artisanal quality as premium fresh florals—at the same price point—but with 1-2 years of flawless presentation instead of one week.

What We Offer:
Multi-Location Floral Programs – Signature designs scaled across your entire portfolio (real estate, hospitality, healthcare, retail)
Flagship Installations – High-impact pieces for lobbies, executive floors, restaurants, and showrooms
End-to-End Service – Consultation, custom design, fabrication, and installation

The SERRE Advantage:
Same investment as one premium fresh arrangement. 52-104 weeks of perfection. Zero maintenance, no wilting, absolute consistency. Our museum - quality installations eliminate the weekly cycle of ordering, receiving, maintaining, and discarding - saving facilities teams time and your business thousands annually.
Our clients include leading luxury developers and discerning brands who refuse to compromise on aesthetics or efficiency.

Description: The Plant Hatch is a full-service florist with a houseplant and home decor shop. Our storefront in Clifton Park, NY provides a memorable shopping experience; full-service floral studio and a huge, open, natural lit store, curated with unique home décor and houseplants.

Name: Silk Flowers Singapore
Description:
Silk Flowers Singapore is a bespoke artificial flower company based in Singapore. The stunning range of flowers and foliage offers an alternative to fresh flowers that lasts longer while maintaining the same level of elegance and charm.

Each arrangement is hand crafted to create bespoke arrangements for the individual or corporate. Whether it's a romantic bouquet, a centerpiece for an event, or a personalized gift, I strive to deliver the highest quality artificial flowers in Singapore.

Beyond the aesthetic appeal, silk flowers offer practical advantages, including durability, low maintenance, and the ability to withstand various environmental conditions. They are perfect for homes, offices, weddings, and other occasions, bringing an everlasting touch of nature's elegance to any setting.

Collaborating closely with clients, I take pride in understanding their unique preferences, themes, and visions. From there, I create bespoke silk floral arrangements that truly capture their desired ambiance and emotions. The result is a personalized masterpiece that tells a story and sparks conversations.

Sustainability is also at the heart of what we belief in at Silk Flowers Singapore. As such we are proud to be supporting Handprint to plant a mangrove tree for every stem, and to also support Seven Clean Seas who will collect equivalent weight in plastic from the local seas for each stem sold. Therefore, for every stem sold, not only are you contributing towards mangrove planting, but also collecting plastic from the seas.

Let's connect and explore the possibilities of silk flowers in transforming spaces. Whether you're an individual seeking a timeless floral gift or an event planner looking for stunning decorations, I am here to bring your vision to life.

Feel free to reach out for consultations, inquiries or collaborations.

Name: Oh My Green !
Description:
Le Kokedama (sphère de mousse en japonais) est une boule de substrat recouverte de mousse naturelle sur laquelle s'épanouit la plante.

Passionnée par la culture japonaise et plus particulièrement l'art du jardin japonais, Sabrina a décidé de créer sa propre fabrique de kokedama nommée Oh My Green !
Soucieuse de respecter la technique traditionnelle, elle utilise les ingrédients originaux (akadama, ketoh...) pour réaliser ses confections.
Le kokedama apportera une green touch 100% naturelle et atypique à vos espaces de vie.

Sabrina propose également des ateliers afin de faire découvrir l'art de la confection de ces sphères de vie. 
Ces ateliers sont à destination des adultes comme des enfants, mais aussi des entreprises pour des sessions de team-building.

Au-delà des Kokedama, Sabrina vous propose également de découvrir un choix de bonsaï et ses compositions végétales, toujours très design et graphiques !
