Name: Petals Agro Nepal Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Petals Agro Nepal is a family proud to serve you only the finest flower and plant arrangements (especially indoor decorative). As an importer and exporter of plants and flowers from Holland and many other European countries, we are committed to offering you a wide collection of local as well as imported plants and flowers (both indoor and outdoor). Furthermore, our professional and helpful staff always puts an extra effort to provide you with only the freshest floral and plant arrangements and gifts. With service that is prompt and friendly, we want to make sure that your experience with us is a pleasant one. Maybe it’s for someone’s wedding or birthday or it’s for decorating your house or for yourself, our florists have fun and creative ideas of arranging the plants and flowers to make it special. You are sure to put a smile on your face with a nice bouquet of flowers and plants. Our Story After understanding about plant and flower market in Nepal and contacting floral and plant distributors from other countries, we decided to start a similar service in Nepal. And, we opened PetalAgro Nepal with its head office at Lalitpur, Khumaltar with a team of professional florists to provide the best products (indoor and outdoor products) and customer service. We made a huge display of fresh local as well as imported flowers inside the shop. Customers would be able to wander around the store to adore the beauty and fragrance of a flower by taking their time. We also have a few selections of outdoor plants and flowers. As a grower and distributor of local floral and plant products, we have established our main production farm in Makwanpur Region. We also have another production farm near the head office in Lalitpur, Khumatar. Today, we have an alluring selection of flowers and plants gathered from all around the world.

Name: kurier-kwiatowy.pl
Description:
Firma www.kurier-kwiatowy.pl to ceniona marka na rynku usług florystycznych. Nasza firma specjalizuje się w dostarczaniu kwiatów na terenie całego kraju. Świadczymy usługi na najwyższym poziomie, stawiając zawsze na jakość i zadowolenie klientów.

W naszej ofercie znajdą Państwo nie tylko tradycyjne bukiety, ale również eleganckie kompozycje kwiatowe, kosze i wieńce pogrzebowe oraz kwiaty na specjalne okazje takie jak śluby czy walentynki. Współpracujemy jedynie z najlepszymi dostawcami, dzięki czemu nasze kwiaty zawsze są świeże i pełne uroku.

Nasza firma to nie tylko doskonała jakość usług, ale również profesjonalna obsługa klienta. Zawsze jesteśmy dostępni dla naszych klientów, gotowi do pomocy i doradztwa w kwestiach związanych z doborem kwiatów czy sposobem ich prezentacji.

Współpraca z nami to gwarancja satysfakcji i pełnego zadowolenia z usług. Zaufało nam już wielu klientów, którzy doceniają naszą jakość, indywidualne podejście i szybkość realizacji zamówień.

Zapraszamy do skorzystania z naszych usług i dołączenia do grona zadowolonych klientów!

Name: FLOWVEND.GE
Description:
FLOVWEND.GE არის მოწყობილობა, შექმნილი თაიგულების გასაყიდად პერსონალის დახმარების გარეშე. ეს არის გაყიდვების ინოვაციური მეთოდი დე-ამის 24 საათის განმავლობაში და შესანიშნავი შესაძლებლობა თქვენი ყვავილების მააზიის მოდერნიზებისთვის. ჩვენი Flowvend-ი ისეა მოწყობილი, რომ გაგრილების სისტემა უზრუნველყოფს ყვავილების მაქსიმალურ სიცოცხლისუნარიანობას, ისევე როგორც სპეციალიზებული პროფესიული მაცივრები.

FLOVWEND.GE is a device designed to sell bouquets without the help of staff. It is an innovative way to sell 24 hours a day and a great opportunity to modernize your flower store. Our Flowvend is arranged so that the cooling system ensures maximum viability of the flowers, just like specialized professional refrigerators.

Name: Rosalie Flowers
Description:
Through Rosalie we want to unite growers and customers, our core business is to provide the freshest, high quality and durable flowers as possible, shipped directly from our farms to your doorstep.

Our story begins 20 years ago in Colombia on the savannah of Bogota, where we started growing roses and carnations. Today we can proudly say that we are flower growers, exporters, and marketers with a broad selection of more than 30 flower varieties and more than 600 collaborators throughout the process.

Having all their support and passion, we created Rosalie, a fresh, innovative, creative and high quality brand whose purpose is to transmit all the love, experience, and passion from which flowers are harvested into the hands of our customers.


Through Rosalie we want to unite growers and customers, our core business is to provide the freshest, high quality and durable flowers as possible, shipped directly from our farms to your doorstep.

We are committed to the environment, always seeking for recycling and biodegradable practices throughout our process becoming environmentally friendly each step of the way.

Thanks to you, our client, we will continue to fulfill the dreams of our collaborators every day by bringing you love and happiness, transmitted in spectacular floral arrangements delivered directly to your hands.

Description: Welcome to Flowers Vibe Studio, a unique and enchanting e-commerce boutique based in the vibrant city of Pune. Our mission is to make every occasion special and memorable with our personalized floral creations and handpicked gifts.Our StoryFlowers Vibe Studio was born out of a passion for flowers and a desire to create meaningful connections through floral artistry. Our journey began with a small team of talented florists who shared a common love for the beauty and diversity of flowers. Over the years, we have grown into a trusted name in Pune, known for our exceptional quality, creativity, and attention to detail. We take pride in sourcing the freshest flowers from local and international growers, ensuring that every arrangement is crafted with the finest blooms.Our Floral DesignsAt Flowers Vibe Studio, floral design is more than just arranging flowers; it is an art form that requires skill, creativity, and a deep understanding of the language of flowers. Our talented team of florists is dedicated to creating bespoke floral arrangements that reflect your unique style and preferences. Whether you are looking for a classic bouquet, a modern centerpiece, or a whimsical arrangement, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.BouquetsOur bouquets are designed to make a lasting impression. From romantic roses to cheerful sunflowers, we offer a wide range of options to suit every taste and occasion. Each bouquet is carefully crafted with the freshest blooms and arranged in a way that enhances the natural beauty of the flowers. Whether you are celebrating a birthday, anniversary, or just want to brighten someone's day, our bouquets are the perfect choice.

At Fiore Arte, flowers are more than a gift — they are a visual language. Every arrangement tells a story. Every stem is placed with purpose.

Name: Beautiful Blooms by Jen
Description:
Beautiful Blooms by Jen was born from Jen Linehan’s love of flowers and the floral industry. Jen has known since 7th grade, after helping in a flower shop during the holidays, that this was what she wanted to do! After majoring in Ag Education at OSU, Jen taught high school and designed wedding flowers out of her home, saving every penny she could to realize her dream. In 2008, after five short years, she was able to open Beautiful Blooms by Jen!

Beautiful Blooms by Jen is known for creating long lasting, personalized flower arrangements. We offer fun floral design classes to our community and are one of the only florists who fully service weddings. As the only Certified Florist and Certified Floral Designer in Northwest Ohio, Jen believes strongly in continuing education for all staff members.This allows us to design innovative and unique arrangements that stand out from the rest! Our shop also carries a large selection of gift items, including Cherry Republic, Carruth, Demdaco and Carson. From home decor, charcuterie essentials, jewelry, seasonal staples, indoor plants, accessories, and celebratory gifts, we have a gift for everyone!

Beautiful Blooms by Jen has won “Best of Toledo” by the Toledo City Paper for the past two years, as well as the Toledo Blade "Reader's Choice Florist" for 2022. We are so proud that the community recognizes us and appreciates the service we bring to the area. Jen also had the wonderful experience of volunteering for the 2022 Rose Bowl Parade to help decorate the Blue Diamond Almond Float.

Whether it’s a beautiful, long lasting flower arrangement or a thoughtful gift, Beautiful Blooms by Jen can help with same day delivery to Toledo, Sylvania and the surrounding area!

Name: L'Histoire d'une Fleur
Description:
L'Histoire d'une Fleur - Artisan Fleuriste, Créateur d'Émotions Florales 

Fondée avec passion et un profond respect pour la nature, L'Histoire d'une Fleur est plus qu'une simple boutique de fleurs : c'est une expérience sensorielle où chaque création raconte une histoire unique. Depuis notre création, nous nous sommes engagés à offrir des compositions florales qui allient élégance, créativité et authenticité. 

 Notre Mission
Chez L'Histoire d'une Fleur, notre mission est de célébrer les moments importants de la vie à travers l'art floral. Que ce soit pour un mariage , un anniversaire , ou simplement pour le plaisir d'offrir , nous concevons des arrangements qui capturent l'essence de chaque instant.

 Nos Valeurs
Nous croyons en l'importance de la qualité, de la durabilité et du respect de l'environnement.  Nous sélectionnons avec soin chaque fleur, en privilégiant les producteurs locaux et les pratiques durables. Nous sommes fiers de pouvoir offrir à nos clients des créations florales qui sont à la fois belles et respectueuses de la planète. 

 Notre Histoire
L'Histoire d'une Fleur est née de l'envie de partager une passion pour les fleurs et de créer des souvenirs inoubliables à travers des arrangements sur mesure. Chaque bouquet que nous réalisons est une œuvre d'art, confectionnée avec amour  et attention aux détails. 

 Pourquoi Nous Choisir ?
Notre équipe d'artisans fleuristes est dédiée à la satisfaction de nos clients. Avec un sens aigu de l'esthétique  et un service personnalisé, nous nous efforçons de dépasser vos attentes et de rendre chaque occasion spéciale.

Name: Laviola Flowers

We provide a full range of services including event floral planning, wedding bouquet design, and luxury flower sales, ensuring each arrangement delivers elegance, style, and a memorable experience.

Since 2014, we have expanded our offerings to include online flower sales, allowing clients to enjoy our premium floral designs conveniently from anywhere, while maintaining the same high standards of quality and service.

Our team combines creativity, craftsmanship, and meticulous attention to detail to transform ordinary moments into extraordinary experiences. Every bouquet and arrangement is crafted to tell a story, reflecting our dedication to personalized service and client satisfaction.

Laviola Flowers has become synonymous with sophistication, quality, and timeless floral artistry. Our mission is to make every event, wedding, and hotel display truly exceptional, blending luxury floral design with professional, attentive service.

At Fiore d'Oro, we believe there’s always a perfect flower for every person, every celebration, and every milestone—because truly, there’s always flowers.

We are dedicated to crafting premium, hand-selected floral arrangements. They are unique, special, and thoughtfully designed, not just to mark an event but to create an experience that adds beauty and joy to the lives of those who receive them. Whether it’s a milestone occasion or a simple "just because," our mission is simple: to deliver love, joy, and happiness through the art of flowers and make each moment unforgettable.

Flowers are timeless, and we’re here to make sure they always have a place in your most cherished moments.

Name: Flower Cat NYC
Description:
Flower Cat is a flower shop + cafe based in Greenpoint, Brooklyn. We offer floral arrangements, coffee, wine, and a safe space for cat lovers. 

Flower Cat is owned by Suzanne Agbayani - a New York City local from Hawaii,  born in the Philippines, and a bonafide crazy cat lady who lives with her two cats, Shrimp and Lilith. After 24 years of living in Hawaii, she decided to broaden her Island Girl horizons and move to New York where she studied at Pratt Institute for her Masters in Architecture, and quickly fell in love with the city. When the Architecture Industry took a toll on her, 8 years deep, she wanted to find something that had always brought her peace. Suzanne has always had a passion for flowers, from helping her grandmother tend to her flower garden during her childhood, to arranging bodega flowers and sharing it with her friends to enjoy. She decided to quit architecture, master the art of floral design, and open a flower shop. Thus, Flower Cat was born!

Founded in Bangkok and now based in Edinburgh, we explore floristry as more than beauty — it’s art, culture, and emotional connection. Our work ranges from installations and event flowers to therapeutic floral workshops.

What we do:
- Event Flowers – bespoke designs for intimate gatherings and meaningful celebrations; including bouquet and vase floral design.
- Floral Installations & Styling – immersive flower experiences for festivals, retail, and community events.
- Workshops for Wellbeing – hands-on floral sessions inspired by art therapy, mindfulness, and Asian philosophies.
- Floral Storytelling & Journaling – documenting floral culture across the world, from markets in Thailand to gardens in Europe.

We believe flowers are not just arrangements — they are grounding experiences, carrying stories across cultures and moments in time.

Name: Demmerys
Description:
I’m passionate about creating unique floral designs that revitalise your décor and exceed your expectations. From initial briefing stages to final delivery, I’m engaged and enthusiastic about every single project – from one-off personalised creations to larger scale commercial designs.

It doesn’t matter whether you have a window sill that needs filling or a whole lobby that needs decorating, I would love to help you create the perfect piece. With arrangements anything from 30cm to 3m in height and with an extensive range of colours, florals and foliage to choose from, together we can decide on the best arrangement for your needs. The first thing to do is to have a chat about your project and then I can help, advise and ultimately create a piece that is unique to you.

Since the initial stages of business, Demmery’s has enjoyed increasing success, with our company growing in some form or another every single day. Hotels, restaurants and bars are becoming growing markets, and I’m often asked to supply our floral décor for conferences and exhibitions around the UK.

On top of that, we’re now looking at increasing our international presence. We’re currently spreading our wings and marketing our floral décor solutions in the USA, Europe, Africa and soon, Australia and Japan. But although we may be growing in size, our core values remain the same: delivering exceptional floral designs and a personalised service that simply can’t be matched.

At Demmery’s, we care about our planet. That’s why we’re committed to making high-quality, handcrafted arrangements that last a lifetime. Crafted from the finest materials with careful attention paid to every single detail, our artificial flower arrangements are luxurious, lifelike and low maintenance with an emphasis on both style and sustainability. It’s buy once, love forever.

Name: Stia Proof-Orchidsitter
Description:
At Stia Proof, we turn everyday challenges into simple, sustainable solutions.
Our first innovation — OrchidSitter — is the world’s first self-hydrating cushion for orchids, made entirely from upcycled European materials.
It keeps orchids perfectly hydrated for up to 21 days, reducing transport stress, stock losses, and over- or under-watering at home.

From production to retail, OrchidSitter helps growers, distributors, and orchid lovers keep plants thriving — effortlessly.

What we stand for:
 Innovation with purpose – simple ideas that make a real difference
 Circular economy – all our products are made from clean, upcycled European materials
 Care made easy – extending plant life, reducing waste
 Made in Europe, inspired by nature

Key Products:
	•	OrchidSitter L, M, S – for growers, retailers & home use

Because we all deserve a healthy orchid at home.
#orchids #innovation #sustainability #upcycling #horticulture #ecodesign #greenbusiness #stiaproof #orchidsitter

Description:
Hos bySomeOne skaber vi holdbare blomsterløsninger, af naturlige tørrede blomster, til både private og erhverv. 
Med en kærlighed til blomster og et skarpt æstetisk øje skaber vi holdbare, bæredygtige og vedligeholdelsesfrie blomsterarrangementer, til alt fra hoteller, kontorer, restauranter og showrooms. 
Vælg mellem en skræddersyet løsning der matcher lige netop din virksomhed og jeres brand eller bestil nemt sæsonens buket, leveret til døren - og slip for den ugentlige udskiftning af visne blomster. 

Jubilæum, fødseldage eller nyansættelser? 
Vores holdbare blomster er oplagte at bruge ved mange forskellige begivenheder hvor man øsnker at give en blomst, der samtidig kan skabe en varigt minde for modtageren. 

Ingen opgave er for stor eller lille til bySomeOne - og jeg glæder mig til at skabe blomsterglæde til dig.

Name: Avenue des fleurs
Description:
Bienvenue chez Avenue des fleurs 
Passionnée par l’art floral, Avenue des fleurs est une entreprise indépendante créée en 2011, dédiée à offrir des créations florales uniques et sur mesure.

Nous nous engageons à offrir une expérience florale exceptionnelle en alliant la qualité de nos fleurs fraîches, un service de livraison rapide et soigné, ainsi qu'une boutique physique où vous pouvez découvrir nos créations.
Chaque bouquet, plante et composition est conçu avec soin, pour correspondre à vos envies et à vos moments de vie. 
Notre équipe de fleuristes, animée par la passion du végétal, sélectionne les plus belles fleurs , en privilégiant un circuit-court respectueux de l'environnement.

Avenue des fleurs, casse les codes traditionnels du monde floral en mettant l’accent sur la créativité, l’innovation et l'excellence du service client. Que ce soit pour un événement spécial, un cadeau ou simplement pour embellir votre quotidien.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette belle aventure florale !
En pleine expansion, nous sommes toujours à la recherche de talents passionnés pour enrichir notre équipe. Si vous souhaitez faire partie de cette aventure et participer à notre mission de répandre la beauté des fleurs, n’hésitez pas à nous contacter !

Name: floreezo
Description:
floreezo is the first flower subscription delivery service in Luxembourg. We aim at infusing the scent of nature into your space, generating a warm, creative, and inclusive environment. Enjoy extra fresh flowers that last longer for you and your beloved ones. Set up an account, choose how often you want to receive bouquets, and floreezo will deliver fresh flowers at your doorstep!

What happens after you create a floreezo subscription?
-	SIT BACK AND RELAX, we will deliver your first bouquet on the date you chose.
-	YOU ARE ALWAYS INFORMED, you’ll receive an email 4/5 days before each delivery. If you plan to be out, skip the delivery for free.
-	PAY-AS-YOU-GO, you only pay each time you receive a bouquet.
-	YOU ARE IN CONTROL, use floreezo account to manage addresses, change your subscription, or cancel subscription when needed.

Celebrate every moment with floreezo!

Description:
About HEARTS Flowers
HEARTS Flowers is a luxury floral atelier based in Dubai, UAE — part of the HEARTS Beauty Space concept. We create bespoke flower arrangements, event decorations, and installations for both private clients and premium brands.

Our philosophy combines artistry, emotional storytelling, and exceptional craftsmanship. Every bouquet we design reflects the client’s individuality and our signature aesthetic — elegant, modern, and heartfelt.

Beyond daily orders and bespoke gifts, HEARTS Flowers curates large-scale floral concepts for fashion brands, events, and spaces across Dubai. Our work has become synonymous with timeless beauty, attention to detail, and a personalized approach.

We believe flowers have the power to express what words cannot — love, gratitude, celebration, and connection. That’s why every HEARTS creation tells a story, crafted with care and emotion.

Name: Floristeria Haru
Description:
En Haru Floristería, ofrecemos una amplia gama de productos y servicios florales que capturan la belleza y la esencia de cada ocasión especial. Nuestro compromiso es llevar la frescura y el encanto de nuestras flores a cada rincón del Ecuador, incluyendo las principales ciudades como Quito, Guayaquil, Cuenca, Machala, Santo Domingo, Portoviejo, Manta, Ambato, Riobamba, Ibarra, Esmeraldas, Babahoyo, Latacunga, Loja, Quevedo, y todas las demás.

Nuestros productos destacan por su diseño creativo y personalizado, con arreglos florales únicos que transmiten amor, felicidad y gratitud. Desde elegantes ramos de rosas hasta exuberantes bouquets de flores mixtas, cada pieza es una obra maestra que captura emociones y crea momentos inolvidables.

Nuestros servicios incluyen entregas a domicilio que abarcan todas las ciudades de Ecuador, y están disponibles las 24 horas del día. Con atención al detalle y cuidado en cada paso, nuestras entregas aseguran que tus sentimientos lleguen a su destino con frescura y puntualidad.

Además, en Haru Floristería, nos especializamos en la decoración floral para eventos y ocasiones especiales. Ya sea una boda, un aniversario, un cumpleaños o cualquier otro evento, nuestro equipo apasionado trabajará contigo para crear una ambientación mágica y encantadora que refleje tu estilo y personalidad.

Nuestro compromiso con la excelencia en el servicio al cliente es una prioridad. Nuestro equipo altamente dedicado y amable se asegura de entender tus necesidades y brindarte asesoramiento profesional para hacer que tu experiencia sea inolvidable.

En Haru Floristería, cada flor se convierte en un mensaje hablado por el corazón. Nuestros productos y servicios llevan el toque encantador de la naturaleza a todas las ciudades de Ecuador, con la promesa de hacer que tus momentos especiales sean aún más memorables. Confía en nosotros para emocionar y cautivar con el poder de las flores.

Name: Bloem Opleidingen
Description:
Ben jij klaar voor onze onvergetelijke bloemenreis?
Twee jaar aan de slag met het allerleukste bloemenvak. Werken waarbij je hoofd, hart en handen samen gaan. Een vak waarin jouw creativiteit een rol gaat spelen. En daarbij jezelf dusdanig kan ontwikkelen op vaktechnisch en persoonlijk vlak. Het gaat een reis worden die je van te voren niet kunt bedenken. Laat je meevoeren door twee enthousiaste bloemenreisleiders Moniek en Ria. Twee vakidioten met een écht bloemenhart.! 

Even over de bestemming… Jij bepaalt de koers gedurende het traject van twee jaren. Wij geven richting en dragen zorg voor een gedegen, kwalitatieve, professionele, inspirerende, gezellige, sfeervolle en natuurlijke bloemen opleiding. Een onvergetelijke reis die je niet wilt missen. 

Onze opleidingslocatie bevindt zich in het groen. Aan de rand van het bos ben je van harte welkom. Een pure plek waar je jezelf mag ontwikkelen. 

Durf jij het aan om mee te gaan op bloemenreis.? 
Check onze website op  www.bloemopleidingen.nl

Ook vindt je toffe andere trajecten op onze website. Speciaal voor bloemisten de ‘Ontdek je eigen stijl’ en de Floral Master Art.

Tanja HERRMANN - MON ATELIER FLORAL

En novembre 2007, j’ai ouvert mon atelier floral nommé Viola. En 2004, j’ai terminé mes études de fleuriste pour acquérir en 2007 le brevet de maîtrise en tant que fleuriste.
Mon rêve de me consacrer à la beauté et au charme des fleurs est devenu réalité.

Ainsi, pour rester à la une et pour vous offrir des produits frais et innovateurs, je ne travaille que sur rendez-vous.
Ayant l’esprit innovateur, je me tiens constamment au courant de nouvelles idées qui apparaissent dans le monde entier. J’essaie de les combiner et en même temps, j’exploite toutes les ressources qui se présentent à moi.

Ce partant, je participe annuellement à plusieurs formations à l’étrangers.
Je réalise tout genre de produits pour tous les moments de la vie ; comme par exemple les baptêmes, communions, mariages, anniversaires, fêtes de famille et les enterrements.
De plus, je réalise la décoration pour l’événementiel comme par exemple les anniversaires de société ou les fêtes de personnel.

Name: Paty Fantaisy
Description:
Mon parcours dans l'univers de la décoration a pris un tournant passionnant lors d'un événement très spécial : le mariage de ma mère ayant pour thème "exotique chic" et pour lequel j’étais en charge de la décoration. C’est à cette occasion que mon amour pour la création de murs végétaux artificiels a véritablement pris racine.

Mes créations de murs végétaux se distinguent par leur verdure luxuriante et leurs fleurs éclatantes, des caractéristiques qui les rendent uniques en leur genre. Chaque mètre carré de ces murs est une œuvre d'art en soi, façonnée avec une attention minutieuse et un soin particulier. Contrairement aux produits standardisés que l'on trouve couramment dans la grande distribution, mes murs végétaux ne présentent aucune répétition ennuyeuse. Chaque feuille, chaque fleur est disposée de manière à créer un ensemble harmonieux et réaliste.

Ainsi, chaque mur végétal que je conçois est plus qu'une simple décoration : c'est une pièce unique qui apporte une touche d'élégance et de naturel à n'importe quel environnement.

Une question ou un projet à me soumettre ? Contactez-moi et je serais heureuse de vous aider.

Name: Kiku Floral
Description:
Kiku Floral is a retail company based out of the Yamada Ranch at 20192 Central Ave Reedley Ca 93654

Kiku Floral was founded in September of 1983 by Larry and Lorrie Yamada in the Chinatown district of Fresno California. During the early years the original shop was run by Larry and the deliveries were made by Uncle Tad Yamada. In 1988 the store was expanded and Larry’s father Sab Yamada retired and joined Tad in delivering. In 1995 another expansion added more design and display area. In 2001 Kiku Floral II opened in Fresno’s Tower District selling flowers, plants and unique fine Japanese giftware. In February of 2004 after 21years in Chinatown, Kiku Floral moved to their store in The Tower at Convention Center Court. A beautiful 11 story building in Fresno’s new and vibrant area of downtown Fresno. On February 21st 2017 Kiku Floral moved to N. Valentine Ave. On June 1st 2020 Kiku Floral finally moved home to their wonderful and scenic Yamada Ranch in Reedley,Ca located at 20192 Central Avenue Reedley Ca. 93654.

Name: Rozkvetlá dílna
Description:
Rozkvetlá dílna je zakázková květinová dílna v Praze 9. Kromě svatební floristiky se zaměřuji na květinové workshopy a aranže eventů a konferencí. 

Máte zájem o workshop?  Dojedu k vám do kanceláře s veškerým materiálem a nářadím. Uspořádám kurz v čase, který bude vyhovovat vám. Téma je čistě na domluvě. A co spolu můžeme tvořit? Adventní věnce, jarní dekorace, vypichované květiny nebo vázané sezónní kytice z lokálních materiálů.  Máte jiné požadavky? Napište, originální zadání mám ráda. Ceny kurzů se odvíjí od množství účastníků a vybraného výrobku. Chcete přehlednou nabídku? Napište mi a pošlu vám ji.

Chystáte event nebo konferenci? Květiny sladím do celkového stylu a vaši akci tak posunu na vyšší úroveň. Poptejte svou představu – ráda ji s vámi proberu.

Chcete své hosty a kolegy příjemně naladit čerstvými květinami? Nabízím pravidelné dovozy květin na recepce a všude tam, kde by to bez nich nebylo ono. Napište mi – vše zařídím.

Více inspirace a zákulisí z květinové dílny sdílím na svém osobním profilu – sledujte mě zde: www.linkedin.com/in/jana-čechová-4306282b6
Na Instagramu @https://www.instagram.com/rozkvetla_dilna/
Nebo na webu: www.rozkvetladilna.cz

Decoración de eventos corporativos, bodas y celebraciones

Name: Essência da Terra
Description:
Sobre Nós
Na Essência da Terra, acreditamos que o equilíbrio e o bem-estar nascem da ligação genuína com a natureza. A nossa marca foi criada com o propósito de resgatar o valor do uso ancestral das ervas, trazendo-o para o dia a dia de forma simples, artesanal e significativa.

Produzimos sabonetes e velas artesanais, procurando unir tradição e cuidado em cada detalhe. Cada produto é concebido para proporcionar momentos de calma, introspeção e conexão com o que realmente importa: a natureza, a espiritualidade e consigo próprio.

Mais do que produtos, oferecemos uma experiência sensorial que inspira leveza, presença e harmonia, transformando rotinas em rituais de autocuidado e reconexão.

A Nossa Missão
Oferecer produtos naturais e artesanais que inspirem bem-estar, autocuidado e harmonia com a natureza.

A Nossa Visão
Ser reconhecida como uma marca que cria experiências sensoriais únicas, aproximando as pessoas do que é verdadeiramente essencial: corpo, mente e espírito em equilíbrio.

Os Nossos Valores
Naturalidade: utilização de matérias-primas naturais e produção artesanal.
Sustentabilidade: respeito pela natureza em todas as etapas do processo.
Cuidado: atenção ao detalhe para proporcionar um bem-estar genuíno.
Conexão: inspirar momentos de introspeção e harmonia interior.

Name: Tenere Flowers
Description: Tenere Flower, founded by Gaia, is specializing in preserving  the beauty of emotional blooms from significant moments of your life. Gaia's journey, rooted in her Italian heritage, has instilled in her a profound appreciation for capturing the essence of precious memories and transforming them into bespoke keepsakes. With a keen eye for detail, Tenere Flowers creates bespoke frames, which each art piece is infused with personal touches. From a young age, Gaia's affinity for preserving beauty was evident, as she would delicately place vibrant flowers between the pages of books. However, it was in 2021 as she joined the hospitality industry to look after weddings, her passion grew immensely. Witnessing the unfortunate disposal of expensive flowers during this events ignited her creative spark and being determined to give these blooms a second life. The aptly named “Tenere Flowers” studio draws its inspiration from the verb “to keep”, reflecting Gaia’s commitment to preserving the beauty and sentiment of each petal. Her mission goes beyond mere floral preservation; it's a celebration of the profound connection between nature and memory, where each piece becomes a testament to the beauty found in both transience and endurance.

Name: PeetPlukt
Description:
PeetPlukt bloemstylist in hartje Amersfoort

Je wilt het afscheid van een dierbare omgeven met bloemen, maar niet met zo’n klassiek rouwstuk die je vaak op een uitvaart ziet. Of misschien heb je zin in een gezellige workshop met vriendinnen in Amersfoort, ga je trouwen, organiseer je een feest of evenement, en wil je dat de boel wordt omgetoverd in een kleurrijk geheel met bloemen. Of je wilt je huis of werkplek groen inrichten, maar je hebt niet bepaald groene vingers. Over dit soort groene en bloemenwensen denkt bloemstylist PeetPlukt graag met je mee.

PeetPlukt in Amersfoort is geen (bloemen)winkel. Ik werk freelance en creëer in opdracht. Niets is standaard, alles is maatwerk. Je herkent PeetPlukt aan een losse, luchtige en natuurlijke stijl. Met oog voor detail, een berg creativiteit en persoonlijke aandacht – ik kan niet anders.

Name: Blooming Scents
Description:
I am Jennifer Pollock and Blooming Scents is my business, pride and joy.  I have been in business since 1999 and still love it!  My main focus are weddings and events, but I do every day floral bouquets and decoration work also.  I take all calls, orders, and do all consultations personally so you are not dealing with several people.  I think this way of running my business keeps things a little more personal and the customer can build a relationship with me for events and holidays in the future.  

My goal is to keep my customers happy with beautiful unique arrangements that are affordable.  Anyone can call a chain shop and order an arrangement from a catalog.  I want my customers to call and talk to me personally and tell me what the occasion is and what kind of flowers or ideas they are looking for so I can arrange a bouquet that is filled with the emotion and character of the occasion.

Name: Eden Meadows
Description:
Eden Meadows is a floral design studio helping beauty-loving souls celebrate life’s most meaningful moments through artfully arranged blooms. Inspired by nature and created with care, our work is grounded in the belief that flowers are more than decorations—they’re connection, comfort, and joy made visible.

Our floral designs are soulful, romantic, and thoughtfully curated. With lush blooms, delicate textures, and intentional details, we create arrangements that don’t just fill a space—they transform it. Each design is made to feel like a moment, tailored to your story and styled to elevate your experience.

Whether you’re planning a wedding, hosting an intimate gathering, or dreaming up something in between, we’re here to bring your vision to life through florals that feel personal, refined, and quietly extraordinary. Because when flowers are chosen with care and crafted with purpose, they don’t just decorate a moment—they make life feel like a garden.

Name: GerbeRose.sk
Description:
We bring the most beautiful roses and gerberas from producers in Holland to our warehouse in Bratislava and deliver them to end customers or companies to make them happy:-)

Sme radi, že máme tu česť už od roku 2021 dodávať osobne priamo k vám tie najčerstvejšie rezané ruže a gerbery. Táto práca nás nesmierne teší a veríme, že sa nám podarí vyčariť úsmev na tvári vám aj vašim blízkym.

Vyvíjame maximálne úsilie, aby naše kvety vydržali čo najdlhšie a prinášali čo najviac radosti. Máme ich v rukách od momentu, kedy ich prevezmeme od pestovateľov v Holandsku, až kým ich sami dodáme vám – našim zákazníkom. Vyskúšajte a uvidíte sami 

Tím GerbeRose

Name: Langdon's Flowers

Langdon's Flowers is a locally-owned flower shop with floral designers that use their creative talent of floral design to share a love of flowers with the residents of Ottawa through great design, precise attention-to-detail and wonderfully fresh flowers.

All our florists at Langdon's Flowers take great pleasure in

- Our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee

Name: Cavanna Fiori
Description:
Cavanna Fiori di Vigevano, Lombardia, è un'azienda storica nel settore della vendita di fiori e piante. Fondata negli anni '60, l'azienda ha consolidato la sua reputazione di qualità, affidabilità e attenzione al cliente, diventando un punto di riferimento per gli amanti dei fiori nella zona di Vigevano e oltre.

Il segreto del successo del negozio Cavanna Fiori risiede nella passione per i fiori e nella cura dei dettagli che contraddistinguono ogni prodotto e servizio offerto. Ogni cliente viene accolto con attenzione e professionalità, e guidato nella scelta dei prodotti più adatti alle proprie esigenze.

Negli ultimi anni, il negozio ha ampliato la sua offerta di prodotti e servizi, aprendo anche un sito online per permettere ai clienti di acquistare comodamente da casa. Grazie alla continua evoluzione e alla dedizione al lavoro, Cavanna Fiori è in grado di offrire una vasta gamma di fiori e piante di alta qualità, garantendo la massima soddisfazione del cliente.

Se sei alla ricerca di un negozio di fiori affidabile, professionale e attento alle tue esigenze, non puoi che rivolgerti a noi. Contattaci per saperne di più sui nostri prodotti e servizi, siamo pronti ad accoglierti con la nostra passione per i fiori.

Name: Buying Thyme Designs Inc.
Description:
Located on the border of North Oshawa and serving the Durham Region in Southern Ontario, my micro flower farm offers locally grown, seasonal blooms that bring the beauty of nature into your everyday life. Specializing in ready-made bouquets for celebrating life’s moments, I create floral arrangements that reflect the unique charm of each season. With a focus on sustainability and connection to nature, my flowers invite you to slow down, savor simple joys, and celebrate the beauty of the seasons—whether as a gift for a loved one, corporate event, or to brighten your own space, and uplift your spirit.

Bouquets are available for pickup at our self-serve flower stand, and at Turquoise Boutique in Whitby, during the growing season*. Local delivery is available upon request. 

Bouquets contain a mix of introduced, traditional bouquet staples and native blooms.

*The growing season in our region of Southern Ontario usually provides blooms from Mid April to Early October. Mother Nature calls the shots and these timelines can vary from year to year.

Name: AMURI SERVICES, LDA
Floral Designer Annette von Einem
Description:
Floral designer Annette von Einem har gang på gang skubbet grænserne for blomsterdesign, mode og eventstyling i mere end 30 år i branchen. Hun rangerer blandt Europas absolut bedste designer, og er anerkendt i branchen for sin position som trendsætter. Annette von Einem er således idag ambassadør for internationale brands, magasiner samt floral designere over hele verden. Annettes værker og unikke designs er jævnligt i internationale magasiner, tidsskrifter, fagblade samt kunstbøger som den verdenskendte kunstbog ’International Floral Art’ i flere år.

Annette von Einem har modtaget adskillige eftertragtede internationale titler, og vundet flere konkurrencer i ind – og udland. Annette von Einems visionære arbejde har skabt stor interesse for hendes stil og teknikker, og hun underviser på seminarer og workshops rundt om i verden og herhjemme - fra Kasakhstan, Singapore til Italien, Skotland og Jylland.

Anette von Einem arbejder primært med Mode-, Medie, Hotel, Branding og Event Styling, Bryllup samt driver sit eget flower akadami med base i København

Name: ALFAZEMA Floricultura & Café
Description:
A Alfazema Floricultura & Café nasceu com a missão de resgatar a simplicidade e a beleza dos momentos cotidianos, inspirada no espirito acolhedor do bairro de Vargem Grande/RJ. Fundada como um espaço onde flores, afeto e convivência se encontram, a Alfazema e mais do que uma floricultura: é um refugio para os moradores e visitantes que
buscam pausas tranquilas no dia a dia.

Localizada em uma das regiões mais verdes e culturais do Rio de Janeiro, a Alfazema reflete o charme brasileiro em cada detalhe. Seu ambiente é composto por madeira rústica, e elementos que remetem à natureza e à tradição local. O espaço é pensado para acolher a todos, com mesas dispostas na calçada, criando um ambiente perfeito para conversas entre vizinhos ou para quem deseja um momento de contemplação, cercado por flores e aromas de café.

Comprometida com a sustentabilidade, a Alfazema adota práticas ecológicas que preservam o meio ambiente e promovem o consumo consciente. Desde o uso de materiais recicláveis até a valorização de produtores locais, cada detalhe reflete o cuidado com a natureza e a responsabilidade ambiental.

Alfazema tambem carrega consigo a proposta de manter vivas as memórias do bairro e fortalecer laços comunitários, especialmente atendendo ao público mais velho que encontra ali um lugar de nostalgia e acolhimento. Alem de flores e arranjos, o café oferece ervas naturais, doces caseiros e opções que celebram o sabor e a simplicidade da vida.

"Flores, afeto e sustentabilidade no coração do bairro" é a essência que guia a Alfazema, unindo natureza, tradição, ecologia e o calor humano em um só lugar.

Name: Flora Valim
Description:
No cenário de uma modesta estufa de 112 m², nossa jornada começou em julho de 2005, como um viveiro especializado na produção de hortaliças, com destaque para as folhosas. Inicialmente, nosso propósito era atender a lojas de agropecuária e pequenos agricultores, fornecendo mudas de hortaliças de qualidade, prontas para o plantio. Essa visão inovadora não apenas floresceu, mas também se tornou um "case" de sucesso.

Em um espaço de tempo notavelmente curto, ampliamos nossas estufas para 2.000 m², para produção de mudas de hortaliças. O reconhecimento de nossa qualidade e compromisso com o atendimento ao cliente nos impulsionou a dar um passo ainda mais ambicioso. Em 2017, respondendo a uma demanda latente, ampliamos nosso portfólio para incluir uma vasta gama de plantas e flores ornamentais, marcando nossa entrada nesse mercado promissor. Para acomodar essa expansão, construímos mais uma estufa de 2.000 m².

Nossa abordagem focada na qualidade, beleza e inovação de nossas plantas e flores, combinada com o respeito ao cliente e parcerias sólidas com nossos fornecedores, logo nos posicionou como uma referência no setor. E em 2020, ampliamos nossa área de viveiro em mais 4.500 m² e mais uma área de rustificação de plantas de 1.500 m², totalizaram a impressionante marca de 10.000 m² de estufas.

Em 2021, demos um passo estratégico ao adquirir três “Box” de venda no renomado CEAFLOR, o maior mercado de flores do Brasil, localizado na cidade de Holambra, São Paulo. Essa ação consolidou ainda mais nossa posição e expandiu nossa presença no mercado.

E, em novembro de 2023, marcamos mais um capítulo significativo em nossa história, com a inauguração de uma loja de distribuição estrategicamente localizada na Rodovia Raposo Tavares km 245, nas proximidades da cidade de Paranapanema, próxima ao Distrito de Campos de Holambra. Essa região emergente está se consolidando como o segundo centro de distribuição de flores do país.

Name: Birdy's Plants
Description:
Our story began in a tiny 500-square-foot Toronto, Ontario condo in 2021. It was here where our passion for houseplants started, creating moss poles and sharing our plant cuttings with the plant community in the GTA. Inspired by a nickname given to her by her best friend, Birdy’s Plants was formed.  

From there, Birdy continued learning about soil compositions and nutrients required to create a balanced, healthy, and peat-free substrate for all the plants in her collection. A year later, after months of trial and error, the Birdy’s Plants Premium Philodendron + Monstera Soil Mix was born. After sharing the soil mixture with many happy clients, Birdy’s love for soil creation grew.

Inspired to use her expertise and knowledge, Birdy embarked on a new soilful journey filled with opportunities and friendships with soil scientists and clients. 

Birdy’s Plants journey continues being inspired by the houseplant enthusiast community and the evergrowing need for all things plant parent related. We look forward to creating a unified relationship with mother nature by giving back and bringing more to the plant community through expansion to create a one-stop shop with all things houseplant-related.

Our Beliefs and Values
As a passionate, growing business, we at Birdy’s Plants believe that every plant parent deserves to enjoy their plants in a safe and positive space. Whether you’re looking for ingredients like the simple old perlite or one of our premium soil mixtures like the Premium Hoya Soil Mix, we are here to provide you with the confidence and space to learn, grow, and show off your houseplant collection.

Name: FLOART MAROC
Description:
L'histoire de cette boutique de fleurs débute avec une profonde passion pour l'éphémère beauté des fleurs et le désir ardent de partager cette splendeur avec le monde. 

Mme Meryem Bennani, fondatrice de FLOART et véritable amatrice d'art floral, a toujours nourri le rêve de créer un espace où la nature pourrait s'exprimer librement à travers les pétales délicats et les nuances vibrantes des fleurs. Guidée par son amour pour la botanique et le design floral, elle a concrétisé cette vision en ouvrant sa propre boutique en 2017.

Au fil des saisons, FLOART est devenu un lieu emblématique, allant au-delà du simple commerce de bouquets. Il est devenu un endroit où l'on trouve l'inspiration, partage des moments de bonheur et où on exprime des émotions à travers des compositions florales soigneusement confectionnées.

L'évolution de la boutique s'est faite au gré des années, introduisant de nouveaux services tels que des ateliers floraux, des événements spéciaux, et même un service de livraison pour apporter la magie florale directement aux portes des clients. FLOART est devenu un lieu incontournable pour tous ceux en quête de beauté authentique et d'harmonie avec la nature.

Aujourd’hui, l’histoire de Floart perdure grâce à la gratitude et l’amour de sa clientèle fidèle en ouvrant prochainement une deuxième écrin à Bouskoura, ville verte.

Moje srdeční záležitost, malé ekosystémy, miniaturní džungle ve sklenicích a lahvích. Rostlinná terária, zelená, svěží, zarostlá mechem, kapradím a dalšími rostlinkami, které milují vlhké klima. Malé planetky schované za sklem, probouzející naší fantazii.

Umožní nám zastavit se, podívat se na svět z jiného úhlu a radovat se z maličkostí. A když přivoníte a zavřete oči, ocitnete se najednou v lese, který voní deštěm…

Mech je moje láska. A rostlinná terária nejsou jen moje práce. Je to vášeň. Každý den vlastníma rukama vytvářím nový život...

A mám radost, když se o své umění můžu podělit. Proto jsem otevřela historicky 1. terrarium shop v ČR, kamenný obchod, kde najdete stovky mechárií připravených na cestu k vám domů. A tamtéž pro vás pořádám i nejrůznější kurzy a workshopy.

Versailles proudly stands as a trailblazer in the enchanting realm of preserving the beauty of fresh flowers and foliage. As the first company in India to establish a fully indigenous preservation unit, we have embarked on a journey to encase the exquisite beauty of nature and present it to the world as everlasting treasures.

Each preserved flower is a living testament to meticulous cultivation and careful harvesting. Selected at their peak, these genuine flowers undergo a methodical preservation process to enhance their longevity and beauty.

This unique treatment effectively maintains the cellular structure of the flowers and foliage, resulting in a soft and supple texture that preserves their innate beauty for an extended period.

Name: So Tropical
Description:
Je crée des terrariums uniques, de véritables mini-jardins tropicaux en bocal qui allient esthétique, exotisme et simplicité d'entretien. Chaque pièce est pensée comme un petit écosystème autonome, mêlant design et voyage végétal. 

Pour les particuliers : mes terrariums apportent une touche de verdure élégante et facile à entretenir, même pour ceux qui n'ont pas la main verte. Cet écosystème est idéal pour décorer et sublimer votre intérieur. 

Pour les professionnels : ils offrent un univers végétal raffiné qui transforme bureaux, boutiques, restaurants ou espaces d'accueil en lieux vivants et inspirants. 

En plus de la création, j'anime des ateliers ludiques et créatifs. Ils permettent à chacun de concevoir son propre terrarium et de repartir avec un morceau de nature tropicale à la maison ou au bureau. 

Une mini forêt qui s'invite chez vous, belle, durable et sans contraintes.

Name: Singapore Flower Delivery Pte Ltd
Description: Since 1987, Singapore Florist has been part of the vibrant tapestry of Singapore’s floral scene. First stepping online in 2003, we’ve grown alongside the communities we serve, weathering the nation’s highs and lows. As the original family owners gracefully aged, they entrusted their legacy to a new generation of florists—ones who share their passion for creating joy through gifting.

Name: Flos by Mayuna
Description: Established in 2021, we came up with our professional experience as wedding decorators and then re-branded to the florist industry, mainly in flower things ideas. The name Flos by Mayuna means “Flos is a Flower”, and “Mayuna” abbreviates the Javanese philosophy of “Memayu Hayuning Bawana”, which means “to beautify the beauty of the world”. Our delivery service covers various areas in Malang – East Java and its surroundings.

Name: Verde Bouquet

Intention and creativity in every bouquet

We take our inspiration from life. 
We put so much love into every single bouquet we create. 
We want to transfer that energy into your home. 
We hope you can feel it.

Name: LIEFDEmetbloemen
Description:
Van vreugde tot afscheid - bloemwerk met liefde & betekenis.

Bloemen vertellen verhalen, van een warme felicitatie tot een laatste groet. Ik geloof dat een boeket méér is dan een verzameling van diverse soorten bloemen. Bloemen geven een boodschap van liefde, troost en verbinding. 

Met mijn creatieve blik en oog voor detail verzorg ik bloemwerk voor elke gelegenheid: feestelijke boeketten, Bruids & afscheidsbloemwerk, tot complete aankledingen op locatie. 

Mijn hart ligt bij afscheidsbloemwerk - het is bijzonder en enorm waardevol om nabestaande te helpen hun gevoelens te verwoorden in een persoonlijk en liefdevol bloemwerk. 

Wat typeert mij:
- Creatief
- Persoonlijke aandacht en oprechte interesse
- Passie voor bloemen

Nieuwsgierig wat ik voor jou kan betekenen? Neem gerust contact op!

Name: Stunning Flowers & Gifts
Description:
Based in Montreal, Stunning specializes in crafting exquisite floral arrangements that bring life and elegance to corporate environments and events. Whether it's decorating a grand corporate celebration, designing a welcoming reception area, or adding inspiration to conference rooms, we tailor our designs to reflect your brand's identity and enhance every occasion.

Our creations are more than just flowers; they’re expressions of success, milestones, and creativity. From celebrating promotions with sophisticated bouquets to creating unforgettable event décor, we partner with you to ensure every arrangement resonates with your vision and leaves a lasting impression.

What we offer: 
 Corporate Event Décor: Events—conferences, galas, or company parties—into memorable experiences with tailored floral designs.
 Office and Reception Arrangements: Workplace ambiance with fresh, welcoming floral displays.
 Special Celebrations: Celebrate milestones like promotions or new positions with bespoke arrangements that honor these achievements in style.

Let us redefine elegance in your corporate spaces—bringing creativity, color, and charm!

We infuse spaces, events, and special occasions with our distinctive blend of refinement and bold creativity. Beyond florals, we offer an exclusive range of celebratory essentials, floral-inspired apparel, and curated home decor. Name: Nina & Valentin - Worldwide Flower & Gift Delivery
Description:
Since its founding in 2010, online florist and gift store Nina and Valentin has been sending messages and bringing people closer together with flowers and premium gifts every day, together with your help.

Our mission is to send messages of thanks and love, to create closeness between people who trust us to deliver selected gifts with care and on time. We turn every day into a special occasion. If you want to send a bouquet or a thank-you gift, say "I love you", "Best wishes" or simply "I'm thinking of you", you can always count on us.

We have only one goal: to share happiness with you and help you choose a suitable gift for your loved ones, which is why we also cooperate with florists in more than 185 countries, which allows us to successfully and in a short time arrange the delivery of flowers and gifts in any country of the world.

Gift giving should be fun, joyful and easy! We believe that gift giving creates happiness and brings people together. We want to help create happier moments wherever your loved ones and business partners are!

Description:
With a well-rooted background in wedding planning and styling, our love for flowers and all things pretty led to the launch of House of Flowers. 

We source the freshest blooms, arrange them with love and care, and deliver them to homes and offices around the city. A popular offering is our floral subscription service - for someone who loves flowers, we’ll do our best to surprise and intrigue the receiver on an ongoing basis. 

The team is also happy to bring in its innovative styling vision to a wedding, corporate event or special occasion. We have been lending our distinctive brand of floral beauty to wedding décor, print shoots and notable events in India and beyond.

Name: AR FLOWERS
Description:
At AR Flowers, we believe that flowers have the power to transform any space and elevate every moment. We are passionate about providing fresh, beautiful, and sustainably sourced floral designs that leave a lasting impression. Whether it's a special occasion, a corporate event, or simply adding a touch of nature to your day, our team is here to deliver exquisite, personalized arrangements that cater to your unique vision.

We take pride in offering a diverse range of floral solutions—each carefully curated with attention to detail and a focus on quality. From timeless classics to trendy floral styles, AR Flowers is committed to delivering only the finest blooms that bring joy and beauty into your life.

We are a well-known wholesaler, trader, supplier, and exporter of Fresh Flowers, Natural Lotus, Natural Roses, and many more varieties. Additionally, we offer Boxed Flower Arrangement Services, providing a unique and elegant way to present your flowers. We strive to deliver these products at market-leading prices, ensuring quality without compromise.

Join us in celebrating life’s special moments, one bloom at a time!

Name: True Love Roses Inc
Description:
True Love Roses is a family-owned floral distributor and merchandising partner with over 20 years of experience serving national retailers. Based in the Midwest, we specialize in full-service, vendor-managed floral programs that deliver fresh bouquets directly to stores — no labor required from staff and no inventory loss! 

We currently service over 700 stores including Walgreens, CVS, Speedway, 711, Westco and select convenience retailers, providing:

Weekly delivery & merchandising

Holiday-focused bouquet programs (Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, etc.)

Proven sell-through with reduced shrink

Turn-key floral displays that drive impulse sales

Our mission is simple! Bring joy and beauty into people's lives by providing fresh, high quality floral bouquets, prepared and delivered with care, passion, and a personal touch! 

 Interested in partnering with us? Message us here on LinkedIn or contact our team at Connect@trueloveroses.com

From the variety to the number of stems, from the color choice to the composition, bouquets carry meaning, heart, and passion. Picking the right one is a tall order! At Casa di Fiori we work with you to create arrangements fitted to your aesthetic, event and budget. Our Florists are artists and love to collaborate with you for a final product you or your loved one will adore!

Nos prestations s’adressent aux entreprises, à l’hôtellerie, à la restauration et à l’événementiel : bureaux, halls d’accueil, hôtels, restaurants, événements professionnels et marques engagées.

Name: Harbitz Blomster
Description:
Din lokale blomsterbutikk i Oslo!

Bestill blomster rett hjem! Vi leverer i hele Oslo. 
Bestill fra nettbutikken, wolt, foodora, amoi eller besøk Harbitz Blomster på Skøyen
 
Harbitz Blomster holder til i Oslo på Skøyen på Harbitz Torg.  Hos oss blir du møtt av våre blomsterdekoratører som binder oppsatser etter ditt ønske.  Enten du er på utkikk etter gave til en god venn, eller vil unne deg noe fint hjemme.

Harbitz Blomster har utspill fra Bislett Blomster i Thereses gate i Oslo, en liten butikk som har levert blomster og planter i over 40 år.

Harbitz Blomster er en unik og koselig butikk,som hadde vår første åpningsdag 11. september 2020. 
Vi har som mål å skape en butikk som kan glede og inspirere!

Velkommen til Harbitz Blomster!

Name: Mari Vanna Studio
Description:
Našim klientům nabízíme možnost zakoupit si permanentní předplatné našich služeb, ať už se jedná o pravidelnou výzdobu domova, kanceláří, hotelů a restaurací či předplacené dárky pro rodinu a kolegy. Významnou část naší společnosti tvoří Business to Business služby.

Prioritou jsou pro nás estetika, kvalita, rychlost a přesnost. Čas je vzácný a my si jej velice vážíme. Proto Vám chceme usnadnit přípravu k jakékoli sváteční příležitosti. S námi nebudete muset myslet na to, kdo z příbuzných má narozeniny; co dostanou Vaši zaměstnanci k Vánocům; jak si vyzdobit salon, kancelář či restauraci. Děláme také svatby a v neposlední řadě rádi přivezeme květiny až k Vašim dveřím a jedinečným způsobem je naaranžujeme na Váš noční stolek.

Zkrátka a jednoduše – postaráme se o vše!

Na následujících stránkách Vás necháme nahlédnout do toho, co umíme – jedná se však se o pouhý zlomek našich možností a dovedností. Neváhejte se na nás proto obrátit s čímkoli, co zahrnuje naši největší lásku – květiny!

S úctou a přáním krásného dne,
Tým Mari Vanna Studio

Name: Sunny Day Flowers
Description:
Brighten the day with Sunny Day Flowers, an award-winning floral business based in Clovis, California.

Operating from our cozy private studio, we specialize in the design and creation of custom flower arrangements for any occasion. Whether you're looking for a stunning bouquet for a wedding, a grab and go arrangement for a special event, or a touch of nature to brighten your home, we've got you covered.

Custom Floral Arrangements: Handcrafted with care, tailored to your unique vision and style.

Award-Winning Service: Proud recipient of the "Best of Fresno" Silver Award 2024, a testament to our commitment to excellence.

Convenient Options: Order for delivery, pickup, or visit our booth at the Clovis Friday Night Market.

Flowers are more than just a product—they're joy incarnate. We believe in the power of flowers to convey emotions, celebrate milestones, and bring beauty into everyday life.

Let's brighten the day together!

We create bespoke arrangements and bouquets, floral design, and décor for events, including weddings, showers, birthdays, anniversaries, holidays, and special occasions. In addition to live bouquets and arrangements, we also specialize in Forever Flowers: hand-dyed wooden flower arrangements mixed with preserved flowers, greens, grasses, and other accompaniments. These arrangements require no water, sunlight, or upkeep, and last forever - providing a more permanent decor option. Whether it's simple bouquets or large-scale events, we take the time to listen to your needs, make your vision a reality, and create unforgettable memories for your life's most important moments.

Name: Pinotti - San Benedetto Po
Description:
L'azienda nasce a San Benedetto Po nel 1961, creata da Lino Pinotti. Grazie all'impegno e al talento dei suoi figli, l'attività si è specializzata nella vendita di fiori, piante e articoli per animali.
Oggi, la bottega è un punto di riferimento del territorio, nota per la qualità e la creatività racchiusa in ogni singola composizione floreale, la vastissima scelta di piante, sia per interni che per esterni, e le infinite idee regalo. L'amore per la natura si accosta a quello per i nostri amici animali, con un'ampia gamma di prodotti selezionati, dal cibo alle cuccie, passando per giocattoli e accessori.
L'azienda ha sempre messo al centro della propria attività la qualità dei prodotti e dei servizi offerti, portando avanti la tradizione familiare con passione e dedizione. Vi aspettiamo per accogliervi nella nostra storia ed entrare nella vostra per creare con voi i ricordi più belli!

Name: Made for you flower shop
Description:
At Made For You Flowers, we believe that unforgettable events are the result of strong partnerships, creative collaboration, and attention to detail.

As a full-service floral design and event production company based in North County San Diego, we specialize in working alongside wedding venues, planners, coordinators, and fellow vendors to bring our clients’ visions to life. From luxury weddings to intimate elopements, corporate functions, and private celebrations — our team is committed to delivering a seamless and elevated experience for both clients and our industry partners.

Vendor Collaboration Is at the Heart of What We Do:
	•	Reliable & professional communication from inquiry to strike
	•	Flexible floral packages that fit a variety of client budgets & visions
	•	Experience working with venues of all sizes, including venue-approved insurance & licensing
	•	On-site event production support, including design setup, styling, and floral installations
	•	Options to incorporate content creation services for mutual marketing benefit

We are always looking to build lasting relationships with venues, planners, coordinators, photographers, rental companies, and vendors who share a commitment to service, quality, and client experience.

If you’re looking for a florist and design partner who values collaboration and consistency, I’d love to connect and explore how we can work together.

Let’s create beautiful events — together.

Name: Helianthus USA
Description:
Helianthus USA is a timeless floral world where nature leads the way.

Since 1990, Helianthus has been more than just a flower business. It is a true sensory experience, a place where lush greenery and vibrant floral compositions awaken the senses and ignite the imagination.

 Our signature style consists of original floral creations, sometimes wild, sometimes meticulously crafted, but always designed to elevate life’s most meaningful moments. From grand openings, VIP receptions, and art exhibitions to luxury hotels, fine dining venues, private celebrations, as well as intimate occasions such as births, weddings, birthdays, communions, or memorials.

Inspired by nature, our house nurtures emotion, creativity, and a deep respect for life. Every composition tells a story, shaped with passion by genuine floral artists.

 Based in Miami, Helianthus USA continues this legacy with a contemporary vision of floral design that blends art, style, and timeless elegance.

Name: Rosebella Flowers
Description:
İstanbul’da yer alan butik lüks çiçekçi mağazamız, estetik tasarımları ve taptaze çiçekleriyle eşsiz bir çiçek deneyimi sunuyor. Hollanda’dan özenle ithal ettiğimiz yüksek kaliteli güller, laleler ve şakayıklar başta olmak üzere geniş bir çiçek yelpazesiyle, her anı özel ve unutulmaz kılmak için çalışıyoruz.

Usta tasarımcılarımız, zarif buketler ve sofistike aranjmanlarla yalnızca bir çiçek değil, aynı zamanda bir sanat eseri sunar. Şehrin dört bir yanına güvenilir teslimat hizmetimizle, hem kişisel hem de kurumsal çiçek ihtiyaçlarınıza profesyonel çözümler sunuyoruz.

Doğanın zarafetini, yaratıcılıkla buluşturduğumuz mağazamızda, sadece bir çiçek değil, duyguları ve güzelliği yaşatıyoruz. Özel günlerden şirket etkinliklerine kadar her türlü ihtiyacınız için yanınızdayız.

 Kalite, şıklık ve tutkunun buluştuğu adres.
 İstanbul’un lüks çiçek tasarım merkezi.

Takip edin ve doğanın eşsiz güzelliğini birlikte keşfedelim!

Description:
Dikeydekor.com şirketimiz, estetik ve fonksiyonelliği bir araya getirerek mekanlarınızı özel kılmayı amaçlayan bir tasarım ve dekorasyon şirketidir.

Misyonumuz: Müşterilerimizin benzersiz ihtiyaçlarına odaklanarak, estetik ve fonksiyonelliği birleştirerek yaşam alanlarını dönüştürmek ve kişiselleştirmek.

Vizyonumuz: Tasarım ve dekorasyon alanında öncü olmak, müşterilerimizin beklentilerini aşarak sürdürülebilir ve estetik bir yaşam alanı yaratmak.

Değerlerimiz:
1.	Müşteri Memnuniyeti: Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeye çıkarmak için kaliteli ürünler ve hizmetler sunmak.
2.	İnovasyon: Sürekli olarak yeni tasarım trendlerini takip ederek yenilikçi ve özgün çözümler sunmak.
3.	İş Ahlakı: Etiğe uygun, şeffaf ve dürüst bir iş yapma anlayışına bağlı kalmak.

Neden Dikey Dekor?
•	Kişiselleştirilmiş Tasarımlar: Her müşterinin özel ihtiyaçlarına odaklanarak tasarlanmış benzersiz dekorasyon çözümleri.
•	Kalite ve Dayanıklılık: Yüksek kaliteli malzemeler ve işçilikle üretilen ürünlerimizle uzun ömürlü kullanım sağlıyoruz.
•	Profesyonel Ekibimiz: Deneyimli ve uzman tasarım ekibimiz, projenizin her aşamasında size rehberlik eder.

İş Birliği ve Ortaklıklar: Linkedin hesabımız aracılığıyla kurumsal yapıya uygun firmalarla iş birliği yapmaktan ve sektördeki diğer profesyonellerle iletişim kurmaktan memnuniyet duyarız. Siz de bizimle tanışmak ve iş birliği olanakları hakkında konuşmak için bize ulaşabilirsiniz.

Teşekkür ederiz.

Name: Yuan Bei Ecotaller
Description:
En Yuan Bei Ecotaller transformamos la relación entre el arte, la cultura y la naturaleza. Somos un espacio creativo y sostenible en Manizales, Colombia, donde unimos el arte del bonsái, la alfarería artesanal y el diseño de materos de autor inspirados en la cultura precolombina. Nuestro propósito es crear experiencias y piezas únicas que conecten a personas y organizaciones con la historia, la identidad cultural y la sostenibilidad ambiental.

Cada obra nace de la fusión entre lo ancestral y lo contemporáneo. Elaboramos materos con arcilla y materiales eco amigables, texturizados y cargados de símbolos precolombinos que dialogan con el bonsái, un arte milenario que representa paciencia, resiliencia y armonía con la naturaleza. El resultado son piezas vivas que embellecen espacios, inspiran emociones y transmiten un mensaje de equilibrio y respeto por el medio ambiente.

Apostamos por la economía creativa y la artesanía contemporánea como motores de desarrollo cultural y económico. Impulsamos un modelo de economía circular, trabajando con responsabilidad ambiental y un fuerte enfoque en la innovación cultural. Nuestro público abarca desde coleccionistas y amantes del arte, hasta empresas y organizaciones que buscan integrar la sostenibilidad en sus estrategias de bienestar, cultura y responsabilidad social.

Ofrecemos productos y experiencias con propósito: regalos corporativos sostenibles, programas culturales, talleres vivenciales y alianzas estratégicas que fortalecen la conexión entre naturaleza, identidad y comunidad.

Nuestro lema, “La esencia de la naturaleza y la historia en tus manos”, refleja lo que somos: un espacio que diseña futuro desde las raíces, donde cada creación es más que un objeto: es cultura, conciencia y vida.

Name: Coroas 24 horas Online
Description:
A Coroas 24 Horas é especialista na criação de coroas de flores sofisticadas, confeccionadas com flores frescas, arranjos harmoniosos e entrega rápida, todos os dias da semana.

Mais do que flores, entregamos homenagens. Sabemos que se despedir de alguém especial é uma das experiências mais difíceis da vida — e é justamente por isso que cada detalhe importa. Em meio à dor e ao silêncio que a perda traz, uma coroa de flores se transforma em um gesto de amor, de gratidão e de respeito. Ela fala por você quando as palavras não são suficientes.

Entendemos que cada despedida merece ser marcada com sensibilidade, beleza e significado. Por isso, nossas coroas são confeccionadas com atenção a cada flor, cor e composição, sempre unindo estética, equilíbrio e qualidade. Cada arranjo é feito para transmitir conforto, acolher corações e eternizar memórias.

Oferecemos uma variedade de estilos, opções de personalização e um atendimento ágil e empático — tudo para que você possa prestar uma última homenagem à altura de quem partiu. Um gesto que simboliza tudo o que foi vivido, sentido e compartilhado.

Conte conosco nesse momento. Porque dizer adeus também é uma forma profunda de amar.

Name: Athletic Club Flower Shop
Description:
Athletic Club Flower Shop has been a Downtown Los Angeles floral landmark since 1916, providing handcrafted arrangements, same-day delivery, and personalized service for over a century. As a small, independent, family-owned shop, we focus on quality, creativity, and genuine care—bringing fresh flowers and thoughtful design to every order.

We specialize in everyday arrangements, corporate arrangements, sympathy florals, and event pieces, serving both local customers and people nationwide who want to send flowers to someone in Los Angeles. Our shop blends traditional craftsmanship with modern design, offering a curated mix of seasonal blooms, unique color palettes, and artistic compositions you won’t find in big-box floral services.

Our mission is simple: make every arrangement personal. Whether someone is celebrating, grieving, thanking, or surprising a loved one, we treat every order with intention. With deep roots in the DTLA community, our shop continues to evolve while staying true to the values that have kept us thriving since 1916—authenticity, care, and exceptional service.

We offer:
• Same-day flower delivery across Los Angeles
• Custom arrangements for corporate offices and events
• Sympathy and funeral florals
• Modern everyday bouquets with premium blooms
• Personalized service from a small, dedicated team

If you’re looking for a trusted Los Angeles florist with a century-long legacy—and a commitment to craftsmanship—we’d love to create something beautiful for you.
Visit us at www.acflowershop.com

From everyday bouquets to thoughtful arrangements for life’s big and quiet moments, we believe flowers should feel personal. We offer same-day delivery across LA and take pride in doing things the right way.

After more than a century in business, we’ve learned a thing or two: stay curious, stay kind, and don’t cut corners. Our flowers may change with the seasons, but our commitment to quality and connection is the real constant.

Name: Bloemen Babette & Co BV
Description:
Mijn passie voor bloemen kwam tot bloei toen ik 20 jaar geleden werkte bij Bloemenkiosk Liberty in het centrum van Antwerpen.

Tijdens en na deze periode volgde ik diverse vakgerichte opleidingen in Nederland en in België. Na deze periode in Hartje Antwerpen heb ik nog bij een aantal andere bloemisten in de regio Antwerpen gewerkt.

Uiteindelijk ben ik verhuisd naar Sint Job in ’t Goor waar Daniel Gabriels, “Dany” na 38 jaar zijn winkeldeuren sloot waarna ik heb besloten mijn droom te verwezenlijken, namelijk mijn eigen bloemenwinkel openen.

Zo is in oktober 2016 Bloemen Babette geboren in de Handelslei 7 te Sint Job. Alle contacten die ik in de loop der jaren heb verzameld met kwekers en groothandels zijn hier inmiddels allemaal samengebundeld en komen hier perfect tot hun recht.

Name: Moss Mom Gardens
Description:
Welcome to Moss Mom Gardens — where healing, art, and nature meet in miniature.

Founded in the Pacific Northwest and rooted in a deep love for foraging, sustainability, and storytelling, Moss Mom Gardens offers handcrafted moss gardens, terrariums, and nature-based sensory products that connect people to the earth—and to themselves.

Each garden is made with locally foraged moss and upcycled vessels, turning discarded glassware into living art. From poetic tributes to whimsical fairy homes, our pieces invite reflection, creativity, and joy. We offer seasonal collections, custom commissions, and themed series—like our Five-Senses Gardens, Storybook Gardens, and the playful Moss Scouts line for young nature lovers.

At the heart of everything we do is a mission: to spark connection, reduce waste, and honor the quiet magic found in nature. Whether gifted as a memorial, displayed in a home, or used in a therapeutic setting, every Moss Mom creation is crafted with intention and care.

We also offer nature-based workshops through Moss University, including mindfulness programs, poetry therapy, and DIY team-building experiences for companies and community groups.

Moss Mom Gardens is woman-owned, mission-driven, and inspired by generations of plant-loving matriarchs. Our guiding belief? “You are rooted in love and growing every day.”

Join us as we grow something beautiful—together.

www.mossmom.com
Instagram, TikTok & Etsy: @mossmomgardens
#Mosstok | #FairyMossMother | #RootedInMagic

Name: Flor&More
Description:
Flor&More is redefining the flower shop experience with a unique approach that combines modern design, high-quality products, and customer-centric services. We are committed to creating memorable moments through our innovative floristry solutions, offering a fresh perspective in the industry.

What Makes Us Different?
Exclusive Flower Collection: Our bouquets and floral arrangements are crafted with care, featuring flowers directly imported from Africa and South America for unmatched freshness and longevity.
Premium Location Design: Our flower shops are strategically located in high-traffic areas, such as supermarket parking lots, with eye-catching, modern designs that enhance the urban landscape and attract customers.
Comprehensive Product Range: From elegant vases and floral accessories to scented candles, we provide everything to elevate your floral experience.
Innovative Customer Experience: With pre-made arrangements and quick delivery options, we prioritize convenience without compromising quality.

Why Choose Flor&More Franchise?
Proven Business Model: With multiple locations already established and 24 more planned, we offer a tested and scalable opportunity for success.
Transparent and Fair Practices: Clear pricing, detailed floral care tips, and a customer-focused approach ensure satisfaction at every level.
Ongoing Support: From training to operational guidance, our team ensures your journey as a franchise partner is smooth and profitable.
Strategic Partnerships: Our direct import model and advanced storage solutions provide cost efficiency and quality assurance, giving franchisees a competitive edge.

At Flor&More, we’re more than a flower shop—we’re a growing community built on beauty, innovation, and excellence. Ready to be part of a thriving business? Let’s grow together!

 Contact us to learn more about our franchise opportunities and become a partner in success.

Name: Planten.nu
Description:
Planten.nu is een online platform waar je rechtstreeks planten kunt kopen van kwekers. Dit biedt een aantal voordelen voor zowel de consument als de kweker. Voor de consument betekent het dat je toegang hebt tot een breed scala aan planten die vaak verser zijn dan die in traditionele tuincentra. Omdat de planten rechtstreeks van de kweker komen, zijn ze doorgaans gezonder en beter verzorgd. Daarnaast kan de prijs vaak lager zijn, omdat er minder tussenpersonen zijn die een marge nemen. 
  
Voor kwekers is het een uitstekende manier om hun producten direct aan de consument te leveren en zo een breder publiek te bereiken. Het elimineert de noodzaak van tussenhandelaren en kan de kosten van logistiek en distributie verlagen. Bovendien hebben kwekers meer controle over de presentatie en verkoop van hun producten, wat kan leiden tot een betere klanttevredenheid en merkloyaliteit. Door rechtstreeks te verkopen, kunnen kwekers ook waardevolle feedback krijgen van consumenten, wat hen kan helpen hun producten en service te verbeteren. 
  
Het gebruik van een online platform zoals Planten.nu maakt het kopen van planten ook eenvoudiger en toegankelijker. Consumenten kunnen vanuit hun eigen huis bladeren door een uitgebreid aanbod, gedetailleerde productinformatie bekijken en gemakkelijk bestellingen plaatsen. Dit is vooral handig voor mensen die geen tijd of mogelijkheid hebben om naar een fysiek tuincentrum te gaan. Bovendien kunnen klanten vaak gebruik maken van extra diensten zoals plantadvies, waardoor ze beter geïnformeerde keuzes kunnen maken. Kortom, Planten.nu biedt een handige, efficiënte en voordelige manier voor zowel consumenten als kwekers om van elkaars aanbod te profiteren

Les décorations sont disponibles à la vente en Edition Limitée, afin de vous proposer une large gamme de produits toujours aussi variés. Nous effectuons la livraison, partout en France*.

Nous travaillons dans le respect des saisons et des couleurs. Le choix des matériaux, gage de qualité, est essentiel pour nous, c’est pourquoi nous tendons à travailler dans le respect de ces valeurs qui sont les nôtres.

Toutes les décorations proposées sont personnalisables. Nous prenons le temps, avec vous, d’étudier, avec soin, chacun de vos projets, afin de satisfaire au mieux vos attentes, pour toujours mieux vous faire plaisir et faire plaisir à vos proches.

Name: Aynı Gün Çiçek
Description:
Aynı Gün Çiçek, İstanbul genelinde aynı gün teslimat ve seçili bölgelerde 30 dakikaya varan ekspres teslimat sunan teknoloji odaklı bir çiçek ve hediye platformudur. Çiçek göndermenin çoğu zaman anlık bir ihtiyaç olduğunu biliyor, hız ve kaliteyi bir araya getirerek kullanıcı deneyimini yeniden tanımlıyoruz. Operasyon ve e-ticaret tecrübesine sahip kurucu ekibimiz, hizmet seviyesini ölçülebilir standartlarla yönetir ve sürekli geliştirir.

Neden Aynı Gün Çiçek

Uçtan uca kontrol: Kendi operasyon merkezlerimizde, uzman çiçek ustalarımızla tüm süreci baştan sona yönetiriz.

Tazelik standardı: Ürünler kalite kontrolünden geçer, taze ve uzun ömürlü olarak teslim edilir.

Görünen ürün, teslim edilen ürün: Seçtiğiniz aranjman, görselde gördüğünüz kompozisyon ile eşleşecek şekilde hazırlanır.

Hızlı lojistik: Optimizasyonlu rota planlama ve yakın stok yönetimi ile gecikmeleri minimuma indiririz.

Şeffaf deneyim: Siparişinizin her adımını anlık olarak takip edebilirsiniz.

Müşteri Memnuniyeti ve Güvence

Hizmet kalitemizi düzenli olarak ölçer, memnuniyet oranımızı yüksek tutarız. Herhangi bir memnuniyetsizlikte koşulsuz ürün değişimi ya da ücret iadesi sağlarız. Müşteri ekibimiz, özel anların değerini bilerek çözüm odaklı hareket eder ve düzenli eğitimlerle standartlarını yükseltir.

2025 Yol Haritası

2025 boyunca İstanbul kapsamasını ekspres teslimat ile genişletmeyi hedefliyoruz. Ankara ve İzmir’de operasyon hazırlıklarımızı tamamlayarak faaliyete geçmeyi planlıyoruz. Web sitemizi daha yalın ve hızlı bir deneyim sunacak şekilde geliştirirken, yılın ilk çeyreğinde mobil uygulamamızı yayınlayacağız.

Misyonumuz

Paydaşlarımızı yenilikçi ve güvenilir iş modelleriyle buluşturmak, veri ve teknoloji ile desteklenen süreçler üzerinden sektörün en beğenilen çiçek ve hediye platformu olmak.

Vizyonumuz

Teknoloji, hız ve kaliteyi birlikte ölçekleyerek müşteri deneyiminde yeni standartlar oluşturmak ve kısa sürede lider platform haline gelmek.
