Name: SJÖ Flora
Description:
Preserved flowers are perceived as luxury goods. But to us, our mission is to make it practical and memorable. And by succeeding this, it's the value behind that we are looking at. According to Don Norman's TedTalk, a good design that makes you happy is when it is really beautifully balance, functional and there is a story to be told.

All our flower products are meticulously produced and require highly skilled craftsmanship. Starting from sourcing inspiring preserved and dried flower materials, to putting thoughts in creating each designs, to curating each pieces of flowers and fillers, and to the final packaging. We put lots of time and effort in crafting it for you because we know it will definitely worth it.
SJÖ means seven in Icelandic. It represents our favourite number, our birth dates and our shared love for Iceland’s minimalist style. By browsing our product descriptions, you probably get to know more about Iceland and even the myths. We are not Icelander. We are just people who embrace equality, appreciate art, enjoy music and love nature.

We are currently a one-and-a-half man team. We understand that you might be eager to get a response from us quickly, but we only have one and a half pair of hands to craft preserved flower arrangements and to arrange flower deliveries. So, we seek for your kind patience when placing orders with us. However, do not let this deter you from contacting us! We are always happy to hear from you, and strive to get back to you soonest.

Name: Ecodecs
Description:
Ecodecs lleva 5 años creando Terrarios Autosuficientes de calidad superior artesanalmente hechos en Málaga. Ofrecemos soluciones verdes integrales para empresas, fusionando artesanía y sostenibilidad en entornos corporativos mediante nuestros terrarios y servicios B2B.

 PROBLEMA QUE RESOLVEMOS

Las oficinas y espacios corporativos carecen de elementos vivos que mejoren el bienestar y la productividad. Las plantas requieren mantenimiento constante, las decoraciones plásticas no aportan valor real y los eventos de team building suelen ser impersonales.

 NUESTROS SERVICIOS B2B

Leasing de Terrarios
– Decoración biofílica continua sin inversión de capital
– Mantenimiento mínimo: 1 cucharadita de agua al mes
– Desgravación fiscal por bienestar laboral (wellness) y certificaciones de sostenibilidad

Kits de Bienvenida Corporativos
– Terrarios compactos con serigrafiado personalizado del logo y mensaje de la empresa
– Ideal para onboarding y regalos de bienvenida con impacto emocional y sostenible

Terrarios para Eventos
– Diseños exclusivos con tapa de corcho serigrafiada a medida
– Detalles memorables para conferencias, ferias y actos corporativos
– Recuerdo vivo que refuerza la marca en cada despacho o hogar

Talleres de Team-Building
– Actividades prácticas para grupos: desde la selección de materiales hasta el montaje final
– Fomenta la colaboración, la creatividad y el enfoque sostenible
– Adaptable a reuniones off-site o modalidad online con envío previo de kits

 APLICACIONES
– Salas de reuniones, zonas comunes y puestos de trabajo
– Áreas de bienestar y cafeterías corporativas
– Regalos de empresa y actos de fidelización


Diseñado y ensamblado a mano por estudiantes de la Universidad de Málaga. Utilizamos cristal premium, musgo bola danés y colembolos para crear ecosistemas autosostenibles que evolucionan en el tiempo y resistentes a envíos.

 NUESTRO COMPROMISO
Impulsar el bienestar y la productividad en entornos corporativos mediante soluciones verdes.

Name: Flower Shop Rayen Puerto Varas
Description:
In our flower store, we believe that beauty is an art that is cultivated with love and dedication. Every day I seek to offer an exquisite selection of flowers and floral arrangements, so you can find the perfect combination for every occasion.

Each flower has its own personality, its own character, by putting them together in a floral arrangement we can create a work of art that reflects your deepest feelings, there is a flower for every occasion and for every taste, a red rose for a first kiss, or a black rose to express a great burden.

Whether to express love, happiness, gratitude or condolences, our flowers are designed to move and surprise. Come visit us and let yourself be carried away by the beauty of our floral arrangements, we are sure you will find the perfect flower for every occasion.

Name: BlomstOp
Description:
Jeg er en selvstændig blomsterhåndværker, der specialiserer mig i skabelse og levering af skræddersyede blomsterarrangementer, dekorationer og pynt. Min ekspertise omfatter en bred vifte af begivenheder, herunder begravelser, bryllupper, festlige lejligheder og virksomhedsevents.

Jeg er kendt for min urokkelige forpligtelse til håndværkets kunst, og jeg går aldrig på kompromis med kvaliteten af mine produkter. Mit mål er altid at overskride forventningerne ved at levere smukt udformede og mindeværdige blomsterarrangementer, der afspejler min kundes unikke vision og æstetik.

Jeg har også en bred erfaring med at arbejde sammen med virksomheder for at skabe betagende og indbydende dekorationer til konferencer, møder og firmaevents. Jeg forstår, hvor vigtigt det er at skabe den rette atmosfære og præsentation for at gøre din virksomhedsevent mindeværdig og professionel.

Min personlige tilgang indebærer et tæt samarbejde med mine kunder for at forstå deres ønsker og behov. Jeg arbejder hånd i hånd med dig for at skabe den helt rigtige stil og farvesammensætning, der passer perfekt til den stemning og udstråling, du søger at opnå ved din begivenhed.

Jeg er dedikeret til at gøre dine begivenheder, uanset om de er private eller forretningsmæssige, mindeværdige og smukke gennem min lidenskab og ekspertise inden for blomsterdekorering. Jeg opfordrer dig til at følge min profil på Facebook (@BlomstOp) eller Instagram (Blomst_Op) for at se eksempler på mit arbejde og lade dig inspirere til din næste begivenhed.

Alt vores blomsterarbejde udføres med omhu og opmærksomhed på detaljer. Jeg tilbyder også en selvbetjeningsbod, der er åben alle dage, beliggende på Hestehavebakken 60, Kalundborg. Du kan kontakte mig på Blomstop@hotmail.com eller telefonisk på 30512446 for at drøfte dine blomsterbehov og begivenheder.

Name: Hobby Haven ApS
Description:
Hos Hobby Haven hjælper vi vores kunder med at opfylde drømme og ideér til bolig og haveliv. 

Hobby Haven er en hyggelig familie ejet planteskole og havecenter i udkanten af Aarhus. Planteskolen er fra ca. 1945 hvor Peter Jørgensen startede at sælge og producerer stedsegrønne haveplanter til gartnere og private i Aarhus området.

I dag er det 3. generation der driver Aarhus hyggelige havecenter og du kan gå på opdagelse i en spændende butik der altid er i udvikling.
Som kunde bliver du mødt af fagligt passionerede ansatte der gerne vil hjælpe og rådgive  dig med dine haveprojekter.

Butikken fører desuden et fint udvalg af planter til stuen, blomsterbuketter, interiør til bolig og haveliv samt masser af smagfulde delikatesser 

Vi søger jævnligt kvalificerede og fagligt dygtige gartner og andet personale der har lyst til at give vores kunder den allerbedste service.

Description:

Levering & Afhaalopties: Bezoek ons aan de Dorpstraat 3 of kies voor gemak met onze betrouwbare bezorgservice.

Bij 't Hoekje combineren we vakmanschap met passie voor natuur om de schoonheid en vreugde van bloemen en planten toegankelijk te maken voor iedereen. We zijn trots op onze persoonlijke service en streven ernaar om elke klantinteractie uniek en gedenkwaardig te maken.

Volg ons voor de laatste updates, aanbiedingen en inspiratie voor uw volgende aankoop. Of u nu uw kantoorruimte wilt opfleuren, een speciale gelegenheid plant, of gewoon een leuk boeket voor thuis wil hebben, wij staan voor u klaar.

''Wij verrassen u in het oude centrum van Maassluis''

De frisse en vrolijke kleuren van het voorjaar geven het bloemwerk een gezellige uitstraling. De zomerkleuren geven het bloemwerk een zomers gevoel. De herfstkleuren zijn warm en gezellig. De winterkleuren is een verrassing? Wij werken zo duurzaam mogelijk omdat de natuur belangrijk is.

Name: Napuplant
Description:
"Todo al verde"
Apostamos por un mundo más verde, mejorando tu vida con productos naturales que transforman tus espacios.

Quiénes somos:
En Napuplant, nos dedicamos a la producción de plantas y flores locales, llevando cultivos frescos directamente de nuestra tierra a tu hogar, sin intermediarios.

Nuestro compromiso:
 Sostenibilidad: Cuidamos del medio ambiente con prácticas responsables y naturales.
 Proximidad: Entregamos plantas frescas y cercanas, conectando la tierra con tu hogar.
 Calidad y frescura: Cada planta llega en su mejor estado, directamente desde nuestros viveros.

¿Qué hacemos?
 Producción y venta de plantas y flores locales.

Customer service is at the heart of everything we do at Flowerama, and there is perhaps no better example of this than our extended hours of operation. Simply put, we cannot provide you excellent customer service if we are not open to meet your needs. Thus, we believe our best ability is our availability. As one of, if not the only flower shop in the area open seven days a week and well into the evening, Flowerama stands ready, willing and able to exceed your expectations.
Driven by a "don't say no" customer service policy, Flowerama believes there is a solution to every problem. We understand that each client that walks into Flowerama has a different taste and style as well as differing occasions to celebrate and/or honor. Periwinkle Flowers is a Toronto-based flower studio specializing in corporate floral services that help businesses celebrate, honor, and connect. From employee appreciation gifts to client bouquets, our arrangements bring a touch of elegance and thoughtfulness to every professional milestone.

We understand the importance of reliable, high-quality service in the corporate world. That’s why our team is dedicated to creating custom flower arrangements that reflect your brand’s values, whether it's for employee recognition, corporate events, or meaningful life events like sympathy arrangements. Our unique designs feature seasonal blooms and vibrant colors, crafted with a garden-style aesthetic that brightens any space, from the boardroom to your clients’ homes.

Our Services Include:

    Corporate Gifting: Delight your clients and partners with fresh, stunning floral arrangements perfect for thank-you gifts, milestone celebrations, and important events.
    Employee Appreciation: Show gratitude to your team with custom-made arrangements ideal for birthdays, work anniversaries, and special recognitions.
    Sympathy Flowers: Express compassion with thoughtfully crafted sympathy arrangements, delivered promptly to funeral homes or family residences throughout Toronto.
   Event Florals: Elevate your corporate gatherings with our seasonal centerpieces and table arrangements, designed to impress at holiday parties, meetings, and team events.
Our service includes premium packaging and hand-delivery across Toronto, ensuring your floral gifts arrive beautifully and on time. As a trusted partner for many Toronto businesses, we’re committed to creating a seamless, memorable gifting experience that aligns with your organization’s values.
Connect with us to discuss how Periwinkle Flowers can support your corporate gifting and event needs.

Name: floral.id
Description:
Selamat datang di Floral.id! Kami adalah destinasi utama Anda untuk keindahan bunga dan aransemen bunga yang memukau.

 Tentang Kami
Floral.id adalah lebih dari sekadar florist; kami adalah kreator pengalaman berbunga yang memadukan sentuhan artistik, keahlian floristik, dan keinginan untuk memberikan keceriaan melalui bunga.

 Misi Kami
Misi kami adalah membawa keindahan alam ke dalam kehidupan sehari-hari melalui bunga-bunga yang dipilih dengan teliti. Kami percaya bahwa setiap bunga memiliki cerita, dan kami ingin membantu Anda menyampaikan perasaan dan pesan Anda melalui keindahan alam yang tumbuh.

 Keunggulan Kami

Bunga Segar Berkualitas Tinggi: Kami hanya menggunakan bunga-bunga segar dan berkualitas terbaik dalam setiap rangkaian bunga.

Desain Kreatif: Tim floris kami yang berbakat menciptakan aransemen yang unik dan memikat.

Pelayanan Pelanggan Ramah: Kepuasan pelanggan adalah prioritas kami. Tim kami selalu siap membantu Anda dengan senyum dan profesionalisme.

 Layanan Kami
Dari buket bunga untuk perayaan kecil hingga dekorasi acara besar-besaran, Floral.id menyediakan layanan bunga yang dapat disesuaikan untuk setiap kebutuhan.

 Hubungi Kami
Jadikan setiap momen lebih istimewa dengan sentuhan bunga dari Floral.id. Hubungi kami sekarang untuk konsultasi dan temukan cara kami dapat membuat setiap kesempatan lebih berbunga.

Terima kasih telah memilih Floral.id sebagai destinasi bunga Anda. Bersama, mari hiasi hidup dengan keindahan bunga!

#BungaSegar #AransemenBunga #Floralid #KeceriaanBerbunga

Name: Darling Dried Flowers
Description:
Welcome to Darling Dried Flowers! We are a small business selling handmade dried flower art created by our founder Wendy in New Hampshire. We capture beautiful blooms for everlasting memories.

100% of Darling's profits will be donated to organizations supporting underfunded schools and classrooms, childhood cancer, mental health, LGBTQ+ issues, those living with chronic illnesses, and disabled and neurodivergent people.

Wendy has cultivated a garden at her home in southern New Hampshire for over twenty years and has always enjoyed creating bouquets of cut flowers. After two of her children were married last summer, she tried her hand at preserving their wedding florals. This ignited a new passion for dried and pressed flowers, and soon every flower in her home garden was hanging in her basement to dry.

After creating many flower arrangements, bouquets, and suncatchers for her family members, they told her it was time to share her creations with the world. And so Darling Dried Flowers was born.

Fun fact: Darling Dried Flowers takes its name from the Darling family in J.M. Barrie’s Peter and Wendy! After all, our founder was named after the character Wendy in Peter Pan. And dried flowers capture the story’s essence of staying in a sweet moment forever.

We're so excited to share Wendy's work with you and to donate 100% of the proceeds to our community. Together, we will create lasting change from everlasting flowers.

Name: Making Dream
Description:
Creating Meaningful Connections With Our Flowers
ABOUT US
Welcome to Making Dream!

Toronto Luxury Roses and Flower Bouquets, where floral artistry meets heartfelt sentiments. We are more than just a flower shop; we are creators of unforgettable moments, conveyors of emotions, and the perfect destination for exquisite flower boxes and gifts. Our journey began with a shared love for nature’s most beautiful creations and a desire to share that love with the world.

Our Mission

At Toronto Luxury Roses and Flower Bouquets, our mission is to redefine the way you experience flowers. We believe that every occasion, from birthdays to anniversaries, weddings to corporate events, deserves a touch of natural elegance. Our dedication to sourcing the most exquisite blooms and creating unique arrangements is a testament to our commitment to exceeding your expectations.

The Essence of Luxury

We understand that luxury is not just about the finest materials; it’s about the care and attention to detail that goes into every creation. Each flower that graces our arrangements is meticulously handpicked, ensuring only the freshest and most vibrant blossoms find their way into our collections. We specialize in roses, the universal symbol of love and beauty, and we take pride in presenting them to you in ways you’ve never seen before.

O nosso propósito é aproximar as pessoas da beleza e da simplicidade do verde, promovendo práticas sustentáveis e uma relação mais autêntica com o ambiente. 
Queremos transformar o dia a dia através de soluções criativas e acessíveis, sempre guiados pela paixão e pelo desejo de inovar.

Name: Timeless Arches
Description:
Elevate Your Event with Luxurious, Sustainable Faux Floral Arrangements

Based in the picturesque Reno/Tahoe area, we specialize in creating breathtaking faux floral arches and arrangements that add a touch of timeless elegance to weddings and special events.

Our high-quality silk flowers and greenery offer the beauty of fresh-cut florals without the limitations. With our faux floral arch rentals, you can choose the exact designs you love without worrying about seasonal shortages, wilting blooms, or inflated costs. Our florals stay vibrant and picture-perfect, no matter the weather, ensuring your event looks flawless from start to finish.

Why Choose Timeless Arches?

Affordable Luxury: Experience high-impact floral designs at a fraction of the cost of fresh flowers. Our lush, reusable arrangements deliver the elegant, sophisticated look you desire while staying within your budget.

Sustainable Elegance: Our faux florals have a lower carbon footprint after just a few uses, making them a more sustainable choice. Plus, we donate or upcycle retired flowers, giving them a meaningful second life.

Customizable and Versatile: Our designs are crafted to seamlessly transition from wedding ceremonies to receptions, offering a flexible solution for your event decor. We can also add pops of color that perfectly fit your event palette.

Discover how Timeless Arches can transform your space with luxurious, eco-friendly floral arrangements. Whether you’re planning a wedding, corporate event, or special celebration, our designs ensure your occasion is both beautiful and memorable.

Let’s create something timeless together. Connect with us today to explore our offerings and discuss how we can bring your vision to life.

Un espacio donde las flores hablan por nosotros cuando las palabras no alcanzan. 
Creemos que los detalles nacen del corazón, y que cada ramo es una oportunidad para honrar, celebrar y consolar con amor y belleza. 

Nuestro nombre, Ebenezer, tiene un profundo significado, inspirado en1 Samuel 7:12, donde el profeta Samuel levantó una piedra y dijo:“Hasta aquí nos ha ayudado el Señor. 

”Ebenezer" es eso para nosotros: una declaración de gratitud. Cada flor que entregamos es fruto de la fidelidad de Dios. Él ha estado con nosotros en cada paso, y queremos que tú también lo sientas al recibir o regalar uno de nuestros arreglos.

Name: Ostara's Grove
Description:
Nestled in the heart of Vermont’s Northeast Kingdom, Ostara’s Grove is a boutique floriculture oasis specializing in the cultivation of exquisite cut flowers and ornamentals. Our blooms are more than just plants; they are a celebration of nature’s enchanting palette, carefully nurtured to bring a touch of magic to your everyday moments.

Named affectionately after our beloved fluffy black cat, Ostara, our grove is a tribute to the mystical and the mysterious. Each petal and leaf is infused with an ethereal charm, reminiscent of ancient woodlands and fairy-tale enchantments. Yet, our grove remains grounded and welcoming, inviting flower enthusiasts and casual admirers alike to experience the joy of our botanical treasures.

At Ostara’s Grove, we believe in the bewitching power of flowers to transform spaces and spirits. Whether it’s a single stem or a lavish bouquet, our blooms are handpicked to ensure the highest quality and the most vibrant expressions of the season.

Join us in our floral fantasia, where every flower tells a story, and let the wonder of Ostara’s Grove add a spellbinding bloom to your life.

Name: Mossy Florist
Secret Garden Odessa
Description:
Бажаєте щось особливе, не таке, як у всіх? Звертайтеся до нас!

Ми працюємо в стилі європейської флористики, яка створює емоційні та надихаючі букети та композиції.

Secret Garden — це стиль, який поєднує інтелектуальну флористику з магією природи. 

Ми самі вирощуємо квіти в нашому чарівному саду, додаємо трохи волшебства та професійних флористичних навичок європейських майстрів, і створюємо неймовірні букети, які вражають з першого погляду. Наші композиції — це не просто квіти, а стильні й унікальні роботи, які відображають інтелектуальний підхід до флористики. 

Поринь у світ Secret Garden і знайди свій особливий букет!

Name: Güllərim
Description:
Təbiətin gözəlliyini və təravətini evlərinizə və iş yerlərinizə gətirmək məqsədilə fəaliyyət göstəririk. Müştərilərimizə geniş çeşiddə dibçək gülləri, bitkilər və ağaclar təqdim edərək, hər zövqə və məkana uyğun yaşıl həllər təklif edirik.

Məhsul Kateqoriyalarımız:

Ağaclar: Həmişəyaşıl, kölgə, çiçəkləyən, meyvə və dekorativ ağaclar.
Bitkilər: Çöl və iç məkan bitkiləri, su və hovuz bitkiləri, soğanlı bitkilər və kaktuslar.
Dekorlar: Çərçivələr, dekorativ mebel, fontanlar və digər bəzək əşyaları.
Dibçəklər: Saxsı, taxta, plastik və digər materiallardan hazırlanmış dibçəklər.
Toxumlar: Çiçək, qazon və tərəvəz toxumları.
Qazon: Süni və təbii qazon örtükləri.
Torf və Gübrələr: Bitkilərinizin sağlam böyüməsi üçün lazım olan torf və gübrələr.
Bundan əlavə, mənzil və ofislərin abadlaşdırılması, bağban xidməti və dizayn xidmətləri kimi peşəkar xidmətlərimizlə məkanlarınızı daha da gözəlləşdirməyə kömək edirik.

Müştəri məmnuniyyəti bizim üçün önəmlidir. Sevdikləriniz üçün gül sifarişlərinizi bizdən edərək, ölkənin hər yerinə çatdırılma imkanımızdan yararlana bilərsiniz.

Name: The Elite's Choice
Description:
من نحن

بدأنا العمل في ۲۰۱۱م في مجال تنسيق الورود الطبيعية وتقديم الهدايا، والعمل على جميع ما يمكنه أن يضيف جمال للمكان لكل أنوع المناسبات الإجتماعية.

ها نحن الآن أكبر وأوسع بفضل الله ثم ثقتكم، وأصبح مجال عملنا في هذا الفرع من المؤسسة يخدم مجال الأعمال، وفي كل ما من شأنه أن يرفع جودة بيئة العمل وإضافة لمسات جمالية.

Who We Are

We started working in 2011 in the field of arranging natural flowers and gift packaging, alongside working on all things that add beauty to a space for all kinds of social events.

We are now bigger and wider all thanks to God and your trust. Our field of work has now expanded to supply businesses, and everything that raises the quality of the work environment and adds aesthetic touches.

قيمنا

استلهمنا شعارنا من حجر “الأميرالد” وهو حجر كريم و نادز  يرمز للمخملية و التفرد و الجمال. ومن هذه الرمزية للحجر الكريم نسعى بأن يكون جلّ عملنا يتمتع بقدر كبير من الرقي و الاحترافية و الجمال و الاإتقان.

Our Values

Our logo was inspired by the “Emerald” stone, a precious and rare stone that symbolizes royalty, exclusivity and beauty. From this symbolism of the precious stone, we seek that most of our work be characterized by a great deal of sophistication, professionalism, beauty and perfection.

Flowers for Events and Organizations in der Stadt: We are ready to decorate any event – from private parties to large corporate events and weddings.

High Quality and Service: Our goal is to ensure every customer is satisfied with both the result and the process.

How We Work:
After you place an order, we contact the nearest florist partner who will fulfill your order promptly. Deliveries are carried out by our florist partners, ensuring speed and reliability.

Range and Opportunities:
On our website, you will find not only classic bouquets but also unique floral arrangements suitable for any occasion. We also offer decorative elements and accessories to make your event unforgettable.

BlumenHorizon – the flower shop, where you can buy bouquets with delivery and bring joy to your loved ones. Our flowers are a way to express feelings, emphasize the moment’s uniqueness, and make your day special.

From the vibrant colors of seasonal flowers to the elegance of our carefully arranged bridal bouquets, we use only the freshest and highest-quality blooms. Our custom floral centerpieces and arrangements are perfect for enhancing your home, celebrating milestones, or making someone’s day a little brighter.

In addition to our custom flower designs, we offer reliable flower delivery across King City, Aurora, Bradford, Newmarket, Woodbridge, and the GTA, all at a flat rate. Whether it’s a stunning centerpiece or a thoughtful gift, we’ll make sure it’s delivered on time.

Description:

W autorskiej kwiaciarni powstają kompozycje wyjątkowe i nowatorskie łączące wielopokoleniową pasję ogrodniczą z nowoczesną sztuką układania kwiatów. "Od samego początku działalności obiecaliśmy sobie, iż dołożymy wszelkich starań by tak jak nasi rodzice, dziadkowie i pradziadkowie, oferować klientom kwiaty wyhodowane we własnych szklarniach. Nasza kwiaciarnia znajduje się przy ul. Wólczańskiej 222, nieopodal miejsca, w którym w 1938 roku swój sklep miał dziadek Adam.”

Projektowanie i tworzenie ślubnej oprawy kwiatowej to jedna z gałęzi florystyki, którą się zajmujemy i którą uwielbiamy ze względu na cały proces tworzenia i obcowania z naszymi klientami. Ich radość i wzruszenie przy efekcie końcowym to dla nas największa nagroda!

Name: Bloemerie Conny
Description:
Ik ben Conny Bakker en mijn leven is BLOEMEN. Als klein meisje liep ik al rond in de bloemenkwekerij van mijn ouders. Later hielp ik in onze bloemenwinkels en ging ik met m’n vader mee naar de veiling om bloemen in te kopen voor de groothandel. Zoals verwacht deed ik na de middelbare school de bloemistenopleiding. Na drie jaar gestudeerd te hebben in Rotterdam, begon ik op 21-jarige leeftijd mijn bloemenwinkel in Sluis. Vier jaar later opende ik een tweede bloemenwinkel in Terneuzen (Zuidpolder).

Na 20 jaar met liefde en passie gewerkt te hebben, had ik inmiddels een gezin en verdienden zij mijn prioriteit. Om die reden stopte ik met mijn eigen winkels en ging ik parttime in dienst bij diverse bloemenwinkels. Mijn kinderen gaan nu hun eigen weg en ik dus ook weer de mijne. Ik ben momenteel freelance bloemist. Dat wil zeggen dat ik tijdens drukte, vakantie- of ziekteperiodes in bloemenwinkels help. Daarnaast heb ik in mijn binderij voldoende ruimte voor de workshops die ik minimaal drie keer per jaar geef. Dit kan ook na overleg op locatie. Bovendien maak ik bruidswerk en bijzonder rouwwerk. Ik heb nu de tijd om samen na te denken over bloemwerk wat heel dichtbij komt; bloemwerk dat een verhaal vertelt

We handcraft each petal using high-quality materials—satin ribbon— plus thoughtful accessories like beads, crowns, and bows. Our finishing touches bring warmth, elegance, and a touch of lasting charm to every piece. Our logo—“G.E.M. Crafts”—isn't just a name; it’s who we are. Each letter (G, E, M) represents a member of our family of five. The periods highlight that it’s an acronym —a tribute to the creativity and unity at the heart of our business. We design to delight—whether it’s a custom centerpiece for a celebration, a unique gift that tells a story, or a hands-on craft kit that motivates imagination. At G.E.M. Crafts, behind everything is our family of five—each member bringing a spark of individuality, skill, and heart to our handmade art. 

~ G.E.M.—crafted by our family of five, for yours.

Name: RadiantFlorist
Description:
鮮花盛開時，絢麗而燦爛，然而花期總是轉瞬即逝，每次看着鮮花凋零，你也和我們一樣，感到莫名可惜嗎？這正是Radiant Florist的誕生由來。我們專注以永生花技術，將花朵最動人一刻凝住，為你獻上一直盛放的花禮。

Radiant Florist成立於2023年10月，由自小喜歡花藝的主理人Hannah一手創立。創店的契機源於在水果店兼職時的一次創作 —— 當時為了推銷店內水果，忽發奇想，並用了兩星期自學，創作出一款水果花束，繼而在母親節接下並獨立完成了過百張訂單。伴隨而來的成功感，啟發Hannah在大學最後一年毅然決定創業，踏上花藝之路，探索喜歡的領域。

品牌之所以名為Radiant，背後象徵着每一朵恆久充滿生機、散發不息光芒的花朵，同時亦代表着我們希望能為你與摯親的生活添上色彩的願景 —— 「We don't remember days, we remember moments.」在平凡日子裡，就讓我們化作生活中的一道獨特風景，令每個重要時刻更璀璨難忘。

亦正因如此，我們非常重視與每位客人的交流。前來Radiant Florist選購花禮，將不止是一個普通的購物過程，我們會透過用心聆聽你的分享，感知禮物背後所盛載的故事，才為你精心挑選、製作花禮。因為我們相信，認真對待每一朵花，好好呈現當中故事，收花的人才能充分感受箇中情感。

Name: Coroa de Flores ABC

Isso aconteceu para facilitar que nossos clientes que estão passando pelo momento delicado como a morte de alguém querido possam fazer a compra das flores para funeral com mais agilidade e sem nenhuma burocracia. 

 

Mesmo em plataformas distintas os objetivos de nossa empresa continuam os mesmos.

Conheça nossa razão de existir:

Missão
Facilitar que pessoas enviem homenagem rápido para todos os locais do Brasil independente de que lugar do mundo elas se encontrem

Visão
Ser uma empresa reconhecida por sua excelência e pontualidade na entrega de produtos que levem carinho.

Valores
Liberdade geográfica e temporal
Agilidade em todos os processos 
Criar prosperidade e oportunidades para outros com responsabilidade social e ambiental
Se o cliente não ficou satisfeito, o negócio não foi feito
Inclusão - Todos têm potencial de desenvolvimento, independentemente das suas diferenças individuais, basta oportunidade e acessibilidade.
Estar aberto a mudanças é um valor constante em nossa empresa
Respeito 
Honestidade

Name: BioVerdé
Description:
Des fleurs et des plantes locales cultivées en France pour faire entrer la nature dans vos vies durablement et contribuer à des espaces plus verts, plus apaisants et écoresponsables.chez les particuliers et dans les espaces professionnels.

BioVerdé est basée dans le sud de la France, à Carry le Rouet, près de Marseille. Depuis notre création, notre objectif est simple : apporter le bien-être et la beauté grâce aux plantes et aux fleurs,

Nos valeurs sont au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons : durabilité, en travaillant avec des producteurs locaux et respectueux de l’environnement ; bien-être, pour créer des espaces agréables et inspirants ; et accessibilité, afin que chacun puisse profiter facilement des bienfaits du végétal. 

Notre mission est claire : faire entrer la nature dans vos vies, simplement et durablement, et contribuer à des espaces plus verts et plus apaisants. Bienvenue chez BioVerdé.

Pour les particuliers, qui rêvent d’un univers fleuri :
- Un mariage ? Nous organisons toute la scénographie florale pour que ce jour soit unique et mémorable. 
- Kits “Prêts à planter”
- Abonnement “Plante du mois” 
- Atelier session pour des conseils personnalisés et apprendre à avoir la main plus verte

Pour les professionnels: Végétalisation & entretien
- Des créations d’aménagements végétaux sur mesure et clé en main, en intérieurs et en extérieurs tels que vos terrasses, vos cours et patios… Incluant l’installation et un entretien régulier éco-responsable. 
- Location de plantes 
- Scénographie florale événementielle 
- Livraison de bouquets pour les anniversaires, pots de départ…
- Hôtels, restaurants et boutiques : Des fleurs et services pour une expérience unique, sur mesure et la satisfaction de vos clients. 

Entreprises, producteurs Français de fleurs, contactez-nous!

Name: Valley View Ridge
Description: We fell in love with air plants for so many reasons. For one reason they are forgiving. If you forget to water them weekly you can water them more the next time and they will still thrive (as long as not too much time has not passed). Another reason is that they are easy to take care of as they only require water and indirect light. Though the most important reason is they teach a valuable lesson in life. Many of the plants are just green for a long time but with enough patience (which could be years!) they create the most beautiful blooms. Life is like that. With patience life can be beautiful.

Name: Terrarium De Fleurs
Description:
Hi, I’m Eli, the founder and creative force behind Terrarium de Fleurs, a business born from my passion for nature and creativity. Originally from Romania, I moved to Reno, NV, in 2019, where I found a community that inspired me to turn a simple hobby into a thriving full-time venture. What began as a way to pass the time during a busy marketing career has blossomed into something much more meaningful. Terrarium de Fleurs specializes in capturing the fleeting beauty of nature through unique creations like jewelry, wall decor, and floral preservation art. Each piece is thoughtfully designed to preserve special memories and bring the timeless beauty of flowers into everyday life.

Over the past two years, I’ve grown this business with a lot of heart and determination, running it mostly on my own with occasional help from incredible friends. Whether I’m at Sunday markets or connecting with customers from across the globe, I’m driven by the joy of sharing the essence of nature through my designs.

If you’re looking to celebrate life’s special moments, preserve your wedding bouquet, or simply bring a touch of nature’s magic into your home, Terrarium de Fleurs is here for you.

Name: NOZAM
Description:
[LA LETTRE DU FLEURISTE]

Je crois que les fleurs ont un pouvoir secret : celui de rendre la vie plus douce.

Elles illuminent un coin de table, transforment une journée banale en instant mémorable.

C'est pour ça que j'ai créé NOZAM.

Ici, vous trouverez les bouquets qui fleuriront vos lendemains. Des bouquets où les couleurs s'animent et les formes s'affirment.

J'aime le mouvement, les fleurs qui dansent, l'asymétrie. Je crois que, tout comme la vie, les bouquets ne sont pas faits pour être figés. Ils sont faits pour s'agiter.

Alors je cherche ce détail qui change tout : une tige qui se courbe, un pétale qui se déplie… Ce presque rien qui marque les esprits.

Bienvenue chez NOZAM.

With love,
Dawei

Name: Flowers by Jig
Description:
Certainly! Here's an extended and SEO-friendly version for Flower by Jig:

Welcome to Flower by Jig, your premier destination for handcrafted floral arrangements that blend elegance with sustainability. Specializing in a diverse array of products, including meticulously crafted bouquets, delicate corsages, stylish boutonnieres, captivating table decorations, and charming framed florals, Flower by Jig transforms spaces with timeless beauty.

At the heart of our creations lies Sola Wood, an eco-friendly material sourced locally in Thailand. This sustainable alternative to traditional flowers allows us to offer blooms that not only look remarkably realistic but also endure beautifully over time. Each petal and arrangement is meticulously handcrafted, ensuring a unique and exquisite piece that resonates with both elegance and environmental consciousness.

Our commitment to sustainability extends beyond materials; it's a philosophy embedded in every aspect of our business. By choosing Flower by Jig, you're making a conscious choice to reduce environmental impact without compromising on style or quality. Our floral arrangements are designed to be cherished for years, offering a lasting reminder of special moments.

Whether you're planning a wedding, celebrating a milestone, or simply looking to beautify your space sustainably, Flower by Jig provides personalized solutions to suit your needs. We ship globally, ensuring that our craftsmanship and commitment to quality reach customers worldwide.

Discover the artistry and sustainability of Sola Wood florals with Flower by Jig. Let us transform your vision into a timeless masterpiece that celebrates nature's beauty responsibly.

Name: 30 Bunches
Description:
Tiệm hoa 30 Bunches Phú Mỹ Hưng Quận 7
Tiệm hoa Phú Mỹ Hưng tại quận 7 là một trong các địa chỉ uy tín để cung cấp sản phẩm sáng tạo từ hoa tươi đến hoa khô được thiết kế ấn tượng, tinh tế tại TP.HCM.

Đi cùng với sự phát triển của công nghệ, 30 BUNCHES thực hiện hoạt động kinh doanh của mình không dưới 02 hình thức chính đó là kinh doanh tại cửa hàng (Địa chỉ: 5-1B Phạm Thái Bường, Phường Tân Phong, Quận 7, TP. HCM) và kinh doanh thông qua Website 30BUNCHES.VN.

Ngoài ra, Công ty TNHH 30 BUNCHES còn kinh doanh hoa thông qua các trang mạng xã hội như Facebook, Instagram, Zalo, Tiktok… Ở mỗi kênh đều có đội ngũ tư vấn chuyên nghiệp luôn luôn đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng.

Tiệm hoa 30 BUNCHES Phú Mỹ Hưng tập trung phát triển gồm
Chuyên hoa khô cao cấp: Hoa thật nhưng được lưu giữ mãi mãi
Chuyên hoa tươi thiết kế tinh tế: hoa sinh nhật, hoa khai trương, hoa chúc mừng, điện hoa, hoa đám tang và thiết kế hoa riêng theo yêu cầu cho cá nhân, sự kiện và hội nghị.
Quà tặng handmade cao cấp.
Với mong muốn đem đến cho thị trường những sản phẩm – dịch vụ theo tiêu chuẩn tốt nhất và những trải nghiệm hoàn toàn mới về văn hóa dùng hoa.

Slogan “We dont only sell flowers, we sell happiness”
Không chỉ là hoa, 30 BUNCHES mang đến những cảm xúc thật sự cho khách hàng.
Với khẩu hiệu “We dont only sell flowers, we sell happiness / Chúng tôi không chỉ bán hoa, chúng tôi bán hạnh phúc” 30 BUNCHES mong muốn khách hàng sẻ cảm thấy thật hạnh phúc khi nhận hoa.

Đây là kim chỉ nam của 30 BUNCHES, động lực để 30 BUNCHES nỗ lực cải thiện chính mình.

Đối với 30 BUNCHES chất lượng dịch vụ là “Danh dự” của Công ty và toàn thể nhân viên.
Giá trị cốt lõi của 30 Bunches
Luôn đặt chữ Tín lên vị trí hàng đầu và làm vũ khí để cạnh tranh
Luôn đặt chữ Tâm cho nền tảng quan trọng của việc kinh doanh
Luôn đặt chữ Trí trong sáng tạo khác biệt và phát triển sản phẩm, dịch vụ.
Luôn đặt chữa Nhân trên cơ sở công bằng, chính trực và rộng lượng
Luôn lấy Tốc Độ để đặt hiệu quả trong từng hành động
Location: Hồ Chí Minh, Phú Mỹ Hưng, Q7

Name: Petite nature bzh
Description:
Je suis Fanny, créatrice de Petite Nature BZH, une entreprise basée à Questembert (Morbihan), spécialisée dans la conception de fleurs et plantes en papier destinées aux professionnels.
 Mon travail allie savoir-faire artisanal, sens du détail et inspiration tirée de plusieurs années passées au contact des plantes aromatiques et médicinales.
J’accompagne les entreprises, commerces et restaurants dans la création de décorations durables et sur mesure :

> Habillage de vitrines

> Décoration de boutiques ou d’espaces d’accueil

> Mise en ambiance pour restaurants, salons ou événements internes

> Création de pièces uniques pour valoriser une identité visuelle ou une atmosphère spécifique.

Je propose également des ateliers créatifs en entreprise, pensés pour renforcer la cohésion d’équipe, offrir un moment de respiration ou enrichir une démarche QVT. Chaque atelier est adapté à vos objectifs et à votre organisation.
Toutes mes prestations sont réalisées sur commande, à la suite d’un échange téléphonique permettant de définir vos besoins avec précision. Je remets chaque création en main propre, pour garantir la qualité du travail et préserver le lien humain qui fait partie intégrante de mon métier.

Si vous souhaitez apporter une touche d’originalité, de poésie et de durabilité à votre environnement professionnel, je serais ravie d’en discuter avec vous.

Name: Beronica Floral Studio
Description: Tu nueva floristería en el encantador barrio de Iturrama, Pamplona. Ubicados en la avenida Sancho el Fuerte número 10, somos más que una simple tienda de flores: nos especializamos en la organización de todo tipo de eventos familiares y sociales, ofreciendo un servicio integral y personalizado.

Name: Linda jardinera
Description:
Linda Jardinera nació de la necesidad de reconectar con lo simple: con la tierra, el cuidado, la belleza natural y los pequeños detalles que hacen de cada rincón un lugar con alma.
Aquí creemos que las plantas no solo decoran: acompañan, enseñan y sanan. Son una forma de regalar amor, de cultivar presencia, paciencia y alegría. Cada hoja, cada raíz, cada flor tiene una historia... y queremos ayudarte a que esa historia también sea parte de tu hogar.
En nuestra tienda encontrarás una cuidadosa selección de plantas, maceteros y accesorios para acompañarte en tu camino verde. Siempre con atención personalizada y asesoría cercana, porque sabemos que elegir una planta es también elegir un vínculo.
Actualmente estamos en Parque Arauco Oriente, queremos ayudarte a encontrar esa plantita especial que te haga vibrar.
Gracias por sembrar con nosotros.

Name: The Posy Crew
Description:
The Posy Crew is a full-service floral studio in Far North Queensland, crafting wild, romantic and artful arrangements that elevate destination weddings, luxury events and brand-defining corporate functions across Port Douglas, Cairns, Palm Cove and the Atherton Tablelands. From concept and sourcing to on-site styling and seamless pack-down, our team translates each brief into bespoke installations that leave lasting impressions. 

Led by award-winning designer — and over two-decade industry veteran — Debra Pemble, we also share our expertise through select workshops and mentoring, nurturing the next generation of floral creatives.
